Progressive Democrats want us to believe **Defunding the Police** will decrease the rate of violent crime, but the facts don't back them up...

_"After the city of Portland slashed its police budget by $12 million and eliminated three police units, the police withdrew while shootings climbed 173% and murders rose 255% in nine months" -- LELDF 4/14/21_

That's why we're calling for 10,000 responses to our survey before midnight.

**Defunding the Police** could be on the table if Democrats win in the midterms.

[**Will you take our one-minute survey before midnight and let us know what you think will happen if Democrats Defund the Police? >>**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=bb43ec0d69d7471cb99321b8f43c0d71&_e=eaRNJk3UqpYM_s6fLUrhAcYdf6TEkvcG7KXkh2GjmEWop0f8sBnBWw5QLBGBRhY-ebLwu0SZJNsK2O49N2X-QW-XzE3P1C-3uCnx3ibULUJBM41nHaUh0_V3kC_nSK4UV35Pnams8tEidWcqXMoQELHgR3xKl1M2hV79XyJzAhV4Xikw0HS0zOefPJwMuUuUrHcbe5JNFNgjCGjvdPEwX4X7iB0Iv7FVrAIeIopMCUdN3ZQCAOxAVTuHFAMaJ0w7x2oCN6mpnfNtDfUyByC1uYSp24jnfrrT-kAXLW08R7GVSoyEeksnuS6IXjgpvFXDqyBn0uGPDxViZvxpJNhpCXtfzdIagLENXR14kr7r8wvRNdQxwPUFvq3C4yv9u5aYCTSNv54JIMfu6wTUr3eXgVxhR64XucXttkfsXGeNuUlL2BJ2LDm1jR2IgpwdAcL27Cfyrm-nSuUWCEMEDcKtW7aGm35HxlqCeqILDySYAyc%3D)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: They want to “keep Georgia blue.”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
In the last three months of 2021, our opponent raised $9.8 million from 130,000 individual donors from all 50 states. In the last three months of 2021, our opponent raised $9.8 million from 130,000 individual donors from all 50 states.. |
---
Fellow Conservative,

If you look at the screenshot below from a recent Democrat Senatorial Campaign Committee email, _you'd think that our opponent was in dire need of cash and help from the National Democrat Party._

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=58eddebbb64a440696d815abee8f1a3a&_e=XsxXroclE24xXSG-t08gg1u-ci9ej0WJ1IDSaoT5uR_1xoZfpn2pWiPSRoquiWsopGP3LHcOfIhOtSdH7BfpRbaLboXJhYjlRPyA43BryyxfpysW50ZqCf-qIaT6Q_7fiLUlAQV0ZhEqS5uiz0eVRFaA-kZQuF_Y35sSEz4PuoreHFAfwCiu7LQw75yA4BQ0tE7DgbEeImeCNtFLGhvSoDpRCM-QOFQO9bvVkpL7T_rPVOvTIpd04Y0bL7gu3c1R7FSa0os8iYHceylk4U8qvxmYvI17m24mDTVfG7vuSqPvxHGkWOX9KHcvi0XS4AnTfKs1vcl66sUdSRxkrM9EnAohl2TdhwEAFdjDpd24gTOAMZXkV9oP9jBzBJlFHdt7CHmnkOYYGbc1CDI7FNs1He0qtWWQo1UKfGSLh2DJ6u2YL5AZnfaQtYdWV-frGMwR0US3BBEo6hSnIo2KxXyejHCB2dy0Ddni1tF3LYLpbNM%3D)
Recent polling in Georgia indeed gives our campaign a slight lead (within the margin of error), but our Democrat opponent doesn't need more campaign cash.

In the last three months of 2021, **our opponent raised $9.8 million from 130,000 individual donors. As it stands, he has $23 million in the bank for our Senate race this November.**

While our campaign also had significant fundraising support last quarter, the fact remains that our opponent started raising money months before we even entered the race. With his early start, he now has millions more in the bank than us. We've got to pick up the pace if we're going to catch up because "to keep the Senate blue," Democrats must win Georgia.

body:

Hi Peter,Did you see Dr. Fauci's latest flip-flop? I went on Fox Business to talk about it. **For the last two years, we have been told to follow the medical science, but instead, it seems like Dr. Fauci is following the "political" science. **
[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zihljx-idtjvlhlh-r/) **From the beginning, I joined my Republican colleagues in calling for an investigation into the origins of COVID. Americans deserve answers. **Nancy Pelosi and the rest of the Democratic leadership have avoided this issue altogether. We cannot afford to suffer under their one-party rule any longer. We need to take back the House and take away the Speaker's gavel from Nancy Pelosi. body:

---
I've been 100% clear on my opinion of Dr. Anthony Fauci. He's been dishonest, political, and partisan, distorting science to exercise authoritarian control and cover up his own conduct.

**He is the most dangerous bureaucrat in U.S history.**

I've demanded the Department of Justice INVESTIGATE and PROSECUTE Fauci for lying to Congress when he claimed that the federal government and his NIH did not fund "gain-of-function" research in Wuhan, China.

This new evidence obtained by Judicial Watch shows that Fauci did indeed know about "gain-of-function" research and funding of the Wuhan coronavirus.
Fauci, the Biden administration, and the Fake News media can attack me all they want... I WILL NOT STOP fighting to expose how Fauci and his bureaucrat pals spent MILLIONS of U.S. taxpayer dollars to make viruses more harmful and deadly.
Take action now to join me in this fight, Peter | | **[**CONTRIBUTE NOW **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59537806:6_UeinENt:m:1:3253819041:4432A739118160530B37DFEEDD129CB9:r)**

Ted Cruz

name: American Action News
subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:
I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgec7ah07083mbhjs7er6132eehggufpd0lri2ko_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ulj78opl65gbcthkm9rrcdhhmlr7bcjnmaq34oji69o79chlcdhb4clie5pb0o37q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphlcsqradti61j79o5jc9jr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or1c5jm2o72c9gm49fg)
| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsiqe8578cl5pmfvcm0vik5ilioj3b0gloghd2f0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctgm1oj2c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd105e1lh4r93ma205chelb4ucu20luklhn44lr8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctgm1oj2c5h2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5n2goesmclhbc76g9a3o0ndrq99ket9cs33uh2g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctgm1oj2c5h2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

body:
I want to thank all of the Alabama patriots like you who have rallied behind me in my campaign for re-election in 2022.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zjnabonf5bl0nm6h9pb3m1ajhoc8jgo3iblvi3k8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkeq32t5nmeq33cjl61qn4cdkmoq37c3nm6or9ctn6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf8tdicerj8cr4c5pjecpimir3ap9hmdrj8cr66pgr2opkmuoj1dpncgo7fcjj63jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqmeddl61p30phkcapm6ptgmlin48d245p25oh4cdgm2pr5c1g6cor24no)

_** Wow, what a night! I want to thank all of the Alabama patriots like you who have rallied behind me in my campaign for re-election in 2022. We’ve accomplished so much together here in Alabama, and I’m beyond honored to have earned your support for another term. When you re-elect me as your Governor in November, I’ll keep doing what I’ve always done. **_I’ll chase Planned Parenthood out of our state for good, I’ll continue to fight back against the federal government’s attacks on your rights, and I’ll keep signing legislation that improves our economy, our infrastructure, and our lives._** As my campaign to keep working for you officially kicks off, I want to give you the opportunity to become a 2022 Day One Donor and earn the OFFICIAL team Kay Ivey badge. [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z427fg3orgf7gbrt73emptm5djv9irntis72obk0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctim0o36cdh2bs) Friend, I would be so grateful to see your name on my list of 2022 Day One Donors.
**In any campaign, getting off to a fast start makes all the difference in building momentum, so I’m hoping I can get at least 200 Alabama patriots to join me by TONIGHT.**_[**Can I count on you?**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zrcnf9vbplvtc6smi25f90sk0vgqbbo361estbvg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctim0o36cdh2bs)_ **[_Chip in ANY AMOUNT today to join my 2022 fight as a DAY ONE DONOR!_](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zfghc2doq81dpthn2rsp3cdu4ti4el01j1cmej3o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctim0o36cdh2bs)** [**CHIP IN $75 – Earn your DAY ONE DONOR badge**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2ztqs0fvq6r3e9sn5256j9fpdsiap026p27rm8d3g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctim0o36cdh2bs) [**CHIP IN $50 – Earn your DAY ONE DONOR badge**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zhbvsmchf2vi1ofek3l0bi0jic3olv6hib0n52fo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctim0o36cdh2bs) [**CHIP IN $25 – Earn your DAY ONE DONOR badge**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zkjbnt05uh8560plkm6dihpiesq457hs1jhj7m80_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctim0o36cdh2bs) [**Donate ANY AMOUNT today**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z8hc2j6ejvlpvnhfbf56b46l9sl0fvnn62ef1i5g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctim0o36cdh2bs) Thanks, Governor Kay Ivey |

body:

Friend,

It’s not the easiest thing to admit, but I’m getting beat like a rented mule in fundraising by my new Radical Opponent. It’s not a good sign for me, you, or any other conservative in Louisiana as we start 2022.

I’ll be blunt: If I don’t catch up to him and catch up quick, he’s going to blow me out of the water come November and threaten to turn Louisiana and the U.S. Senate into a Socialist safe haven. I won’t have it, and I hope you won’t either, but I’m coming to you in all sincerity when I say I can’t do this by myself.

I’ve got to have your help if I’m going to have a chance. I’ve got to have your help if we’re going to save America. It’s not up for debate. Your support is the answer. Your support is the only thing standing in the way of Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked dream candidate wiping the floor with me this coming November. I’m humbly asking for your help. **Without it, they’ll keep burying me with their unlimited dollars.

I’M ASKING FOR YOUR HELP.

WITHOUT IT I CAN’T STOP THE LEFT. **

name: Ann Coulter
subject: College campuses have gone insane
body:
College campuses have gone absolutely insane.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zksm8egorg2ktbv9v73si1mpd4758mqgatj29gdg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u1pnadr2mpi3eohiedj6epjlmtib8pj76pj34t1lmoom0tlhc5pm9odje9gm0ppnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphlcsqrac3i61j38oljc9jr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or1c5jmao30cpgm49fg)
College campuses have gone absolutely insane. Here's one thing you can do about it that can really make a difference.
|
---
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ziq4gpo0qpflbapbrng99ro6ti2q1b9lcfnr9r60_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctim0o36c5h2bs) Fellow Conservative, **College campuses have gone absolutely insane.** A student group asked me to speak about our nation’s immigration laws at the University of California at Berkeley, the so-called “birthplace of the free speech movement.” As you may have heard, my speech was abruptly canceled because leftist thugs decided to riot and the administration wouldn’t stick up for free speech. Unfortunately, I’m not the only one to suffer threats and intimidation on campus. Far from it. [ **Fight the intolerant left on campus** ](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5f2jf337m4brbtuad46q5smve7nq447ef0qj0qo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctim0o36c5h2bs) As I point out in _Resistance is Futile: How the Trump-Hating Left Lost Its Collective Mind_ , ever since Donald Trump’s arrival in politics, **liberals have lost their minds.** But there’s no padded room to keep them contained! Instead, **these violent, masked lunatics have taken over college campuses, where young Americans are turned into automaton leftists just like themselves.** Young conservatives on college campuses across our nation are losing their right to free speech – and even the right to walk down the street without getting sucker punched – because of how intolerant the liberals have become. [**But lest you think I’ve given up hope, faithful conservative, there’s a group I trust that fights back against this onslaught and exposes leftist bias, abuse, and indoctrination on college campuses for all the world to see:_Campus Reform_.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmak10vuitmotd17kferml19apuk4bnl2js4j3b8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctim0o36c5h2bs) **Campus Reform, a project of the Leadership Institute, is the single most powerful force for campus free speech in America today.** By sticking up for conservative students and giving them the tools necessary to defend themselves and their principles, Campus Reform provides an absolutely essential public service. **Bottom line – Campus Reform uncovers the liberal schemes that the mainstream media wants to keep hidden... and they shut down the liberals’ indoctrination on campus after campus.** [**To continue their vital work, Campus Reform counts on the generous support of conservatives just like you – yes, you! – which is why I urge you to partner with them today by making a generous gift of $25, $35, $50, $100, or more right now.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zodpblvl6dhtlshq607b44c4ajgclgl1lmjsnmlo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctim0o36c5h2bs) And to sweeten the pot – when you give $100 or more to LI’s Campus Reform, I’ll rush you a copy of my book, _Resistance is Futile_. Saving young conservatives AND getting a free book? What a deal! [ **Get my book here** ](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8cqf97pq9v14jjiafjjshod2fd29f2l7l3g8ado_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctim0o36c5h2bs) Campus police at the College of DuPage in Illinois told conservative students they’d **“lock them up” for handing out copies of the U.S. Constitution.** Yes, that dangerous document that the created the greatest country ever known to man. A teaching assistant at the University of Nebraska-Lincoln harassed the student president of a conservative group for recruiting students. With a gesture from her middle finger, she shrieked profanities at the conservative student and called her a “neo-fascist” and “Nazi.” Charming. At Purdue University in Indiana, a staffer called conservatives “vile, racist idiots” and **threatened to rape pro-life students.** (And you wonder why liberals prefer violence to debate.) In all three cases, LI’s Campus Reform exposed the truth. Armed with investigative reports from their student correspondents on campus, Campus Reform got word out to their nationwide audience of concerned conservatives. And they brought it to news outlets like Fox News, Newsmax, the Blaze, and numerous talk radio shows. Ultimately, Campus Reform’s exposure of the truth got _results_. In these cases and many others, **Campus Reform’s quick and powerful action forced universities to change their anti-conservative policies, discipline leftist student groups, and suspend or fire radical professors.** I believe an angel gets its wings every time a leftist professor is fired for their outrageous and unapologetic abuses against conservatives. But Campus Reform’s fight to make the left see the light and feel the heat won’t be won overnight. **To fight the forces of the intolerant left, stand up for free speech, and protect conservative students who want to simply share their beliefs without getting a black eye, Campus Reform is counting on your help.** [**Please make a generous investment of $25, $35, $50, or more today to support the Leadership Institute’s Campus Reform, stand up to liberal indoctrination, and ensure conservative students don’t lose their freedoms on college campuses.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z71qvk9tdta8liq5a4hb364k8e7q7mdip59l6vmg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctim0o36c5h2bs) Friend, let’s make ‘em pay. [**Please help Campus Reform right away so they can empower conservative students and strike back at the lunatic liberals.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6de4e4h27q220v72mpjsqtltjrf9doccm72ipfg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctim0o36c5h2bs) Thank you. In liberty, Ann Coulter **P.S. Remember, when you give $100 or more to LI’s Campus Reform, I’ll rush you a copy of my book,_Resistance is Futile_.** It’s just one more way I can thank you for joining this crucial cause. Because **if we lose the kids, we lose this country.** [**Please donate right away.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4lpc779tavt3cjmir7kesunrl3c2u5r1m6v2leg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctim0o36c5h2bs) Thank you.** [ **Yes, I'll join Campus Reform in the fight against leftist tyranny** ](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z518q2vp9k73716g1htnhpbduusiojlob9lef4rg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctim0o36c5h2bs)
---
| | The Leadership Institute 1101 N. Highland St. Steven P.J. Wood Building Arlington VA 22201 United States
---

# Weekly Newsletter
---
|
---
February 13, 2022 | Issue VII
---
| |
---
| |
## STATEMENT FROM LEADER ROB ORTT ON THE MASK MANDATE ANNOUNCEMENT BY THE GOVERNOR
WEDNESDAY, FEBRUARY 9 2022
---
| | The end of the 'business mask mandate' is long overdue. But it is absolutely outrageous that Governor Hochul is extending her mask mandate for school children, with no established off-ramp. The public deserves to know which metrics and so-called science her administration used to make this misguided decision.
At a time when restrictions across our country and the entire world are being dropped, New Yorkers are desperate for the same. They are desperate for leadership, desperate for checks and balances. This Governor and the Democrat-led legislature are providing NONE of the above and instead adding layers of more frustrations to New Yorkers.
My Republican colleagues and I have fought against these mandates for years, and will continue to do so until every single unconstitutional mandate is lifted.
###
---
| |
---
| |
---
### Its Past time to END the Unconstitutional Mask Mandate on our Children
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-QSmYefCmjgkYw9vmmUUKOyz9NO2tP3HN2LQHH025Qrf1PUG9QVfIsb1Sn4dEZOaiV_tqjrZ4k6UCUrkSw59IruPiDRYhr3elungncXa7bF7bt1xaPJTOLVrKxqYJrrWBKop98570msqRIZScAyNRlXo3bwuQfLL6Mk7QEkssFfmJ0FJx8AkymESvmroVJCwjcHqKwI6a5tD3bvU2J6EZWp0mVdfkHeHnhg0eKqdLMUJ3jbZBy1YelrfNKs7AjNF7GyVgNnq12_37g3ZKSy7P-I8NUkiIRo9PvAakoRFjoY=&c=Cl85jZUt4TNdqkjRGChF3__zSR8shD6wjB1SPrs8BYtVzChAI1cEYA==&ch=Dd-mspAMljKXoHXvhHui2Xw2wTdI3cGQVF4CAdMkLkC2jsTgiIa9QA==)
---
Children are suffering educationally and emotionally. Parents & families are fed up.
Local voices matter, checks & balances matter, and LEADERSHIP matters. It's PAST TIME to END the mandates!
Stand with Rob and make your voice heard by signing the petition below.
---

### Senate Republicans Call on the New Health Commissioner to Review the State's Past Pandemic Policies Relating to Nursing Homes
---
---
This week, Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt joined Senator Jim Tedisco, Senator Sue Serino, and Members of the Senate Republican Conference to announce legislation that would compel the NYSDOH Commissioner, Dr. Mary Bassett, to review the state's past pandemic policies relating to nursing home deaths.
"The Senate Republican conference has been a strong voice of accountability and transparency in New York State government. In particular, there have been no stronger advocates for the 15,000 plus nursing home victims than Senators Tedisco and Serino, and I applaud their tenacity in continuing to demand answers for all New Yorkers. While the Governor's office, DOH, and the Majorities in the Legislature are content to sweep history under the rug, this conference is fighting to ensure the lives of the 15,000 plus victims are remembered, which is why we are introducing legislation to designate March 25th as "We Care Remembrance Day" - to memorialize the lives lost and ensure we never repeat the mistakes of the past," said Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt.
---

### Senator Rob Ortt Joins Niagara Educators & Parents to Call for an End to Child Mask Mandate
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-QSmYefCmjgkYw9vmmUUKOyz9NO2tP3HN2LQHH025Qrf1PUG9QVfIsb1Sn4dEZOatrzdmLs-SBWLb3nd8R4BQ2Ut6RBLms5Bf916PHit0a8956CSfeHSLxs6gMQlDXE16teWfLcX-NyKtRKfY8RPvAdQAtsykHGOpRa5H2gV1YTPnYPk1YXv824obCRZaXScn0gdXUuLPFY5WurDOYp6jacGWQ7qgXgRcl571uZbplDFROwme_kGJ5Q7hYBp8-RIn0DOcubDDtw=&c=Cl85jZUt4TNdqkjRGChF3__zSR8shD6wjB1SPrs8BYtVzChAI1cEYA==&ch=Dd-mspAMljKXoHXvhHui2Xw2wTdI3cGQVF4CAdMkLkC2jsTgiIa9QA==)
---
On Saturday, New York State Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt joined Niagara Falls High School educators and parents to call for an end to New York's mask mandate for school children.
"Children have suffered under the heavy-handed mandates of Albany for far too long. I hear from countless parents, families, and educators all fed up that their children continue to be masked. The science tells us that children are less vulnerable to physical sickness, but more susceptible to emotional damage thanks to these destructive mandates. New Yorkers have had enough. We need Albany to listen to us - we need to end the mask mandate for school children NOW," said Senator Ortt.
Senator Ortt and his fellow Republicans have fought against statewide pandemic-era rules and regulations for years. These efforts include ending disgraced ex-Governor Cuomo's emergency powers, organizing communities in opposition to mandates, forcing legislative votes to repeal various emergency rules and regulations, and further pressuring the current Governor and others to end the era of extreme government overreach.
This week, Senator Ortt and his fellow Republicans penned a letter to Governor Kathy Hochul, requesting the metrics and thresholds she claims her administration will use to determine when to end the mask mandate in schools.
"I stand with the parents, grandparents, teachers, and local officials who are pushing for a much-needed return to normal. No government should ever again have the ability to make these choices for somebody's children," concluded Senator Ortt.
---

body:
Wow, what a night! [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6794%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=TX8DdsmCvz6XTSDjdWRDLw&sysid=1)

_** Wow, what a night! I want to thank all of the Alabama patriots like you who have rallied behind me in my campaign for re-election in 2022. We’ve accomplished so much together here in Alabama, and I’m beyond honored to have earned your support for another term. When you re-elect me as your Governor in November, I’ll keep doing what I’ve always done. **_I’ll chase Planned Parenthood out of our state for good, I’ll continue to fight back against the federal government’s attacks on your rights, and I’ll keep signing legislation that improves our economy, our infrastructure, and our lives._** As my campaign to keep working for you officially kicks off, I want to give you the opportunity to become a 2022 Day One Donor and earn the OFFICIAL team Kay Ivey badge. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69065%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9adLJkM10oBVVJRSizGt%2fg&sysid=1) Friend, I would be so grateful to see your name on my list of 2022 Day One Donors.
**In any campaign, getting off to a fast start makes all the difference in building momentum, so I’m hoping I can get at least 200 Alabama patriots to join me by TONIGHT.**_[**Can I count on you?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69066%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uOxF5QQa6vPnsa1%2frZZfyw&sysid=1)_ **[_Chip in ANY AMOUNT today to join my 2022 fight as a DAY ONE DONOR!_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69067%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Fm8zxxCoFTzxQoW3pix3uA&sysid=1)** [**CHIP IN $75 - Earn your DAY ONE DONOR badge**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69068%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9jNHf7wOCn8DlPJXOoAsrQ&sysid=1) [**CHIP IN $50 - Earn your DAY ONE DONOR badge**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69069%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fC3q88RDROBHwNhIVR3Hmw&sysid=1) [**CHIP IN $25 - Earn your DAY ONE DONOR badge**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69060%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=f%2bsnVECuCjnSlOcVD5l%2bdg&sysid=1) [**Donate ANY AMOUNT today**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69061%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ESZrYlVgFz0NW%2bIa5a28VA&sysid=1) Thanks, Governor Kay Ivey |

name: Leon Benjamin
subject: How Republicans win the black vote in 2022…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leon Benjamin for Congress
body:
Black support for conservative candidates is surging... and in 2022, we’ll lead the charge to take back America. My name is L
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zm08jgquk0n543cqk6vjvp7g1l4heb5l46l2ln1g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqe1dlke2prad5hcqqj2splempj4oj5esp31dj2mlqn6opn6gr31pr3mop66t9n6v970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6hj32t5lmorr4sj661ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5gmepb6cdh6coh5u)

Patriot,

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuke77ge4crivptsgs3gc636h5ripi9ardlc8bfo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctimcor2cph2bs) Black support for conservative candidates is surging... and in 2022, we’ll lead the charge to take back America.

My name is Leon Benjamin. I’m a pastor at my church, a veteran of the Gulf War, and a former leader of President Trump’s Faith-Based Initiative.

I’m also a black conservative... who isn’t afraid to tell the world that I love this country and am willing to fight for it.

As you can imagine, **the far-left will stop at nothing to discredit my campaign and keep me from Washington... which is why[I need your help to keep fighting to make my voice heard](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zccsvju9lss2rmef5qmpjgbduj56gngam51qpfl0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctimcor2cph2bs)**.

[**Please pitch in just $10--or even $20 or $50, if you can--to help recruit as many voters as possible to this fight.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn4qrbgmde3q4fm26632vsrf0o2h81hnbiiocijo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctimcor2cph2bs)

| [**DONATE NOW**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbnq305s7jvskqm8tlkf1h2ng38sbpf5dn1aau7o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctimcor2cph2bs)
---

For decades, Democrats have acted like they “own” the black vote.

Meanwhile, our communities have been **ravaged by the far-left’s disastrous and destructive policies**.

The far-left fears nothing more than black people waking up... and black conservatives winning in huge numbers this fall. Because they know we’ll demolish their racist agenda and lead a wave against their control of the minority vote.

But we face big headwinds in our fight to defeat the far-left. [**Can I count you in for an urgent gift of $10, $20, or even $50 right away?**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3r6itjf62nn214hs66plqtobk0paaaak8r66j0o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctimcor2cph2bs)

[**Please in $10, $20, or more now... to help us grow this campaign, reach voters, and win in November.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zicvaget21p64j33rhnfoi2rdk6aturjgd7jgpf8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctimcor2cph2bs)

Thanks for your help,

Leon Benjamin

[**DONATE NOW**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlfdi370i7c5qaio7ihv42jc3tcn617tnqoheg2g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctimcor2cph2bs)

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: I'm in trouble.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zl6ju3dvlnkngu31t2ch1if8dh70vffraoorgsd0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onleuoectr1elqbct77mkr79oti68pj3dti6or6ad5kcloj2d776aqmecphmhpjfduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4d3665qbbdhnm9pmcd30m9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi46h22sh2s8i66ob1ctimcor6c1h2bs)
It’s worse than I thought.

| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zem38ltgq4hdcd9dikio5q2uuf240a26hasthmb8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctimcor6c1h2bs)
---

Friend,

It’s not the easiest thing to admit, but I’m getting beat like a rented mule in fundraising by my new Radical Opponent. It’s not a good sign for me, you, or any other conservative in Louisiana as we start 2022.

I’ll be blunt: If I don’t catch up to him and catch up quick, he’s going to blow me out of the water come November and threaten to turn Louisiana and the U.S. Senate into a Socialist safe haven. I won’t have it, and I hope you won’t either, but I’m coming to you in all sincerity when I say I can’t do this by myself.

I’ve got to have your help if I’m going to have a chance. I’ve got to have your help if we’re going to save America. It’s not up for debate. Your support is the answer. Your support is the only thing standing in the way of Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked dream candidate wiping the floor with me this coming November. I’m humbly asking for your help. **Without it, they’ll keep burying me with their unlimited dollars.

I’M ASKING FOR YOUR HELP.

WITHOUT IT I CAN’T STOP THE LEFT. **
| | [RUSH AN EMERGENCY $500 DONATION](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztbtm93dsk35b2gll0c7aqbe20283nd2kpdte5u8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctimcor6c1h2bs)

I’m losing to this crazy, leftist opponent of mine, and I need your help.

* Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked dream candidate is going to represent Louisiana in the U.S. Senate

* Nationwide draconian mandates will be passed because there will be nobody in Washington Left to stand up to the Left and tell it how it is

These are just a few things that will happen if I don’t get the support I need to win re-election in 2022. The big question is: **Can I count on your support?**

name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: working at the slaughterhouse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41739800/330126847/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjNiM2MzYy1kNThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0VQp2gug0cVxpcqiaN9_asr_qnDeebv4zBFD-bHvez0=&emci=ccc9cbde-5f8c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=ff3b3c3c-d58c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41739809/330126850/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjNiM2MzYy1kNThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0VQp2gug0cVxpcqiaN9_asr_qnDeebv4zBFD-bHvez0=&emci=ccc9cbde-5f8c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=ff3b3c3c-d58c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
I’ve done a lot of jobs.
I worked the tools in my dad’s machine shop, welding and fixing trucks and farm implements. Later, to live on my own, I was a math tutor, a farm hand, a construction worker, a bar manager... even a slaughterhouse worker.
That slaughterhouse job was really something. It built fortitude in this 17-year-old. I recall showing a paycheck to my mother. She said, “Michael, that’s more money than your father has ever made.” Those words stay with me today.
In 1978, the wages at a meatpacking plant could provide a full-time worker with a house, kid’s tuition, a vacation, and maybe even a Buick. But then Chuck Grassley got to the U.S. Senate.
Actually, every Republican president since Ronald Reagan has sat back and watched profitability taken from the real producers – the workers. Free-market to them means industry running amuck. And Chuck Grassley helped make it all happen.
In exchange, Chuck Grassley has gotten millions of dollars from Wall Street execs, Big Pharma donors, and every kind of corporate PAC you can imagine plied into his campaign account.
**I’m running for Senate against Chuck Grassley because we need more progressive Democrats who come from humble beginnings and remember what it means to have worked a real job.** Iowa deserves a senator who will stand up to corporations and big money special interests – not take their money like Grassley has done for 46 years.
Of course, the Super PACs are already circling – raising millions of dollars to spend attacking me on TV. I’m a hard target being a Navy veteran with rural roots, but that won’t stop them. Not with control of the Senate at stake.

Later, to live on my own, I was a math tutor, a farm hand, a construction worker, a bar manager... even a slaughterhouse worker. That slaughterhouse job was really something. It built fortitude in this 17-year-old. I recall showing a paycheck to my mother. She said, “Michael, that’s more money than your father has ever made.” Those words stay with me today. In 1978, the wages at a meatpacking plant could provide a full-time worker with a house, kid’s tuition, a vacation, and maybe even a Buick. But then Chuck Grassley got to the U.S. Senate. name: Daniel Wasta
subject: My wife will defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41743863/330142623/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk682-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTI4YmYxZS1kYThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1d21uoEKFU762BCdMmehzo7crn7oK9sQjzdlzrJtXVw=)
Hey there, Peter. It's Daniel, Abby's husband. This is a photo of us from only a few years ago, but I swear it could've been a lifetime ago.
Abby and I have had a pretty eventful few years. From getting married, to Abby serving in Congress, to launching her campaign against Sen. Grassley (R-IA), it's been a whirlwind. But I wouldn't have it any other way.

You see, when there's work to be done or a problem to solve, Abby signs up and _does _the work to make her community a better place every single time. That's why she ran for the Iowa House of Representatives at only 25 years old, and then four years later became the youngest woman to flip a U.S. House seat from Republican to Democratic.
When I married Abby, I knew that I was marrying a fighter – someone 100% committed to public service, someone who knows and appreciates the value of hard work, someone who's going to spend her life doing all the good she can. That's what I love about her, and it's why I know she's going to work her heart out to become the next senator from Iowa and fight for working families.
I have complete faith that Abby will defeat Sen. Grassley, but we both know how things work in Iowa. Last time around, our Senate election was one of the most expensive in the country. The Republican establishment is ready to pour millions into our state to attack competitive challengers like Abby, and right now, they have more than $39 million in the bank to protect vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley, who's facing record-low approval with Iowans.
**This is where you come in, Peter: Abby can win if she has _ _ an unprecedented grassroots movement backing her. [Will you help her close her $25,667 fundraising gap before tomorrow's critical mid-month deadline? Donate $5 or whatever you can right now, and every dollar will ensure Abby's campaign has what it takes to defeat top Trump ally Sen. Grassley and protect Democratic Senate control.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41743864/330142624/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk682-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTI4YmYxZS1kYThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1d21uoEKFU762BCdMmehzo7crn7oK9sQjzdlzrJtXVw=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41743865/330142625/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk682-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTI4YmYxZS1kYThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1d21uoEKFU762BCdMmehzo7crn7oK9sQjzdlzrJtXVw=)

It means the world to have you on this team. Thank you so much for supporting Abby.

Daniel (Abby's husband)

name: Team Lynn
subject: What the Superbowl is making us think about
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ERIC LYNN FOR CONGRESS
body:
It's no secret that Eric...

| |
---
Hi friend – Happy Superbowl Sunday! It's no secret that Eric is a huge Tampa Bay Buccaneers fan, but even though we came up short in a crushing playoff defeat, our team is still watching tonight's game. Every year, millions of Americans huddle together to watch the biggest game of the year, and, honestly, it's a rare moment of unity. Regardless of which team you represent, there's something to be said about coming together to watch a fun game, rate commercials, and eat great food with family and friends. The Superbowl brings Americans together. But unfortunately, we don't see a lot of togetherness in politics these days. In our district – Pinellas County – Republicans have started a culture war, wrongly painting immigrants as dangers to society and failing to address concerns like rising prescription drug costs and underfunded schools. **Florida Republicans have made politics a competitive sport but without sportsmanship and integrity.** At the end of the day, the policies we pass are supposed to help people and drive our country forward and I believe leaders should actually listen to the communities they represent. That's why we need a leader like Eric in Congress. At Team Lynn, we've heard from countless constituents in Pinellas County that they're sick of anti-American policies and want a representative who will stand above culture wars and dirty political games. Eric served President Obama for eight years as a senior advisor on national security. **He knows what it means to put the needs of Americans above politics.** Tonight, we'll be coming together to watch the Superbowl. But tomorrow, the fight continues to make sure Pinellas County elects a representative who plays fair and above the political fray. [__**Will you help us elect a Member of Congress who plays fair by contributing to our campaign?**__](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41746009/330152387/386834152?refcode2=0e07cce3-dd8c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&refcode=220213_team_superbowl_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzY4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTA3Y2NlMy1kZDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FO78kTWuqXVp7vqMHw6GWnmjqyYssJeUb9jWK-17VEs=) You can follow along on Eric's social media to hear more campaign updates on **[Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41746010/330152388/-983609379?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzY4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTA3Y2NlMy1kZDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FO78kTWuqXVp7vqMHw6GWnmjqyYssJeUb9jWK-17VEs=&emci=dff02f62-818b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=0e07cce3-dd8c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1139417)** , **[Instagram](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41746011/330152395/-775319504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzY4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTA3Y2NlMy1kZDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FO78kTWuqXVp7vqMHw6GWnmjqyYssJeUb9jWK-17VEs=&emci=dff02f62-818b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=0e07cce3-dd8c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1139417)** and [**Facebook**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41746012/330152403/186857566?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzY4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTA3Y2NlMy1kZDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FO78kTWuqXVp7vqMHw6GWnmjqyYssJeUb9jWK-17VEs=&emci=dff02f62-818b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=0e07cce3-dd8c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1139417). We are so close to hitting our 100,000 signature goal to show that conservative patriots support the truckers rallying for freedom.

Date: Sat, February 5, 2022 at 4:58 PM
Subject: Stand with truckers against mandates >>>

Hi Fellow Conservative,

Right now, truckers are leading the charge to finally put an end to the coercive and overbearing COVID mandates the Left loves so much.

With everyday citizens by their sides, the truckers are demonstrating through their resistance just how much power grassroots patriots can have when they join together and stand up to elite control.

And here’s the thing, we are closer than ever to defeating the Radical Left’s anti-freedom COVID regime, but we MUST make our voice heard, loudly, clearly, and all together.

name: Jazz Lewis
subject: Quick ask (not fundraising)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis
body:
Friend,
We are building a movement to tackle the big issues we face here in Maryland's Fourth District: an unfair and often predatory criminal justice system, struggles with healthcare cost and access, and building a just and equitable society.
This campaign is about bringing people together with the fierce urgency of now to ensure we do not pass these challenges onto the next generation.

body:

---

| | URGENT: To flip Florida blue we MUST defeat Ron DeSantis and elect Charlie Crist this November!

**[We CANNOT let DeSantis use a second term as a stepping stone to the White House. Will you please pitch in anything you can right away to help Charlie win this race and flip Florida BLUE on Election Day?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41747454/330158801/-663416480?refcode=20220213_f_2_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWViNTA2Ny1lMDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PP3yEDyIcuQDFniLxGrKDG7QItQxiou_gv0tahNAUT0=)** | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41747455/330158802/-663416480?refcode=20220213_f_2_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWViNTA2Ny1lMDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PP3yEDyIcuQDFniLxGrKDG7QItQxiou_gv0tahNAUT0=)
---
As Charlie has said, Ron DeSantis doesn’t care about people. He cares about securing the Republican nomination for president in 2024, which is why he’s spent his time in office pursuing divisive far-right policies at the expense of everyday Floridians.

DeSantis is soft on COVID and more concerned with restricting a woman’s right to choose and suppressing voting rights than he is with protecting Florida from the impending threat of climate change. **If he wins another term, things will only get worse — which is why we MUST elect Charlie this November!**

The good news is that _Insider Elections_ calls this race a **“battleground,”** and last time around, DeSantis only won by **less than half a point**. Victory is well within reach, but we need to keep building a winning grassroots movement to get the job done!

**That’s why we’re coming to you, friend. Ron DeSantis has far-right billionaires from out of state bankrolling his campaign, and we’re counting on YOU to help us fight back. Can we count on your support right now to help Charlie flip Florida BLUE?**

**[Please, if you can, pitch in any amount right now to help us keep building a winning grassroots campaign. **Hi there, Charlie Crist here.** I wanted to write to say thank you for everything you’re doing to help defeat Ron DeSantis. Florida can’t afford another four years of his divisive politics in the governor’s office, and I appreciate your support in this race.

Whether we have a governor who will fight climate change, protect our communities from COVID, and defend our most precious constitutional rights will depend on the outcome of this election. Governor DeSantis wants to use the governor’s office to advance an extreme, far-right agenda that he thinks will help him win the Republican nomination for president, and we can’t let that happen.

But while he has out-of-state billionaires writing check after check to his campaign, I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to pitch in anything you can to help me fight back. **[If you can, please click here to make a donation to support my campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41747463/330158810/-663416480?refcode=20220213_f_2_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWViNTA2Ny1lMDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PP3yEDyIcuQDFniLxGrKDG7QItQxiou_gv0tahNAUT0=)**

Thank you again for your support. By working together, I know we can win this race and finally start to build a Florida that works for ALL Floridians.

name: Patty Murray
subject: Add your name for action to end gun violence
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
No one should have to live in fear of gun violence.
#
Peter,
Families in Washington state and across the country agree: no one should have to live in fear of gun violence. We all deserve to feel safe in our communities – but today, that’s simply not the case.
I’m hearing from parents who wonder if their children will come home at the end of the school day. Families who worry about being shot at places of worship, at the movie theater, or when they’re grocery shopping. And people across the state who worry about being shot in their own neighborhoods.
And we do worry, because whenever we bring up common sense federal action like universal background checks or banning assault weapons Republicans do nothing but obstruct, obstruct, obstruct.
**[We are seeing each and every day that a patchwork of gun safety laws is not enough. clean_body: No one should have to live in fear of gun violence. Peter, Families in Washington state and across the country agree: no one should have to live in fear of gun violence. We all deserve to feel safe in our communities – but today, that’s simply not the case. I’m hearing from parents who wonder if their children will come home at the end of the school day. Families who worry about being shot at places of worship, at the movie theater, or when they’re grocery shopping. And people across the state who worry about being shot in their own neighborhoods. And we do worry, because whenever we bring up common sense federal action like universal background checks or banning assault weapons Republicans do nothing but obstruct, obstruct, obstruct. No place in this country is immune from gun violence. Earlier this week, a gunman opened fire at a grocery store in Richland, Washington – and my heart goes out to the families impacted and the community as it tries to heal. These kinds of mass shooting events have become all too common – and despite Democrats’ continued efforts to pass gun safety legislation, Senate Republicans are content to ignore this crisis and block our attempts to enact the meaningful change that families are yearning to see. Thank you, Patty As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values. * PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

name: Ann Coulter
subject: How to stop the intolerant left
body:
College campuses have gone absolutely insane. A student group asked me to speak about our nation’s immigration laws at the Un
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2n6phnj6g6rgugn9mes5tpfgnuppa2pem8lffv0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf9ob361hbfcjncth77cr76ppjaob26uob2ddncepj2pr5e2o6atr0e6p70p9jc1jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqmeddl6up7cphks2pm8ptgmlin48d245p25oh4cdgm2pr3cdh64o724no)
College campuses have gone absolutely insane. Here's one thing you can do about it that can really make a difference.
|
---
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlmc77ti0nt97rs83t3fao7qnjj601tuagnla6to_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cthm6oj2c3h2bs) Fellow Conservative, **College campuses have gone absolutely insane.** A student group asked me to speak about our nation’s immigration laws at the University of California at Berkeley, the so-called “birthplace of the free speech movement.” As you may have heard, my speech was abruptly canceled because leftist thugs decided to riot and the administration wouldn’t stick up for free speech. Unfortunately, I’m not the only one to suffer threats and intimidation on campus. Far from it. [ **Fight the intolerant left on campus** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zahbogep20r668jb791es9hjeulepevjkel71f5o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cthm6oj2c3h2bs) As I point out in _Resistance is Futile: How the Trump-Hating Left Lost Its Collective Mind_ , ever since Donald Trump’s arrival in politics, **liberals have lost their minds.** But there’s no padded room to keep them contained! Instead, **these violent, masked lunatics have taken over college campuses, where young Americans are turned into automaton leftists just like themselves.** Young conservatives on college campuses across our nation are losing their right to free speech – and even the right to walk down the street without getting sucker punched – because of how intolerant the liberals have become. [**But lest you think I’ve given up hope, faithful conservative, there’s a group I trust that fights back against this onslaught and exposes leftist bias, abuse, and indoctrination on college campuses for all the world to see:_Campus Reform_.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp0r76enspvr1alhe97i33g4ibiusabk23ijeidg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cthm6oj2c3h2bs) **Campus Reform, a project of the Leadership Institute, is the single most powerful force for campus free speech in America today.** By sticking up for conservative students and giving them the tools necessary to defend themselves and their principles, Campus Reform provides an absolutely essential public service. **Bottom line – Campus Reform uncovers the liberal schemes that the mainstream media wants to keep hidden... and they shut down the liberals’ indoctrination on campus after campus.** [**To continue their vital work, Campus Reform counts on the generous support of conservatives just like you – yes, you! – which is why I urge you to partner with them today by making a generous gift of $25, $35, $50, $100, or more right now.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6uqr1i9h63s677926hnh13svqpl0dtmpqov0m58_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cthm6oj2c3h2bs) And to sweeten the pot – when you give $100 or more to LI’s Campus Reform, I’ll rush you a copy of my book, _Resistance is Futile_. Saving young conservatives AND getting a free book? What a deal! [ **Get my book here** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zel5q2nmt2ob5f7ne4ne0dip8llqcba4koalcqmo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cthm6oj2c3h2bs) Campus police at the College of DuPage in Illinois told conservative students they’d **“lock them up” for handing out copies of the U.S. Constitution.** Yes, that dangerous document that the created the greatest country ever known to man. A teaching assistant at the University of Nebraska-Lincoln harassed the student president of a conservative group for recruiting students. With a gesture from her middle finger, she shrieked profanities at the conservative student and called her a “neo-fascist” and “Nazi.” Charming. At Purdue University in Indiana, a staffer called conservatives “vile, racist idiots” and **threatened to rape pro-life students.** (And you wonder why liberals prefer violence to debate.) In all three cases, LI’s Campus Reform exposed the truth. Armed with investigative reports from their student correspondents on campus, Campus Reform got word out to their nationwide audience of concerned conservatives. And they brought it to news outlets like Fox News, Newsmax, the Blaze, and numerous talk radio shows. Ultimately, Campus Reform’s exposure of the truth got _results_. In these cases and many others, **Campus Reform’s quick and powerful action forced universities to change their anti-conservative policies, discipline leftist student groups, and suspend or fire radical professors.** I believe an angel gets its wings every time a leftist professor is fired for their outrageous and unapologetic abuses against conservatives. But Campus Reform’s fight to make the left see the light and feel the heat won’t be won overnight. **To fight the forces of the intolerant left, stand up for free speech, and protect conservative students who want to simply share their beliefs without getting a black eye, Campus Reform is counting on your help.** [**Please make a generous investment of $25, $35, $50, or more today to support the Leadership Institute’s Campus Reform, stand up to liberal indoctrination, and ensure conservative students don’t lose their freedoms on college campuses.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0jaiorptnsn826sm1olgug2gv64h8b911hsj620_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cthm6oj2c3h2bs) Friend, let’s make ‘em pay. [**Please help Campus Reform right away so they can empower conservative students and strike back at the lunatic liberals.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z17iqog8n3m31t4g7akm9fuike9c6b61rcf1jtvo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cthm6oj2c3h2bs) Thank you. In liberty, Ann Coulter **P.S. Remember, when you give $100 or more to LI’s Campus Reform, I’ll rush you a copy of my book,_Resistance is Futile_.** It’s just one more way I can thank you for joining this crucial cause. Because **if we lose the kids, we lose this country.** [**Please donate right away.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ze5qb1g5lbdespqgrjj541ovgq0g2js1a8jo2d7o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cthm6oj2c3h2bs) Thank you.** [ **Yes, I'll join Campus Reform in the fight against leftist tyranny** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zodv648dq2nckqg43iclfgptkl69k4ghvqqkhvf8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cthm6oj2c3h2bs)
---
| | The Leadership Institute 1101 N. Highland St. Steven P.J. Wood Building Arlington VA 22201 United States
---

body:
Independent fact-checkers confirm this story is fake. Media sources across the political spectrum have debunked it. **Bergman lies about program to address surge in drug overdoses** **_Independent fact-checkers from media sources across the political spectrum have debunked a fake news story shared by Rep. Jack Bergman._** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41747913/330161638/1335487314?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWU1MDUxMS1lNDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vy-9XrXKBZe-rP3ofj_cwochi9k1bZ-ndddxITm5G-E=) _**[Please share this story](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41747914/330161639/989981403?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fdrboblorinser%2Fposts%2F151440407252779&display=popup&ref=plugin&src=post&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWU1MDUxMS1lNDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vy-9XrXKBZe-rP3ofj_cwochi9k1bZ-ndddxITm5G-E=&emci=76cf3b7d-e18c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=4ae50511-e48c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=15167427) to help disseminate the truth over Bergman's lie. [Click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41747915/330161640/989981403?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fdrboblorinser%2Fposts%2F151440407252779&display=popup&ref=plugin&src=post&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWU1MDUxMS1lNDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vy-9XrXKBZe-rP3ofj_cwochi9k1bZ-ndddxITm5G-E=&emci=76cf3b7d-e18c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=4ae50511-e48c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=15167427) to share. **_ [HELP US REPLACE BERGMAN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41747916/330161641/1335487314?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWU1MDUxMS1lNDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vy-9XrXKBZe-rP3ofj_cwochi9k1bZ-ndddxITm5G-E=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41747917/330161642/1335487314?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWU1MDUxMS1lNDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vy-9XrXKBZe-rP3ofj_cwochi9k1bZ-ndddxITm5G-E=) [DONATE FOR INTEGRITY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41747918/330161643/1335487314?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWU1MDUxMS1lNDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vy-9XrXKBZe-rP3ofj_cwochi9k1bZ-ndddxITm5G-E=) WASHINGTON, D.C. — A program initiated in 1988 under Republican President Ronald Reagan caught the interest of Rep. Jack Bergman last week. The representative from Michigan took to social media to share a now-debunked story from the Washington Examiner. Bergman shared an image of the headline "Biden administration distributes syringes and crack 'smoking kits' for 'equity.'" He captioned it with, "Crack pipes. Actual crack pipes. This is what Democrats are actually spending millions of taxpayer-funded 'COVID relief' dollars on while trying to disguise it as the 'American Rescue Plan.'" [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41747919/330161644/1335487314?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWU1MDUxMS1lNDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vy-9XrXKBZe-rP3ofj_cwochi9k1bZ-ndddxITm5G-E=) Dr. Bob Lorinser, MD, MSW, MPH — Bergman's Democratic challenger — is calling out his opponent for misleading constituents. So far, USA Today, ABC News, **[Politifact](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41747920/330161645/-778865775?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWU1MDUxMS1lNDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vy-9XrXKBZe-rP3ofj_cwochi9k1bZ-ndddxITm5G-E=&emci=76cf3b7d-e18c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=4ae50511-e48c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=15167427)** , The Washington Post, Forbes, New York Times, and more have fact-checked and debunked Bergman's claim. [**_> Make a contribution to help us combat Jack Bergman's disinformation campaign. >_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41747921/330161646/1335487314?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWU1MDUxMS1lNDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Vy-9XrXKBZe-rP3ofj_cwochi9k1bZ-ndddxITm5G-E=) "Bergman's post is shameful, dishonest, wrong, and disappointing," said Dr. Lorinser. "There are over 100,000 overdose deaths annually in the United States. Community-based harm-reduction programs have been a component of a continued effort from nearly every presidential administration to address the problem, which the COVID-19 pandemic exacerbated. 'Crack pipes' are not part of the program. “[Jack Bergman’s] political post is also harmful in that it distracts and ridicules successful harm reduction programs utilized by thousands of Americans in desperate need of help. I am asking voters to hold their Representative accountable for the harm this post has done.” Dr. Lorinser agrees with the vast majority of addiction specialists in his field. Providing health and social services for active drug users and entering them into harm-reduction programs can reduce overdoses, HIV transmission, and other adverse public health outcomes. While some of the money from the grant program is tabbed for supplies like sterile syringes and safety kits, distributing or funding crack pipes isn't part of the program. “Bergman is wrong. His claim is a lie,” said Dr. Lorinser. "Facts matter," said Dr. Lorinser. "Politicians hold immense responsibility for what they promote, say, and use for research. This claim is dishonest and a gross misrepresentation of the truth. Jack Bergman is smart, and he knows better. This is a political agitation ploy." Dr. Lorinser says his campaign is committed to confronting Jack Bergman's misinformation campaign, and now is one of those moments. Lorinser is an addiction specialist / medical expert with advanced degrees in medicine, social work, and public health. He regularly emphasizes his commitment to an honest, ethical, transparent campaign for U.S. Congress. "Leaders need to show principled leadership," said Dr. Lorinser. "Rep. Bergman has no interest in the truth and lacks the courage to stand up and admit the story is fake. "The concept of the Hippocratic oath's 'do no harm' rule should extend to words used by Congresspeople," said Dr. Lorinser. "While we're doing honest work to solve real, serious issues, my opponent is spreading blatant misinformation and lies. The American people deserve better." clean_body: Friend, I hope you’re enjoying Superbowl Sunday! I want to quickly check in with you ahead of our re-election campaign’s mid-month fundraising deadline on Tuesday. As we look to November, I’m doing everything in my power to hold on to this seat, but with our district becoming more Republican and my re-election becoming competitive, I'm going to need your help making it across the finish line. Our campaign set a $10,000 mid-month fundraising goal, and it's critical that we reach it to ensure we have the resources to stay the course as the election draws closer and another opponent prepares to jump into the race. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = | = = | = | = I look forward to continuing to fight for working families in Congress, but I can’t keep up this fight without your support. Now is the time to give it our all and secure this seat in November’s election. Thank you for fighting alongside me, Mondaire = * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. As governor, I took an oath to protect the rights of all Nevadans. As long as I am governor, I will protect our voting rights with everything at my disposal.
Donald Trump and his far-right allies in Nevada can throw everything they have to try and get their way: **I’ll keep facing them down.**
**That’s why I need your help today, folks. With voting rights and all of the progress we've made at stake, I must have the resources to take on the MAGA lies and these right-wing attempts to undermine our democracy.**

Steve Sisolak

name: Val Demings
subject: This is an uphill battle
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Republicans realized that if I win this race, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to expand our Senate majority.
| | |
---
I won't lie to you, friend. We're fighting an uphill battle right now. Let me explain:
_**FIRST,**_ Republicans realized that if I win this race, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to expand our Senate majority.
_**THEN,**_ polling showed me neck and neck with Marco Rubio, so national Republicans poured millions into Florida to stack the cards against me.
_**NOW,**_ Mitch McConnell's committee is launching the first of many attack ads to defeat me – and I'm falling dangerously short of my $50,000 grassroots fundraising goal. I need to make up the difference before midnight, friend.
Republicans are trying to buy this seat – no matter how much money it takes – and I desperately need more resources right now to compete with Rubio.
The last Florida Senate race was determined by _just_ over 10,000 votes, and my race is shaping up to be JUST as close. That means it could be YOUR single donation that allows us to knock on just enough doors, call just enough Floridians and reach out to just enough voters to win.
**[Please, friend, will you donate $5 to help me meet my midnight goal, flip Florida blue and expand our Senate majority? Every dollar counts at this critical moment.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41749083/330168479/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2249-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzQwN2NhZi1lNjhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ws6Ryb95Q1GnB-tar23UEKmiAq-Lz0RBYzUPGcs3Z-4=)**
Thank you,

Val Demings

Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement _and_ keep Florida red _permanently_. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. clean_body: Republicans realized that if I win this race, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to expand our Senate majority. | | | I won't lie to you, friend. We're fighting an uphill battle right now. Let me explain: FIRST, Republicans realized that if I win this race, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to expand our Senate majority. THEN, polling showed me neck and neck with Marco Rubio, so national Republicans poured millions into Florida to stack the cards against me. NOW, Mitch McConnell's committee is launching the first of many attack ads to defeat me – and I'm falling dangerously short of my $50,000 grassroots fundraising goal. I need to make up the difference before midnight, friend. Republicans are trying to buy this seat – no matter how much money it takes – and I desperately need more resources right now to compete with Rubio. The last Florida Senate race was determined by just over 10,000 votes, and my race is shaping up to be JUST as close. That means it could be YOUR single donation that allows us to knock on just enough doors, call just enough Floridians and reach out to just enough voters to win. = Thank you, Val Demings | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? = If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic. = If you’re reading from your phone, to automatically sign up for my SMS team. By providing your mobile phone number you consent to receive recurring updates from Val Demings for U.S. Senate, including by automated text message. Txt HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. &

subject: Good and bad news:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
...take on Wall Street, the insurance companies, the drug companies, and the fossil fuel industry.
#

We’ve got some good news and some bad news for you today:
**Good news first:** Since we launched our campaign just a few weeks ago, thousands of people have made a contribution to send Nina Turner to Congress. _When we say our campaign is powered by people, not corporate PACs, this is what we mean._
**But now for the bad news:** Corporate interests are not going to give up without a fight, because they want to keep this seat for themselves. _In fact, immediately after Nina announced her campaign, a Republican-funded Super PAC started raising money to stop us._
If we're going to win this thing – and we will – we will need to have the financial resources to take on Wall Street, the insurance companies, the drug companies, and the fossil fuel industry.
**And that means we have to ask:**
**[Can you please make a contribution to our 100% people-powered campaign? name: Team Samuels
subject: Quick update!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BEN SAMUELS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hi Friend,
Can you believe it? We are already halfway through February. That means we are coming up on our mid-month deadline, and we must crush this goal!
This race is heating up, and as we gain more and more traction, we wanted to remind you why Ben is running for Congress.
Before we get into it, can you help us reach our mid-month goal and donate $25 right now? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2202-q1-bs-mm?refcode=220213-email&amount=25]
Ben is tired of watching people leave Missouri. He is tired of the corruption and dysfunction of Washington. Ben thinks we can do better as a community and a nation. Ben is some of his priorities for public safety, affordable healthcare, and innovation across sectors. Most of all, though, Ben is running because he knows that each one of us deserves better leadership than Ann Wagner.
We need to keep up with our opponent, which means we need your help. Will you take action and join the movement for progress with a donation of any size? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2202-q1-bs-mm?refcode=220213-email]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Derek Marshall
subject: We need to catch up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
**I’ll keep this quick: we’re halfway through the month, and we’re falling behind our goal.** We had a slow start to the month and now we’re racing to catch up.

**So far, we’ve only raised 52% of where we should already be.** That means that every donation we receive is critical in helping us get back on track. Since the start of 2022, our fundraising goals have increased massively to support our communications, political, and field programs. **And it’s crucial that we can continue to save for when we need to get out the vote for our primary and general elections.**

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41750289/330175169/-431919476?refcode=2-13&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmRlM2Q2MS1lZThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QheM-2TMFeZYGZuT1JJOSkies2sxvpbetKYeD-owSQo=)

**[That means your donation today could save us from falling too far behind. I know we can make up this difference, but it’s going to take lots of folks chipping in when they can to help us get there. Will you be one of the donors that helps us reach our goal? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41750290/330175170/-431919476?refcode=2-13&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmRlM2Q2MS1lZThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QheM-2TMFeZYGZuT1JJOSkies2sxvpbetKYeD-owSQo=)**
I’ll be honest: I’m worried.**I’m worried because I know the dangers of allowing the Republicans to take back the House.** I’m worried because I know how desperately my communities need change, change they will never see under Jay Obernolte’s so-called leadership. **It’s crucial we hit our fundraising numbers so we can unseat this entrenched Republican and flip a seat for Democrats in the House and hold on to our majority. **
This campaign is heating up, there’s no denying it. We crafted our fundraising goals to be ambitious, but reachable. **We can’t afford to slow down at this turning point in our race.** Every dollar we raise goes toward crucial efforts in our campaign, and we don’t want to cut any corners. But I have faith in our grassroots base that has come through for us time and time again.
**[I’m asking you personally to consider donating at this critical time. Your donation will count now more than ever. Will you help us out today and chip in whatever you can?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41750292/330175172/-431919476?refcode=2-13&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmRlM2Q2MS1lZThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QheM-2TMFeZYGZuT1JJOSkies2sxvpbetKYeD-owSQo=)**

**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41750294/330175174/-431919476?refcode=2-13&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmRlM2Q2MS1lZThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QheM-2TMFeZYGZuT1JJOSkies2sxvpbetKYeD-owSQo=)**

In solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23

body:
Senator Hassan is getting outspent: Mitch McConnell needs to flip just ONE seat to take back control of the Senate for the GOP
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41751232/330178846/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk646-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGY4NzcwZS1lZjhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aJF55g-vDRdedXssaW53Mgc3QxCbr6oBLK0pVrb99sI=)
With top political experts and news outlets calling Senator Maggie Hassan's seat one of the most vulnerable ahead of the 2022 election, we have no time to waste, friend.
**Senator Hassan is getting outspent:** Mitch McConnell needs to flip just ONE seat to take back control of the Senate for the GOP, and Senator Hassan is his primary focus. McConnell's dark-money groups are funneling MILLIONS into attack ads to flip her seat red.

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Disgusting...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene for Congress
body:
Dear Peter:

**Disgusting! Outrageous! Cringe-worthy! Criminal!**

These are just some of the words that came to mind when I saw this picture.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59641259:snM-TaHNW:m:1:2365227053:2D496538C01A26C0310B513B8BD00ACF:r)
**If Stacey really "believed the science," she would not muzzle those kids with harmful masks.**

Obesity is one of the highest risk factors for people from Covid.

By every Covid risk standard Stacey Abrams is at a much higher risk of hospitalization and death from Covid.

The kids behind her are NOT hardly at any risk of hospitalization and death from COVID.

Of course, Stacey is not the only one. Masks for thee and NOT for me is the battle cry of the radical left.

**That's why it's time to FIRE democrats and end the mask mandates!**

And why I hope you will join me today to help stop Stacey Abrams and the radical socialist mob that wants to force masks on the rest of us while ignoring the mandates themselves. [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59641259:snM-TaHNW:m:1:2365227053:2D496538C01A26C0310B513B8BD00ACF:r) [_**HELP MTG FIGHT BACK
CHIP IN $20.22 TODAY!**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59641259:snM-TaHNW:m:1:2365227053:2D496538C01A26C0310B513B8BD00ACF:r) **We've all seen it.**

California Governor Gavin Newsome was maskless at the NFL playoffs, Los Angeles democrat Mayor Eric Garcetti claiming he held his breath while maskless at the same game.

Even the King of the mask fanatics, Dr. Anthony Fauci, has been caught multiple times maskless, mocking you and me as they try to lord over us with their mandates and all the while ignoring the same rules they impose on us.

**That's why it's time to FIRE the democrats and bring science and common sense back to the government.**

**[Please join me today by chipping in $17.76 and helping me make these mass firings of the radical democrats like Stacey Abrams a reality](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59641259:snM-TaHNW:m:1:2365227053:2D496538C01A26C0310B513B8BD00ACF:r).**
Because they aren't just going to sit there and take it.

The Democrats will spend MILLIONS to defeat me in 2022, so I need your help.

**Now more than ever, I need your help. Not only to fight back but to take the fight back.**

The establishment and their handmaidens in the media will do everything they can to shut me down and shut me up.

But if you know anything about me, you know that isn't going to happen.

I will not let Stacey Abrams get away with this blatant hypocrisy.

**Her "_people_ " may have tried to remove this photo from the internet, but we won't let it disappear.**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59641259:snM-TaHNW:m:1:2365227053:2D496538C01A26C0310B513B8BD00ACF:r)
I will do everything in my power to make sure we FIRE the Democrats this year and return to sanity, science, and our Constitution.

**[Will you please chip in a contribution of $17.76, $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or even the legal maximum of $2,900 per individual TODAY so I can keep fighting for Donald Trump's America First principles](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59641259:snM-TaHNW:m:1:2365227053:2D496538C01A26C0310B513B8BD00ACF:r)?**

I must have your support right away to keep speaking the truth and speaking up for our America First values.

**Please stand with me in this all-important fight today!**

**[Chip in your most generous contribution right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59641259:snM-TaHNW:m:1:2365227053:2D496538C01A26C0310B513B8BD00ACF:r)!**

[_**HELP MTG FIGHT BACK
CHIP IN $20.22 TODAY!**_](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59641259:snM-TaHNW:m:1:2365227053:2D496538C01A26C0310B513B8BD00ACF:r) Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59641259:snM-TaHNW:m:1:2365227053:2D496538C01A26C0310B513B8BD00ACF:r)
