# **The King's Chronicle:
****_February 13, 2022_**
---
Thanks to supporters like you who make our work possible, Team King has had a busy past few weeks on the campaign trail. From plunging into the Potomac River to unveiling new policy (and our own daily word game: King for Marylandle) to preparing our statewide Promise to Progress Tour, we're so excited to share all we've been up to and what John and Michelle have coming up.

We hope you'll read on to check out some recent campaign highlights, news clippings, event recaps, and upcoming ways to get involved.

Onward,
Team King
|
---
# **Team King Updates**
---
**_GOING ON TOUR_ :** This Thursday, John and Michelle will officially file to be on the ballot! To celebrate the promise of progress the King-Siri ticket represents, we're launching a statewide tour across Maryland and we'd love for you to join us along the way. To learn about upcoming stops near you, just text **TEAM** to **48178** for exclusive tour updates.
**_WORDLE ON THE STREET_ :** Team King made a special King for Marylandle edition of everyone's favorite online word game! With new words available to guess each day, pitch in any amount now and we'll send you the link to play: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/king_signup](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41751626/330180599/206022259?refcode=newsletter&refcode2=f0458529-f18c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&utm_source=email&utm_campaign=newsletter&utm_medium=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDQ1ODUyOS1mMThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5Zu2s_u2F-sdZ9XMdUmkQD3oLWCq8dCShxSrnzCizPs=)**

clean_body: On this edition of the King's Chronicle, see John & Michelle plunge in support of climate action, learn more about our upcoming statewide Promise to Progress tour, and more! = | | = mailto:info@johnkingforgovernor.com "info@johnkingforgovernor.com" | The King's Chronicle: February 13, 2022 Thanks to supporters like you who make our work possible, Team King has had a busy past few weeks on the campaign trail. From plunging into the Potomac River to unveiling new policy (and our own daily word game: King for Marylandle) to preparing our statewide Promise to Progress Tour, we're so excited to share all we've been up to and what John and Michelle have coming up. We hope you'll read on to check out some recent campaign highlights, news clippings, event recaps, and upcoming ways to get involved. Onward, Team King | Team King Updates GOING ON TOUR : This Thursday, John and Michelle will officially file to be on the ballot! To celebrate the promise of progress the King-Siri ticket represents, we're launching a statewide tour across Maryland and we'd love for you to join us along the way. To learn about upcoming stops near you, just text TEAM to 48178 for exclusive tour updates. WORDLE ON THE STREET : Team King made a special King for Marylandle edition of everyone's favorite online word game! With new words available to guess each day, pitch in any amount now and we'll send you the link to play: = NEW POLICY JUST DROPPED : The ongoing pandemic has exposed deep economic inequities among Maryland women, and John and Michelle recently released their plan to address those inequities and build real economic progress. Read the plan here: | John in the News THE WASHINGTON INFORMER: King: Gov. Hogan’s Budget Proposal Leaves Students In The Lurch “...I am particularly concerned about the inadequate funding in Governor Hogan’s budget to deliver on the promise of the Blueprint" MARYLAND MATTERS: King-Siri Ticket Introduces Agenda To Break Down Economic Inequities for Md. Women “...their administration would attempt to build economic opportunities for women — by prioritizing paid family leave, affordable child care and a higher minimum wage.” In The Margins Podcast: Creating a Culture of Civic Participation with Dr. John B. King Jr. “Widely commended for his lifelong dedication to education, Dr. King now wants to bring his fresh perspective as an educator to the governor’s seat of Maryland.” NEWSY Interview | John on the Road On Saturday, Feb. 12th, John, Michelle, and Team King joined CCAN in their annual Polar Plunge to show just how far(and cold) they're willing to go to protect our environment! = = On Wednesday, Feb. 9th, John met with the Dorchester Democrats and grew his grassroots movement. = On Sunday, Feb. 6th, John worshiped with the community of Redeemers Chapel and shared his vision for a brighter, more just future for Maryland. = | Upcoming Events Interested in future events? TextMEET to 48178 or sign up below! Promise to Progress Tour: Takoma Park Meet & Greet Feb. 17 @ 5PM Promise to Progress Tour: Bethesda Meet & Greet Feb. 19 @ 1PM Promise to Progress Tour Feb. 17 @ 11AM Lawyers Mall, Annapolis, MD Town Hall: Progressive Harford County & John King Feb. 17 @ 6:30PM Virtual Coalition Event: Educators for John King Feb. 22 @ 6:30PM National Event: Virtual Fundraiser for John King Feb. 28 @ 6PM RSVP to: hspengler@johnkingforgovernor.com International Women's Day Virtual Fundraiser March 8 @ 5:30PM RSVP to: hspengler@johnkingforgovernor.com Boston Fundraiser Supporting John King Feb. 28 @ 7PM RSVP to:** hspengler@johnkingforgovernor.com Chevy Chase Fundraiser Supporting John King March 8 @ 7PM RSVP to: hspengler@johnkingforgovernor.com | Ways to Get Involved** = | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

subject: Disrupting the System
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brett Guillory for Texas
body:
NEWSMAX Features Brett Guillory
| | | | |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CIuHTdo2hjmj2H5C-MW5R5-lTtD6SKp1pDsUfn2Lhp5rm7j2tw1tmuDVejS_fiW8VPs3NqKb9jmNd6FOJyLIKs7E3JMqbn5Ry0q6G3HL7l23bcn3mgDCh7bABSgEvv-u0QDWCMMKJp7PyH2pSWXjzoPTQJZSK7gUsTZvwaxuBRg=&c=BWpF_i9cATYV4PSR1QvHVaj8p6c7jxQelcRfq0tM2n0vVEP1ENsKZg==&ch=zkvBLSIxHxVTu0cZeemci8L9nKJz2-sI6B54UsWj8vVitZTBX6wEQg==)

| Dear Neighbor,
It's an honor to be recognized in the NEWSMAX article: [Disruptors Needed: Elect Anti-Establishment Anti-Institutionalists](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CIuHTdo2hjmj2H5C-MW5R5-lTtD6SKp1pDsUfn2Lhp5rm7j2tw1tmpyjnoHUi1MyP2M0tLQvi6LJybkFtLLP33tt1qu9YI6neB94Uuezzhl63YmOn2SrHhoRSWSm-mNQcfWWb8hrCajdg37NzqGFK2B5LglMoLzL3jQZggJG2wmkzc1OAEjLhQMPxnDH_sh-M6yrIVHxyaEctWP8i0Gec7MDEm9ZOQa89eGM_OCNi4fLGgziJGUdPw==&c=BWpF_i9cATYV4PSR1QvHVaj8p6c7jxQelcRfq0tM2n0vVEP1ENsKZg==&ch=zkvBLSIxHxVTu0cZeemci8L9nKJz2-sI6B54UsWj8vVitZTBX6wEQg==), and recognized as a disruptor to the Establishment and the political system. (Read full article [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CIuHTdo2hjmj2H5C-MW5R5-lTtD6SKp1pDsUfn2Lhp5rm7j2tw1tmpyjnoHUi1MyP2M0tLQvi6LJybkFtLLP33tt1qu9YI6neB94Uuezzhl63YmOn2SrHhoRSWSm-mNQcfWWb8hrCajdg37NzqGFK2B5LglMoLzL3jQZggJG2wmkzc1OAEjLhQMPxnDH_sh-M6yrIVHxyaEctWP8i0Gec7MDEm9ZOQa89eGM_OCNi4fLGgziJGUdPw==&c=BWpF_i9cATYV4PSR1QvHVaj8p6c7jxQelcRfq0tM2n0vVEP1ENsKZg==&ch=zkvBLSIxHxVTu0cZeemci8L9nKJz2-sI6B54UsWj8vVitZTBX6wEQg==).)
Disruptors go on offense. They challenge the status quo. They don't ask permission. They don't wait their turn to be elected. And, they sure don't back down.
Am I a disruptor? You bet I am. So much so, that other candidates are attacking me and pressuring my endorsements and my supporters.
But, will I back down? Absolutely not.
I'm in this race because we need representation that is strong enough to stand up to both the Establishment and the Left. We need representation that will go on the offensive, rather than play defense as so many of our leaders and members of the old guard, Republican party have historically done.
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CIuHTdo2hjmj2H5C-MW5R5-lTtD6SKp1pDsUfn2Lhp5rm7j2tw1tmpyjnoHUi1MyP2M0tLQvi6LJybkFtLLP33tt1qu9YI6neB94Uuezzhl63YmOn2SrHhoRSWSm-mNQcfWWb8hrCajdg37NzqGFK2B5LglMoLzL3jQZggJG2wmkzc1OAEjLhQMPxnDH_sh-M6yrIVHxyaEctWP8i0Gec7MDEm9ZOQa89eGM_OCNi4fLGgziJGUdPw==&c=BWpF_i9cATYV4PSR1QvHVaj8p6c7jxQelcRfq0tM2n0vVEP1ENsKZg==&ch=zkvBLSIxHxVTu0cZeemci8L9nKJz2-sI6B54UsWj8vVitZTBX6wEQg==)

---
I am that candidate.
I am here to represent you, my neighbors and friends, because I care.
Make your voice heard when early voting starts on Monday.
Vote for someone who will go on offense on your behalf.
Vote for a disruptor.
Vote Brett Guillory.

---

clean_body: NEWSMAX Features Brett Guillory | | | | | | == | | | | | Dear Neighbor, It's an honor to be recognized in the NEWSMAX article: ==, and recognized as a disruptor to the Establishment and the political system. (Read full article ==.) Disruptors go on offense. They challenge the status quo. They don't ask permission. They don't wait their turn to be elected. And, they sure don't back down. Am I a disruptor? You bet I am. So much so, that other candidates are attacking me and pressuring my endorsements and my supporters. But, will I back down? Absolutely not. I'm in this race because we need representation that is strong enough to stand up to both the Establishment and the Left. We need representation that will go on the offensive, rather than play defense as so many of our leaders and members of the old guard, Republican party have historically done. == | == I am that candidate. I am here to represent you, my neighbors and friends, because I care. Make your voice heard when early voting starts on Monday. Vote for someone who will go on offense on your behalf. Vote for a disruptor. Vote Brett Guillory. | | == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- | | == | mailto:info@BrettGuilloryforCongress.com | == == == | | | Paid for by Brett Guillory for Texas. | | | | | | | | Brett Guillory for Texas | 13121 Louetta Rd., Box 1465, Cypress, TX 77429 | | Sent by mailto:info@brettguilloryforcongress.com

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41752046/330182213/-2057546413?refcode=20220211_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTc1YWI2My1mMzhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fHNyc93lfHl4RKV7_syA5Bxta8zRQcIEezKPITcX-mo=) Friend, A lot of politicians run for office for money, power, or fame. That’s not me. I was raised by a single mother who worked twice as hard to make sure we had dinner on the table every night. I grew up outside Youngstown where I watched steel mills close and jobs ship overseas that devastated my family members, friends, and neighbors. I first ran for office because I didn’t see many people in power sticking up for families like mine. All they ever cared about was pleasing wealthy donors and shady special interests who wrote them campaign checks. **That’s why we do things a little differently around here. We rely on grassroots supporters like you chipping in $5, $10, or $25 at a time to fuel this campaign. But right now, we’re falling behind our fundraising goal.** [**Can you make a contribution today -- split between my campaign and Serve America -- to help us reach our fundraising goal? I wouldn’t ask if it didn't make a difference.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41752047/330182214/2038802527?refcode=20220211_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTc1YWI2My1mMzhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fHNyc93lfHl4RKV7_syA5Bxta8zRQcIEezKPITcX-mo=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41752048/330182215/-2057546413?refcode=20220211_SA_TR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTc1YWI2My1mMzhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fHNyc93lfHl4RKV7_syA5Bxta8zRQcIEezKPITcX-mo=)

name: Roy Cooper
subject: A note about Parkland
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
We stand alone as a nation where our kids are in danger of gun violence at school, worshipers are in danger at church, and shoppers are in danger at the supermarket. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41752082/330182360/823540626?refcode=ea.8611c141-f48c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.8611c141-f48c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjExYzE0MS1mNDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XHHhPQ6_AnURGmy3n8VQh-gDevwRpK1In031J9_S9jQ=&emci=a5008382-ec8c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=8611c141-f48c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)
Peter, Tomorrow marks the anniversary of a dark day in our nation’s history. **But unfortunately, it is one of too many.** The violence at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School in Parkland, Florida touched countless lives and inspired a generation of activists. But it should have never happened. American students have lived under the threat of gun violence for decades — practicing active shooter drills from the time they’re learning their ABCs. **We should have changed after Columbine. After Virginia Tech. After Sandy Hook.** They didn’t — _and four years ago in Florida, 14 students and three staff members lost their lives._ Our peer nations don’t experience the tragedy of mass shootings like the United States, Peter. Our laws don’t do enough to protect children in schools, worshippers in church, and shoppers in the mall. I’ve spent my tenure as governor fighting to protect North Carolinians from radical right-wing policies that would enable more bad actors to get their hands on guns, but we need more. **It’s long past time for commonsense gun violence prevention at the federal level and in our state legislature.** **[I’m joining with other Democrats to say enough is enough. Please, add your name beside mine to demand action in the fight against gun violence>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41752083/330182361/267559843?partner=Roy%20Cooper&refcode=ea.8611c141-f48c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.8611c141-f48c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjExYzE0MS1mNDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XHHhPQ6_AnURGmy3n8VQh-gDevwRpK1In031J9_S9jQ=&emci=a5008382-ec8c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=8611c141-f48c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41752084/330182362/267559843?partner=Roy%20Cooper&refcode=ea.8611c141-f48c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.8611c141-f48c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjExYzE0MS1mNDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XHHhPQ6_AnURGmy3n8VQh-gDevwRpK1In031J9_S9jQ=&emci=a5008382-ec8c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=8611c141-f48c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)

name: Team ODP
subject: Maps, maps, maps
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| Ohio Democrats, Republicans' attempts at drawing legislative maps in their favor has been temporarily halted. Last week, the Ohio Supreme Court ruled for the SECOND TIME that the preliminary map of Ohio's legislative districts was unconstitutional.

The maps Ohio Republicans presented would have disenfranchised voters across the state -- especially Black and brown voters -- and they directly ignored the court's demand to make the maps reflective of the state's voter registration.

This is a huge win for us as the Republican-led redistricting commission reconvenes to redraw the maps. But we have to make sure we keep up the pressure to ensure the new maps are fair for every voter. It won't be easy, Republicans have plenty of tricks up their sleeves to keep the maps leaning in their favor.

[**Will you help us fight for fair maps in Ohio with a donation of just $3 or more today to ensure we hit our $7,000 February mid-month goal before Wednesday's deadline? Every dollar helps us end the political games Ohio Republicans are playing.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41752146/330182563/1175522780?refcode=em22_220213_mm1_fndd_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220213_mm1_fndd_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2ZiMmZhOS1mNDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0YrfiLgFFye0ZF2S3xyte0m-rem3RxB3vQDSF4LxXsA=)

We won't lie, this will be an uphill battle: Republicans will always put their own interests above the interests of hardworking Ohioans. But we're not going to stand by silently as the Ohioans we serve are betrayed.

The future of our state and our country is at stake -- the majority in Congress will come down to Ohio. While Republicans look out for themselves, we're looking out for working Ohioans. And we hope we can count on your support in this fight.

[**Chip in $3 or more right now to help us hit our mid-month goal, fight for fair maps, and stop Ohio Republicans from gerrymandering the state in their favor.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41752147/330182564/1175522780?refcode=em22_220213_mm1_fndd_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220213_mm1_fndd_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2ZiMmZhOS1mNDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0YrfiLgFFye0ZF2S3xyte0m-rem3RxB3vQDSF4LxXsA=)

Thank you,

Team ODP

The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. We have the chance to flip not only Ohio's open US Senate seat, but to elect a Democratic governor as well. **Will you pitch in $10 or more right away? Every dollar you give helps build a blue Ohio.** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41752148/330182565/1175522780?refcode=em22_220213_mm1_fndd_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220213_mm1_fndd_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2ZiMmZhOS1mNDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0YrfiLgFFye0ZF2S3xyte0m-rem3RxB3vQDSF4LxXsA=)

name: Team Schrier
subject: "Legitimate political discourse"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
| ICYMI: "Conspiracy theories abound in Republican battle to retake Washington's 8th Congressional District"
_\-- KUOW_
---

Peter,

On January 6, 2021, a violent mob incited by Donald Trump stormed our nation's Capitol as Kim and her colleagues met to certify the results of the 2020 election. This was one of the darkest days for our nation's democracy, and it was the direct result of Trump's "Big Lie."

Now, the Republican National Committee is calling the events leading up to January 6 "legitimate political discourse," instead of what it really was – a dangerous attack on democracy due to Trump and his supporters' lies about the election.

**Here in Washington's 8th District, Kim's Republican opponents are taking a page from the RNC's playbook by continuing to promote conspiracy theories, including Trump's "Big Lie."** One of Kim's opponents wouldn’t say whether President Joe Biden’s win over Donald Trump was legitimate. Another baselessly claimed "absolutely there was fraud in this election and that should be investigated."

Kim's opponents are spreading conspiracy theories to prove themselves to the far-right fringes of their party. We can't afford to have Kim replaced with any of these extreme candidates, but we need your help to win this "toss-up" race.

[**Will you rush a donation of $5 or more before our mid-month fundraising deadline to help Kim defend her seat from her extreme Republican opponents?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41752485/330184041/-1633862312?refcode=em22_220211_mm2_fndd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220211_mm2_fndd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWI2OTljMi1mNjhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rdIKIxFhyI3qKA4atzcsDwOvw6bnl65uNWHcVHS7HXE=)

clean_body: | ICYMI: "Conspiracy theories abound in Republican battle to retake Washington's 8th Congressional District" \-- KUOW Peter, On January 6, 2021, a violent mob incited by Donald Trump stormed our nation's Capitol as Kim and her colleagues met to certify the results of the 2020 election. This was one of the darkest days for our nation's democracy, and it was the direct result of Trump's "Big Lie." Now, the Republican National Committee is calling the events leading up to January 6 "legitimate political discourse," instead of what it really was – a dangerous attack on democracy due to Trump and his supporters' lies about the election. Here in Washington's 8th District, Kim's Republican opponents are taking a page from the RNC's playbook by continuing to promote conspiracy theories, including Trump's "Big Lie." One of Kim's opponents wouldn’t say whether President Joe Biden’s win over Donald Trump was legitimate. Another baselessly claimed "absolutely there was fraud in this election and that should be investigated." Kim's opponents are spreading conspiracy theories to prove themselves to the far-right fringes of their party. We can't afford to have Kim replaced with any of these extreme candidates, but we need your help to win this "toss-up" race. = Thanks, Team Schrier National Republicans have named Rep. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Our mission has immense support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/qKuQuwUuL_jV4I_0tgbhCSrBpSSB0inFDWLmkxWZngg=/NO4tc5Uve3mhC3TVaBtsao9DZ7W_6ccF1cGqPBfa8G0=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220213-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/qKuQuwUuL_jV4I_0tgbhCSrBpSSB0inFDWLmkxWZngg=/NO4tc5Uve3mhC3TVaBtsao9DZ7W_6ccF1cGqPBfa8G0=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220213-1-EM&amount=25)
---
Peter,

I'm proud to say that my legislation to ban members of Congress and their spouses from buying, selling, or trading individual stocks has widespread support. Nearly 50 members of Congress - Democrats and Republicans - have signed on to the TRUST in Congress Act - **triple the amount we had just a month ago.**

Our bill is about affirming public trust and removing even the perception of possible impropriety. What better way to affirm to the American people that we are focused on them and not our stock portfolios than by not having individual stock portfolios or by using a blind trust?

We saw in the early days of the pandemic far too many press stories about Congressman X or Senator Y buying or selling stocks in companies that were gaining or losing in light of the pandemic. And far too many Americans were left shaking their heads. I believe any opportunity to show our constituents that we are working for their interests and not our stock portfolios is one we should take.

I'm proud to lead the charge on such a commonsense reform and **I 'm encouraged by the support voters and members of Congress alike have shown for the initiative.**

If you believe in the goal we're working towards, [_**I hope you 'll consider a contribution to our campaign today. Your support ensures I can take the lead on the next mission that comes our way.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/qKuQuwUuL_jV4I_0tgbhCSrBpSSB0inFDWLmkxWZngg=/NO4tc5Uve3mhC3TVaBtsao9DZ7W_6ccF1cGqPBfa8G0=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220213-1-EM&amount=25)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/qKuQuwUuL_jV4I_0tgbhCSrBpSSB0inFDWLmkxWZngg=/NO4tc5Uve3mhC3TVaBtsao9DZ7W_6ccF1cGqPBfa8G0=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220213-1-EM&amount=25)
---
With appreciation,
Abigail

body:
He’s seeking revenge after I vindicated President Trump.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjh02mst5hamd7f1htasrgimn8tggarok1bs2dq0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctjmaoj6cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sbkslpb4plkcaom3d77c3imecpjehgj2s716ioj2db0sooraohmckqb6ttn6errfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup38phheaqr8dtimdj30s5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)

He’s seeking revenge after I vindicated President Trump.
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znid3mbstdforr2ogp7ia30ll24f1934j2qmemk8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctjmaoj6cph2bs)
---
Friend,
---
I successfully defended President Trump during his SECOND impeachment trial.
---
**_But now, the star witness and lead instigator of the impeachment trial – Alex Vindman – is seeking revenge by suing me._**
---
The swamp truly wants to destroy me personally, professionally, and financially, all because I helped an innocent man walk free.
---

THREE DAYS LEFT TO BE COVERED :) | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0f2c9ebdeda4/martin-county-fair-volunteers-needed-6157385?e=77bc5297c6)

# VOLUNTEERS NEED FOR MARTIN COUNTY FAIR!

Hello Fellow Patriot,

The Campaign has been blessed to find out, last minute that we WILL have a table a the Martin County Fair. IF you are able to help please reply to this email with the day and time you are available (SEE details below)

Initially we thought that the we would be able to place our CANDIDATE PETITION FORMS on the Republican Parties table (along with the other candidate who are running). However, we were told yesterday that *Melissa Martz* specifically is not allowed to have forms displayed on the table. SO, now we have secured an entire table just for the Campaign. This turns out to be a HUGE blessing. As you know we need 2600 signature to get on the ballot the Constitutional and Ethical way.

We therefore, need volunteers to man the table and to collect signatures. Thank you to those who have volunteered in the past and to those who are able to help with this event!

DETAILS

WHERE: Martin County Fair
2616 SE Dixie Hwy Stuart FL 34996

WHEN: FEBUARY --
14th - 5-10p
15th- 5-10p
16th- 5-10p
17th- 5-10p
18th- 5-Midnight
19th- Noon- Midnight

| Hi there – Jerry here. I know getting emails on a Sunday isn’t ideal, but I want to share just [**three things**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41753485/330188298/-2096412469?refcode=20220213_em_fr_b1_3thingsmidmonth_30op&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTIxMmFkNi1mODhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ScAJ1i2e_Zyz9LxEvGWdyPN3-ck_PJFQu9Dp3Lle-7Y=) you need to know right now:
1. **My Mid-February fundraising deadline is tomorrow,** and my finance staff just told me we need to raise $3,921 before then to stay on budget.
2. **My election is 93 days away.** I only have 93 days to travel across PA-18, connect with undecided voters, and take our grassroots movement to the next level.
3. **I have a clear path to victory,** and people are starting to notice the strength this campaign has. _PrimaryCast just projected as the current front-runner in this race!_

So we can’t slow down now. If I’m going to keep this momentum and win this race, I need to hit every single fundraising goal. Remember, I’m running to represent the people of PA-18 – not special interests or big dollar donors. I will never be bought by corporate PACs or fossil fuel big wigs. That’s why every single grassroots donation counts, and every single grassroots donor gets me one step closer to being the leader PA-18 deserves. [**If everyone reading this chipped in, I’ll get to my Mid-February goal BEFORE our deadline tomorrow. Please, just __one donation__ from you will make all the difference. name: Danny Carroll, Team Engel
subject: A new Superbowl game
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41753779/330189590/-2037180865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGUzODJmMi1mYThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XGzxSPBlUypYSUv-Cn3a3P_FzpdJlYEwUUsoRAjVvmo=&emci=3c2911d8-708b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=1de382f2-fa8c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=12898431)
---
Happy Super Bowl Sunday team,
With an expected 100 million people tuning in, the Super Bowl is the most watched sporting event of the year. If you’re like me, your team didn't make it, but you’re still watching, if for no other reason than to check out the ads.
But this is an election year, and in Arizona the ads might look a little different. While Donald Trump may be out of the spotlight for the moment, he has inspired a whole cadre of alt-right fringe candidates in Arizona, and some of them have more money than sense. We expect to see a few of them hitting the airwaves during the big game.
So, every time a crAZy GOP candidate runs an ad that makes your stomach churn, I propose we do something about it other than shouting at the TV (I’m not the only one who does that, right?). Let’s make a game out of it. [**Every time you see a Republican on screen peddling baseless conspiracy theories, pull out your phone and make a $5 contribution to an Arizona candidate who still believes in democracy.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41753781/330189592/416963966?refcode=X_021322_SuperBowlSunday&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGUzODJmMi1mYThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XGzxSPBlUypYSUv-Cn3a3P_FzpdJlYEwUUsoRAjVvmo=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41753783/330189594/416963966?refcode=X_021322_SuperBowlSunday&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGUzODJmMi1mYThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XGzxSPBlUypYSUv-Cn3a3P_FzpdJlYEwUUsoRAjVvmo=)
---
When a fear-mongering xenophobe tries to scapegoat immigrant communities in the name of erecting Trump’s dumb border wall,**[send $5 to a candidate who knows we can have secure borders without demonizing our friends and neighbors. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41753786/330189596/416963966?refcode=X_021322_SuperBowlSunday&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGUzODJmMi1mYThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XGzxSPBlUypYSUv-Cn3a3P_FzpdJlYEwUUsoRAjVvmo=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41753793/330189604/416963966?refcode=X_021322_SuperBowlSunday&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGUzODJmMi1mYThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XGzxSPBlUypYSUv-Cn3a3P_FzpdJlYEwUUsoRAjVvmo=)
---
And which candidate do we have in mind? How about **[Kirsten Engel, who is fighting like hell to keep this seat blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41753794/330189607/416963966?refcode=X_021322_SuperBowlSunday&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGUzODJmMi1mYThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XGzxSPBlUypYSUv-Cn3a3P_FzpdJlYEwUUsoRAjVvmo=) **AZ-06 is now the most competitive seat in not only the state, but the entire country. We need to make sure Kirsten has the resources necessary to fight back against the fossil fuel, big pharma, and dark money attack ads that are about to pour into Arizona.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41753796/330189608/416963966?refcode=X_021322_SuperBowlSunday&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGUzODJmMi1mYThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XGzxSPBlUypYSUv-Cn3a3P_FzpdJlYEwUUsoRAjVvmo=)
---
I appreciate you taking the time to read this email, and I appreciate everything you’re doing to help elect Arizona’s next great Congresswoman.
Enjoy the game, team!
Sincerely,
Danny Carroll
Team Engel

Paid for by Engel for Arizona

Tucson, AZ 85717
United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeanine=20Lawson?=
subject: Democrats Want to Block Loudoun Investigation
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress")
body:
Your elected officials actually want to stop Attorney General Jason Miyares from investigating Scott Ziegler and the Loudoun County Public Schools | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us8.campaign-archive.com/?e=fc83fb200d&u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=bb7f309cfd)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=d2607fab60&e=fc83fb200d "Donate")
---
| Dear ,

I would have thought that after widespread outrage from parents and students, national media attention, and clear evidence that the Loudoun County Public School System and Superintendent Scott Ziegler covered up sexual assault within the school system, that Democrats would realize how fed up we are and stop attempting to protect the corrupt school board in Loudoun County.

Instead, we saw the opposite yesterday. _Democrats are actually doubling down on their opposition to investigating those responsible._

[Senator Jennifer Boysko (D) and Delegate Suhas Subramanyam (D) held a press conference yesterday just to oppose our Attorney General Jason Miyares and his investigation in Loudoun.](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=28e9136af0&e=fc83fb200d)

This is insane. Rather than listening to parents, students and teachers, Democrats are _still_ playing political games and picking sides based solely on political party.

It's time for this to end. You deserve elected officials who will listen to those they represent and protect your interests at locally, in Richmond, _and_ in Washington. You also deserve elected officials who will support this investigation because it's the right thing to do, rather than basing their support on political affiliations.

Our Democrat representatives have proven that they will do neither. That's why I'm running to take back Virginia's 10th Congressional District and give you the representation you deserve.

I'm excited to oust the Democrats and restore normalcy to Virginia and our country, but I can't do it without your help. [Will you please consider chipping in with $100, $50, $25, or even $10 to help me take back the 10th District and give you the representation you deserve?](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=a25f91701e&e=fc83fb200d)

---
| [Contribute $10](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=66b0ecb04a&e=fc83fb200d "Contribute $10")

| I look forward to working together to end this insanity and protect our children.

For love of country,

Jeanine Lawson
Candidate for Virginia's 10th Congressional District

clean_body: Your elected officials actually want to stop Attorney General Jason Miyares from investigating Scott Ziegler and the Loudoun County Public Schools | | | | | | | "Donate" | Dear , I would have thought that after widespread outrage from parents and students, national media attention, and clear evidence that the Loudoun County Public School System and Superintendent Scott Ziegler covered up sexual assault within the school system, that Democrats would realize how fed up we are and stop attempting to protect the corrupt school board in Loudoun County. Instead, we saw the opposite yesterday. Democrats are actually doubling down on their opposition to investigating those responsible. This is insane. Rather than listening to parents, students and teachers, Democrats are still playing political games and picking sides based solely on political party. It's time for this to end. You deserve elected officials who will listen to those they represent and protect your interests at locally, in Richmond, and in Washington. You also deserve elected officials who will support this investigation because it's the right thing to do, rather than basing their support on political affiliations. Our Democrat representatives have proven that they will do neither. That's why I'm running to take back Virginia's 10th Congressional District and give you the representation you deserve. I'm excited to oust the Democrats and restore normalcy to Virginia and our country, but I can't do it without your help. | "Contribute $10" | "Contribute $25" | "Contribute $50" | "Contribute $100" | "Contribute any amount" | I look forward to working together to end this insanity and protect our children. For love of country, Jeanine Lawson Candidate for Virginia's 10th Congressional District | " Website " | | "Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress" | | | | | | | | | | | jeaninelawson.com | | Copyright © 2022 Lawson for Congress, All rights reserved. * **2016:** Senator Catherine Cortez Masto won by 2 points
* **2018:** Governor Steve Sisolak won by 4 points
* **2020:** Congresswoman Susie Lee won by 3 points

Don’t forget, Susie Lee, Steve Sisolak, and Catherine Cortez Masto are all up for re-election in November.

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Michigan IS in today's big game
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220213&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220213&amount=28]
Team,
You know you’re from Michigan when you’re rooting for the Rams (harder than actual Rams fans) today, just because Matthew Stafford is playing. Every Michigander loves seeing a former Lion make it to the championship — and it’s never bad to root against Ohio.
Yes, Michiganders are generally nice. But our whole scale is just different here, thanks to our long-suffering support of the Lions and our die-hard enthusiasm for anyone that calls this state home.
Case in point: I was in a busy Verizon store in December when the Lions finally got their first win of the season. Someone had the game playing on their phone as we all waited and the place ERUPTED as if we were headed to the playoffs when St. Brown scored the winning touchdown.
In addition to Stafford, Eminem and Sean Forbes, both Michiganders, will be performing at halftime. We cheer for our own, even if they might not be on our team anymore.
So enjoy the big game, and if you’re up for it, consider chipping in a few bucks below to support my reelection campaign for Michigan’s new 7th district. $5, $10, or $15 really does go a long way in helping me run a successful and strategic campaign. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220213&amount=28]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220213&amount=28]
Elissa

Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/elissaslotkin] and Twitter. [https://twitter.com/ElissaSlotkin]

body:
| | | | **[This can't be right, is it?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59545721:JQpXSnE0N:m:1:3298722022:0D8B5DA98FFA189904EB60AC32764925:r "This can’t be right, is it?")** I was talking to Mark from our House Republican Warehouse, and he said you haven't claimed your SIGNED copy of Jim Jordan's new book yet! **Read what he said about your order below!**

It's vitally important that you claim your SIGNED copy of Congressman Jim Jordan's popular book, _**Do What You Said You Would Do**_ before we run out of copies _**forever**_!**[If you want your book, you'd better claim a copy soon!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59545721:JQpXSnE0N:m:1:3298722022:0D8B5DA98FFA189904EB60AC32764925:r "If you want your book, you’d better claim a copy soon!")**

We are running DANGEROUSLY low on copies, and we can only guarantee your book if you order by midnight! **[Claim now!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59545721:JQpXSnE0N:m:1:3298722022:0D8B5DA98FFA189904EB60AC32764925:r "Claim now!")**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Sue, House Republicans
Subject: FWD: Re: EXCLUSIVE SIGNED BOOK OFFER

At 9:05 AM, Sue **[<sue@houserepublicans.org>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59545721:JQpXSnE0N:m:1:3298722022:0D8B5DA98FFA189904EB60AC32764925:r "sue@houserepublicans.org> ")** wrote

Mark,

That's impossible. I would have thought that a TRUE Patriot like them would be the FIRST one to order a signed copy. I will check in with them to verify!

Sue

Hey Sue,

I would love to send a book to them! However, they haven't ordered one yet!

Mark

Hey Mark,

I hate to be a bother, but did you ship out their book yet?

I know you're running low on copies and they're one of the BEST Conservatives out there. I know they want to read Rep. Jordan's book about draining the swamp!

Please ship ASAP.

Sue, House Republicans

name: Nan Whaley
subject: tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
While a Super Bowl championship might be a nice start, it’s not going to cut it.

Team, everything is on the line.
**Tonight...** the Bengals are in the Super Bowl poised to make history.
**And by Tuesday,** we’re trying to raise **$15,000** to meet our mid-month fundraising goal and make history right here in Ohio.
**[Will you rush in $5 or whatever you can spare to help us build on our momentum and flip Ohio?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41753897/330190234/-679543169?refcode=nw_em_220213_1_t2_b&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTFjOTE3Ny1mZDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qIXDhDenQbHAD-1FDw0nor4L3kVQi3F222vg14ESlC4=)**
**I’m running for governor because Ohio deserves better.** And while a Super Bowl championship might be a nice start, it’s not going to cut it. Ohio deserves more than another four years of the same corruption in Columbus.
We don’t need to settle for leadership that ignores commonsense COVID-19 precautions, places partisan politics ahead of people, and caters to special interests. It’s time we elect leaders who put our communities first.
Together, we can flip Ohio and build a brighter future for working families across our state. But we’re up against well-funded, wealthy opponents.
**[As the only non-millionaire in this race, I’m counting on supporters like you. Chip in $5 now to help us meet our mid-month fundraising goal and flip Ohio.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41753898/330190235/-679543169?refcode=nw_em_220213_1_t2_b&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTFjOTE3Ny1mZDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qIXDhDenQbHAD-1FDw0nor4L3kVQi3F222vg14ESlC4=)**
Onward,
Nan Whaley
Democrat for Ohio Governor

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41753899/330190236/-679543169?refcode=nw_em_220213_1_t2_b&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTFjOTE3Ny1mZDhjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qIXDhDenQbHAD-1FDw0nor4L3kVQi3F222vg14ESlC4=)****

name: Peter Franchot
subject: You’ve Been Selected
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
I’m just reaching out to let you know that you’ve been selected to take my campaign’s Official 2022 Issues Survey.
I’m building a people-powered movement to create a people-centered government, and I’d like to hear your thoughts directly on the kitchen-table issues that are most important to you. From combating climate change, to implementing bold solutions for the student debt crisis, to lowering the cost of healthcare and prescription drugs, and more, we have an opportunity to secure a better and stronger future for our state in the years to come.
If you have the time, I’d really appreciate it if you shared your thoughts on the issues that the next Governor of Maryland should address. Click here to take my campaign’s Official 2022 Issues Survey. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/BC_KijWRCUa7vG4y46E1mA2]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States

subject: it's offensive

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41754837/330194833/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWVkMDM2NS0wMDhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L68gD_QczxlpZCwNDTONhXquirUKqXVhBbJzqBQgQNk=&emci=d50ad89f-ff8c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=15ed0365-008d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41754839/330194834/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWVkMDM2NS0wMDhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L68gD_QczxlpZCwNDTONhXquirUKqXVhBbJzqBQgQNk=&emci=d50ad89f-ff8c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=15ed0365-008d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
When I retired from the U.S. Navy after nearly 4 decades of military service, I felt called to continue to serve my country in a meaningful way. **But never did I expect running for the U.S. Senate that a Super PAC would run $1 million in TV ads attacking me for serving in the United States military.**
They ran ads saying that because my service moved my family and I all over the country, that we weren’t Iowans anymore. They said because I was called upon to work for the likes of great leaders like President Barack Obama and Senator Ted Kennedy, that I somehow lost the ability to represent Iowa. _Really?_
It was offensive to everyone who signs up to serve our nation – an overseas teacher, a diplomat, a Peace Corps volunteer, or a military member. I was particularly appalled at what Gold Star families who gave the ultimate sacrifice must have thought.
Now I’m taking on Republican Senator Chuck Grassley, and Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs are already readying millions to run even more ridiculous ads against me. I’m a hard target for a GOP hit job, but I’m sure it is coming. We can and must keep the Senate blue and win this seat in Iowa.
Our most important mid-month deadline of the campaign so far is at midnight on Tuesday, and if the Super PACs see even one shred of weakness in our fundraising report, they’ll pounce with attacks to try to bury us.
**We’re just $35,993 away from our $200,000 goal and what we need to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue. But I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give now if I’m going to hit this goal and have the resources I need to fight back against the incoming attacks:**
[**Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now – every dollar you can afford before our most important mid-month deadline yet – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority? There couldn’t be a better or more important moment to chip in to my campaign if I’m going to win. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41754840/330194835/-42398318?refcode=em20220213mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWVkMDM2NS0wMDhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L68gD_QczxlpZCwNDTONhXquirUKqXVhBbJzqBQgQNk=)

clean_body: Hello, When I retired from the U.S. Navy after nearly 4 decades of military service, I felt called to continue to serve my country in a meaningful way. But never did I expect running for the U.S. Senate that a Super PAC would run $1 million in TV ads attacking me for serving in the United States military. They ran ads saying that because my service moved my family and I all over the country, that we weren’t Iowans anymore. They said because I was called upon to work for the likes of great leaders like President Barack Obama and Senator Ted Kennedy, that I somehow lost the ability to represent Iowa. Really? It was offensive to everyone who signs up to serve our nation – an overseas teacher, a diplomat, a Peace Corps volunteer, or a military member. I was particularly appalled at what Gold Star families who gave the ultimate sacrifice must have thought. Now I’m taking on Republican Senator Chuck Grassley, and Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs are already readying millions to run even more ridiculous ads against me. I’m a hard target for a GOP hit job, but I’m sure it is coming. We can and must keep the Senate blue and win this seat in Iowa. Our most important mid-month deadline of the campaign so far is at midnight on Tuesday, and if the Super PACs see even one shred of weakness in our fundraising report, they’ll pounce with attacks to try to bury us. We’re just $35,993 away from our $200,000 goal and what we need to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue. But I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give now if I’m going to hit this goal and have the resources I need to fight back against the incoming attacks: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = The Super PACs attacks are coming, but I know we can fend them off with your help today. I’m so grateful that you are on this team, Mike Franken, Vice Admiral, U.S. Navy (ret.) **Wisconsinites are facing a public health emergency, which has made clear just how critical quality health care coverage is.** Too many across our state, especially in rural areas, are struggling to afford and access good care.

After losing one brother to cancer and watching another brother navigate daily life with spina bifida, Deb understands what our community-members face. Lives are at stake, and we must expand Medicaid.

**Quality health care is precious.** And every family across western Wisconsin deserves it. That is why we are standing up for Medicaid expansion. We know that Deb will fight for affordable and accessible health care when she gets to Congress, but this fight is urgent. We need to act now.

**[We need 1,000 signatures on our petition for Wisconsin to expand Medicaid >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41754860/330194994/-677789453?refcode=ea.f713da93-008d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.f713da93-008d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzEzZGE5My0wMDhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7urnKda3FvdhTa6rhnSmAeHb959ZLeHzJ450wVgsVsw=&emci=f213da93-008d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=f713da93-008d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=5944225)**

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: Bullies don't scare me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Hi Peter, it's Abby. Do you have a minute? I'm emailing you to talk about why my race to defeat Sen. Grassley (R-IA) is so critical. You see, if we flip Iowa blue, Democrats will be virtually _guaranteed_ to maintain Senate control – and right now, Sen. Grassley has never been more vulnerable: **He's facing his highest disapproval ratings in nearly two decades.**
**[The Senate is split 50-50, so winning in Iowa could be the one race that keeps the Senate out of Mitch McConnell's hands. That's why I'm reaching out to you ahead of tomorrow's mid-month deadline. name: Team Lizzie
subject: Today Is Lizzie’s Birthday
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Guess what—Today is Lizzie’s birthday!
And she has one birthday wish that we can all contribute toward! With early voting beginning in Texas tomorrow, she is as focused as ever on turning out the vote for 2022. No matter where you are, you can commit to vote in the primary and general elections and to do all you can to get others to the polls.
For Lizzie’s birthday, will you add your name to show you will commit to voting in 2022? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/D4iSzD8eL0Cl6EopBmhR0g2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/D4iSzD8eL0Cl6EopBmhR0g2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/D4iSzD8eL0Cl6EopBmhR0g2]There is so much at stake in the 2022 midterms. And Lizzie and our team are working every day to make sure we hold the House and win important elections in Texas and elsewhere in November. Knowing you are doing all you can is the best birthday present you can give her!
Add your name here to wish Lizzie a happy birthday! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/D4iSzD8eL0Cl6EopBmhR0g2]
Thanks for all you do.
Team Lizzie

name: Brett Guillory for Texas
subject: Reminder: Early Voting Starts Monday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brett Guillory for Texas
body:
Let's Keep Spreading Our Message
| | | | |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ynRYustGSsyqBatCKKZRUpGNMfXcsc0ysoQRxHPvvTZ6JNbcgJvp60Z_Xul0tFmcQqTHnRfjgviiCRdm3YQXVHBGRs3VNu_FG28hrLfvLQIp1q7b26UP9zxu_0riUgCJGBj_yJEQ3KZN6k0iBJfGdih1BQ09K1fWLJ51Nn2nQRU=&c=qbzdVqW3InUlegeNHl9DYklat4b5NfNDDu-tQBPdbKj7bymfLSV5ug==&ch=ScBv-L8OWBDBvFetzKJkl8TP7GEQv3VdCeq4hOtcB9YM31JinOM5Pw==)

| Dear Neighbor,
Our campaign to send a neighbor from our district - and one who truly represents our community - to D.C. has made great strides. With your help, we can keep the momentum going and ensure that WE pick our representative, not the establishment.
The primary is finally here, and I need your help getting our friends and neighbors to the polls. Early voting starts Monday, February 14th. Other key dates include:

* February 18th \- Deadline to request a mail-in ballot.
* March 1st \- Primary Election Day

---
---
You can ensure a winning day for our campaign on March 1st by taking the following actions.

* Remind your friends, loved ones, college students, etc. - anyone who might not be able to physically make it to the poll - to request their mail-in ballot prior to the Feb. 18 deadline.
* Call and email your neighbors in TX38 and share with them why you are supporting me and my campaign. If any would like to speak with me personally, I'd be happy to do so.
* Request a yard sign via my [website form](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ynRYustGSsyqBatCKKZRUpGNMfXcsc0ysoQRxHPvvTZ6JNbcgJvp68jzlb2Bi1LFpGdgc0oJ2CqrSsOUKyjAQuTOxKiIrXuH-pZPFjGtPWwbr6ML6zh-QltC904vuMunjh3nNAh7RaufDMgV-gNrdh2YkJQsEyrpw9r1aE19jMF41Lgyluk3pA==&c=qbzdVqW3InUlegeNHl9DYklat4b5NfNDDu-tQBPdbKj7bymfLSV5ug==&ch=ScBv-L8OWBDBvFetzKJkl8TP7GEQv3VdCeq4hOtcB9YM31JinOM5Pw==) and chat with your neighbors as to why this campaign's message is resonating with you.
* Continue in your block walking efforts to spread the word about my campaign.

I truly appreciate all of your support and the enthusiasm that you have shown for my campaign. Because of you, our message has and will continue to reach the members of our community.
All My Thanks,
---

name: Marisa Wood
subject: I’m officially the Democratic frontrunner!
body:
Yesterday, we got word that another one of our primary opponents suspended their campaign in this district. We are one step closer to unifying local Democrats in our effort to unseat Kevin McCarthy. | _We are alerting Democrats about Marisa Wood -- a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy. To support Marisa Wood's campaign, [chip in here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41755127/330196030/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDViYWViYy0wMzhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wJlHrV40FJVPRQTMwavkGLxNWh_9hepOlK3eu60Ilqc=) We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/8c6a7609-028d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/f45baebc-038d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDViYWViYy0wMzhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wJlHrV40FJVPRQTMwavkGLxNWh_9hepOlK3eu60Ilqc=&id=124172018)._ Big news, friend.

**On Friday, we got word that another one of our primary opponents suspended their campaign in this district.**

We are officially the Democratic frontrunner in this race, and we are one step closer to unifying local Democrats in our effort to unseat Kevin McCarthy!

I want to commend my primary opponents on their hard-fought campaigns. I also want to let everyone know that I’m staying in this fight, and I’m not backing down.

We have an uphill climb, but our Central Valley district has been left behind for too long while McCarthy cowers to Trump and jockeys for the Speaker's gavel.

**He needs to be held accountable, and there's no more powerful way to do that than by challenging him at the ballot box right here in the 20th.**

As we enter the next stage of this campaign, I need to know you're with me:

**[Will you click here to say you officially endorse my campaign? Today, I'd love to see your name with the hundreds of other endorsements we've received from grassroots supporters across the country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41755128/330196031/-270480565?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDViYWViYy0wMzhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wJlHrV40FJVPRQTMwavkGLxNWh_9hepOlK3eu60Ilqc=&emci=8c6a7609-028d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=f45baebc-038d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=21170704)** | **[Endorse Marisa](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41755129/330196032/-270480565?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDViYWViYy0wMzhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wJlHrV40FJVPRQTMwavkGLxNWh_9hepOlK3eu60Ilqc=&emci=8c6a7609-028d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=f45baebc-038d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=21170704)**
---

This goes without saying but I'm not a politician, and I never dreamed of running for Congress, especially after being a teacher for more than two decades.

But my kiddos and their families are hurting. I had to do something to leave this community better off for everyone -- and that starts with taking on Kevin McCarthy.

**[I'd love to have your endorsement, friend -- let me know you're with me>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41755130/330196033/-270480565?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDViYWViYy0wMzhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wJlHrV40FJVPRQTMwavkGLxNWh_9hepOlK3eu60Ilqc=&emci=8c6a7609-028d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=f45baebc-038d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=21170704)**

Thank you,

name: Val Demings
subject: We need affordable child care NOW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Will you add your name to my petition?
| | |
---
Friend,

I want to talk to you about something important:

As a working mom of three boys and as a Nana, I've experienced the same challenge so many Americans face: **finding and affording child care.**

When my husband Jerry and I worked in law enforcement, a grueling shift at the police station was only the beginning of a long day. After I was done with work, I'd meet him in a parking lot to swap the kids into my car as he went to start his shift.
Luckily, we had this option. It was hard, it was exhausting, but we made it work for our three boys. Many families across the country, however, don't have options and simply cannot afford the out-of-control child care costs.
Here's the deal: We need affordable child care now. That's why President Biden is fighting for paid family leave, affordable child care and universal preschool, and why we got it passed in the House. It's time for the Senate to do the same. **That's why I'm reaching out, friend. I need 10,000 grassroots supporters – including you – to join me in putting pressure on the Senate to support families. **
**[Before my 11:59 p.m. end of day deadline, will you add your name to my petition calling on the Senate to pass President Biden’s child care agenda? American families need affordable child care NOW, so please sign on if you agree.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41755191/330196317/-655369994?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk2374-su-nd-v1&refcode=jtk2374-su-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzlhYTUwNi0wNDhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_8HYXEuTWVJPmhT9IuaWP7lo7durVT3ToaWpuF9gNbI=&emci=f2d9a73e-698b-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=c39aa506-048d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=20244100)**
Thank you,

Val Demings

Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement _and_ keep Florida red _permanently_. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. clean_body: Will you add your name to my petition? | | | Friend, I want to talk to you about something important: As a working mom of three boys and as a Nana, I've experienced the same challenge so many Americans face: finding and affording child care. When my husband Jerry and I worked in law enforcement, a grueling shift at the police station was only the beginning of a long day. After I was done with work, I'd meet him in a parking lot to swap the kids into my car as he went to start his shift. Luckily, we had this option. It was hard, it was exhausting, but we made it work for our three boys. Many families across the country, however, don't have options and simply cannot afford the out-of-control child care costs. Here's the deal: We need affordable child care now. That's why President Biden is fighting for paid family leave, affordable child care and universal preschool, and why we got it passed in the House. It's time for the Senate to do the same. That's why I'm reaching out, friend. I need 10,000 grassroots supporters – including you – to join me in putting pressure on the Senate to support families. Thank you, Val Demings | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? = If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic. = If you’re reading from your phone, to automatically sign up for my SMS team. By providing your mobile phone number you consent to receive recurring updates from Val Demings for U.S. Senate, including by automated text message. Txt HELP for help, STOP to end. name: Team Holly
subject: What has MTG done for us?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
https://www.holly4congress.com/ [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
Peter, l ast week I spent time volunteering at the Community Resource Center of Chattooga. Their food bank fills a need we have struggled with in GA-14 for many years, and being there to help showed me once again why I'm running for Congress.
While sorting and handing out food, I had the opportunity to talk with the founder who began the program 8 years ago. She felt compelled to start the food bank because she knew people in her life would go hungry without it. When she isn't at the food bank, she spends most of her time fostering teenagers and workshopping resumes with the young women leaving the foster system.
People like this are what hold our community together. Her struggles and triumphs remind me why this race is so important.
This work is especially touching for me, because my family has had to rely on food banks before. I know that our community's struggles go beyond party lines. We need to get back to the basics of helping one another and that starts with better representation. We need legislators who understand the problems and can fight for solutions.
It doesn't matter what side of the aisle you are on, we can find common ground in fighting for our community. That’s why our Rural Revival Plan is so special. I am fighting for resources that will help all of GA-14. The issues we face are not too hard to fix. We need a representative who is working for the people, not against them.
With your donation, we can make a difference today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em0211b]
We can do this,
Holly McCormack.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc?refcode=em0211b] Join the #MackPack [https://www.holly4congress.com/]
https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/ [https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/] https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress [https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress] https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/] http://www.hollyforcongress.org/ [http://www.hollyforcongress.org/]
Paid for by Holly for Congress
Holly McCormack for Congress
862 Lafayette St
PO Box 1035
Ringgold, GA 30736
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/78f5b5ae-fd8c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/5797c94f-058d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Nzk3Yzk0Zi0wNThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sHLU4cAN1G7Ty9DajAbhMxKKd8Oa5xXXuj-ZVkyzm5c=&id=126471745 .

That 's why I'm reaching out now and challenging our supporters to help us raise $5,000 this weekend to keep the most vulnerable seat in California blue! name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Can I explain something?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
If you can spare a minute, I need to explain something:

Ron Johnson has more than $2.1 million in the bank for his re-election — that’s more cash on hand than anyone in this race. When you combine that with what Donald Trump and national Republicans have reported, the other side has well over $200 million cash on hand to take back the U.S. Senate.

Over the coming months, they will flood their massive amount of money into battleground states like Wisconsin in an effort to drown out Democrats like me. We need to be prepared to respond as soon as that happens.

That’s why I'm counting on your help to show everyone that our scrappy grassroots team has what it takes to give the Republicans trying to save Ron Johnson a real run for their money. As we approach the halfway point of this critical financial quarter, I need your help to make sure we can stay on track for our goals.

[**Will you chip in whatever is meaningful to you to support our campaign ahead of the mid-quarter deadline? Look, I didn't decide to run for the U.S. Senate because I thought it would be easy. I knew we would be in for one heck of a fight.

I'm running because I'm frustrated by the influence of big money in our politics. I'm frustrated by Ron Johnson who continues to ignore the people who elected him. And I'm frustrated that our slim Senate majority is getting blocked by a minority of Republicans (and even some Democrats!) at every turn.

Wisconsin will be the tipping point for Senate control. _The Washington Post_ recently reported that our campaign is the Democrats’ best chance to defeat Ron Johnson. And the latest head-to-head poll shows I’m the only candidate in this race who can beat him in a general election.

[**If you can, will you chip in to our campaign and help us flip Wisconsin’s Senate seat blue? Our mid-quarter FEC deadline is in just a few days and we can’t meet our goals without you. I would greatly appreciate anything you can give.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41755899/330201055/-1448701630?refcode=em22_220213_mm1_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220213_mm1_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDEwMjhmNi0wNzhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MNiFfxMj5Fx2prmiT0szX6Z6AYo5w7YgHmw93zGdeFM=)

At the end of this week, I will receive an update on the amount of money we have raised so far this quarter and most importantly, the number of people who have contributed. I hope to see your name on there.

Thanks for being a part of this.

— Sarah Godlewski

Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate to put Wisconsin workers and families first. She's the only Democrat who is beating Ron Johnson in the latest head-to-head poll of our race. With your help, we can flip this seat. Chip in to join us: | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41755900/330201056/-1448701630?refcode=em22_220213_mm1_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220213_mm1_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDEwMjhmNi0wNzhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MNiFfxMj5Fx2prmiT0szX6Z6AYo5w7YgHmw93zGdeFM=)

When you combine that with what Donald Trump and national Republicans have reported, the other side has well over $200 million cash on hand to take back the U.S. Senate. name: Michael, NRCC Communications Director
subject: RE: Please don’t let your membership expire!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Dan Crenshaw asked me to reach out to you personally to extend an exclusive membership deadline till February 15th for you.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3hnn6--fgxr-4qqlpo8&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

| | Want to FIRE Pelosi? **Text FIRE to 21818** to help House Republicans take back the House for the American People.
---
| | | Hello Patriot,

I am reaching out with an URGENT NOTICE. **You failed to renew your 2022 Membership and it has LAPSED. **
---
| | | [RENEW NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hnn6-1y2l2-4qqlpo2/ "Generic Button")
---
Dan Crenshaw was upset to not see your name on our 2022 Membership list. He asked me to reach out to you personally to **extend an exclusive membership deadline till 11:59 PM TONIGHT for you. **

**[Will you answer Dan Crenshaw's plea and renew your 2022 Membership?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hnn6-1y2l3-4qqlpo3/ "Will you answer Dan Crenshaw's plea and renew your 2022 Membership? ")**

As Crenshaw said, renewing your membership is one of the most important things you can do to help House Republicans win back the Majority in 2022.

I don't know about you, but I am fed up with Speaker Pelosi and her Radical Left Minions. They are destroying this country with their COVID Mandates, free speech bans, and open borders. We must hold Pelosi accountable and get her FIRED in 2022.

**[We can't do it without you though. That's why I NEED you to renew your 2022 Membership before the extended February 7th, 11:59 PM deadline.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hnn6-1y2l4-4qqlpo4/ "We can't do it without you though. That's why I NEED you to renew your 2022 Membership before the extended February 7th, 11:59 PM deadline. ")**

You are _crucial_ in this fight.

Don't let Dan Crenshaw or the rest of the House Republicans down.

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hnn6-1y2l5-4qqlpo5/ "Generic Button")
---

Thank you,

Michael
NCCC Communications Director

\--------- Forwarded Message ---------
From: Dan Crenshaw
Subject: Please don’t let your membership expire!

It’s Dan Crenshaw. I’m reaching out to let you know that your current 2022 Membership status is listed as _EXPIRED_.

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hnn6-1y2l6-4qqlpo6/ "Generic Button")
---

Let me tell you why renewing your 2022 Membership is so important:
1.Beating Nancy Pelosi’s House Democrats is going to be impossible without YOU on our side.
2. This is the most important election of our lifetimes – it will truly decide whether or not America chooses the failed socialism of the Left or the freedom and prosperity of conservatism.
3\. Your 2022 Membership is _essential_ to showing Pelosi that our grassroots donors are more powerful than her evil dark money cronies.

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hnn6-1y2l7-4qqlpo7/)
---

Because we have yet to hear from you, your membership lapsed. **But I have good news: we have extended our deadline until midnight on February 7th.**

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hnn6-1y2l8-4qqlpo8/ "Generic Button")
---

I can only extend this offer to you for a limited time – but it’s critical you renew your 2022 Membership before the deadline. If we fail to make our mark, the Liberal Media, pollsters, and pundits will say it’s indicative of the electoral outcome and everything will snowball.

**[Please, I’m humbly asking: renew today>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hnn6-1y2l9-4qqlpo9/ "Please, %%=v\(@sFirstName\)=%%. I’m humbly asking: renew today >>>")**

Sincerely,

Dan Crenshaw

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hnn6-1y2la-4qqlpo9/ "Generic Button")
---
| |
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hnn6-1y2lb-4qqlpo0/ "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hnn6-1y2lc-4qqlpo1/ "Can we count on you to step up?")**
---
| | | [DONATE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hnn6-1y2ld-4qqlpo2/ "Donate Button in Footer")
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hnn6-1y2le-4qqlpo3/)
---
| Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. [NRCC.org](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hnn6-1y2lf-4qqlpo4/)

Washington, DC 20003

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: Pig at a bacon contest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6bm06nsan7hlrm0snn3eljmc29lcbjuhthania0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctge4ob6c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf4ddle9gmfcr5edgj8pb3ccqeepr2edp62otm65qb8t76m8r37cbgcponbc76c3jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqmeddl6urm4phlcapm0ptgmlin49fg)
Target on my back

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9k4f85bbquccorgd75lbmrfjuepesles9ooo0u8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctge4ob6c1h2bs)
---

Friends,

I’m as nervous as a pig at a bacon contest about what’s going on in our country right now.

Open borders, 2nd amendment rights threatened, tax hikes that will cripple the economy... _The only thing that could happen now to put our country in more danger is an alien invasion and even THAT may be a safer bet at this point._

I’m reaching out to you because you know I always tell it how it is. And truth is, I’m in trouble. I’m in trouble because the Radical Left has put a target on my back for standing up to their double standards and cancel culture. I’m standing up to their tax hikes and complete disregard for our border security.

Here’s a secure link that only you will be able to access for a limited time. Please take advantage of this opportunity. **[CHIP IN HERE.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7v2f1ii2tppqroupath4hlt68785bikgqu94e1g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1ctge4ob6c1h2bs)**
