name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: When I think about my most important supporters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE
body:
I wanted to take a moment to tell you just how important you are to me.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41746761/330155788/396464211?refcode=em-logo&refcode2=fc53f4a4-de8c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&contactdata=2Mm1/LdMDrfzcEbZolStzyIbP9338/o2nFXHTaSq1IhLGLoyW7s1ALp26ajQ0lVm&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzUzZjRhNC1kZThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZbdvCxoubFxURuGnFytFDurCIl0pVTs8ovoPibncxng=)
Friends -
I wanted to take a moment to tell you just how important you are to me.
When I think about the people I consider my most important supporters, I don’t think about the ones who make the largest donations to my campaign. I think about the ones who stood with me when I needed them the most.
I think about the people who were with me when I won my first election to the Maryland House of Delegates on the pro-Choice team and my first campaign for the U.S. House of Representatives to flip MD's 8th Congressional District blue.
I think about the people who helped me work to pass the Affordable Care Act, Wall Street Reform, and the Economic Recovery Act.
I think about the people who were with me in my first campaign for the U.S. Senate six years ago when we faced outside secret money.
And I think about the people who have been with me in this re-election campaign to keep this Senate seat blue, fight for our values and defend our democracy — as volunteers, supporters, and as small-dollar donors.
We’re in the thick of the campaign now, and before the attack ads start running against me, I need you with me one more time.
So I am asking:
**[Can you please make a $3 contribution to my re-election campaign today? Help us reach our fundraising goals for the month of February and we’re going to defend this seat from Mitch McConnell in November.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41746765/330155798/396464211?refcode=em220213-30&refcode2=fc53f4a4-de8c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&contactdata=2Mm1/LdMDrfzcEbZolStzyIbP9338/o2nFXHTaSq1IhLGLoyW7s1ALp26ajQ0lVm&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzUzZjRhNC1kZThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZbdvCxoubFxURuGnFytFDurCIl0pVTs8ovoPibncxng=)**
Nothing less than control of the Senate, and any chance at progress is at stake in this race.
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41746769/330155801/396464211?refcode=em220213-30&refcode2=fc53f4a4-de8c-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&contactdata=2Mm1/LdMDrfzcEbZolStzyIbP9338/o2nFXHTaSq1IhLGLoyW7s1ALp26ajQ0lVm&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzUzZjRhNC1kZThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZbdvCxoubFxURuGnFytFDurCIl0pVTs8ovoPibncxng=)**
Thank you in advance for standing with me. It means a lot.
Chris

PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE

name: Riley for Congress
subject: donations have slowed down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress
body:
Here are some important reminders for you this Sunday:

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41756362/330203969/-566240111?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220213-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGQ5ZWMwYi0wYzhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3xNQM9rjP-7RIFRnxIisSwn-JcSKU92cXt_GqNOKwtw=)
---
| Peter,

Here are some important reminders for you this Sunday:

_**IF**_ we’re going to keep building on the progress we’ve made as a country in the past year, we need to protect our Democratic House Majority.

_**IF**_ Democrats are going to hold our majority, we need to not just protect blue seats, but flip red seats like NY-22, too.

_**AND IF**_ Democrats want the best chance at flipping NY-22 this fall, we need to nominate Josh Riley — a proven leader who has taken on big fights in Washington and delivered for working families.

_**BUT**_ , our campaign’s donations have slowed down this week, and we need to pick up the pace before the middle of February to stay on track.

[_**That’s where you come in. Peter, Wednesday night marks our mid-month fundraising deadline, and we need your help to hit our $10,000 grassroots goal. subject: The timing is NOT GREAT
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Donald Trump told his supporters that beating Mark Kelly was just about the most important thing they could do in 2022.
#

[**Friends, our mid-month fundraising drive ends in TWO DAYS and we’re short of where we need to be in order to keep pace with our February fundraising goals. The timing is not great and Mark needs your help. Can you PLEASE make your first $3 contribution today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-feb22?refcode=em220213-1-15&t=1&refcode2=2112_6688874_xpl4fb&akid=2112%2E6688874%2Expl4fb)
What a campaign...
**FIRST:**
A Mitch McConnell-backed dark money group started spending millions of dollars to defeat Mark Kelly.
**THEN:**
Donald Trump told his supporters that beating Mark Kelly was just about the most important thing they could do in 2022.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-feb22?refcode=em220213-1-15&t=2&refcode2=2112_6688874_xpl4fb&akid=2112%2E6688874%2Expl4fb)

This mid-month fundraising drive is about to end and we’re short of our goals. And these goals are NOT arbitrary. They’re what we need to win. So please:

---
| "I'm so thankful for the support of Congressman Paul Gosar. He's one of the only true warriors for President Donald Trump that we have on Capitol Hill.
Congressman Gosar has voiced his strong support for my campaign and efforts to represent the 4th Congressional District of South Carolina in Washington, DC.
As a true America First Congressman, I will never sellout the patriots of Greenville and Spartanburg Counties to the globalist elites who care very little about Americans."
Pastor Mark Burns
---
|
---
|
---
| I hope every South Carolinian who can hear my voice today will join this campaign and help send me to Congress so that I can fight to **_restore law and order_** , **_secure our nation’s borders_** , **_protect our God given rights and liberties_** , **_preserve our Constitution_** , and **_continue to advocate for you and the America First Agenda!_**

---
|
# I BELIEVE:
* If we don't fix these elections NOW, America will be lost. Without open, honest, transparent elections, no other issue matters.

* If we don't fix these elections NOW, America will be lost

* Tyrannical Tech Oligarchs have taken over our constitutional republic, and they must be stopped.

* Life begins at conception.

* Marriage is defined as between one man and one woman.

* Our right to bear arms is INHERENT, given to us by God almighty -- NOT by any man.

* A big, beautiful wall should protect our Border.

* Our troops should protect America -- NOT foreign nations.

* The First Amendment is absolute: religious & political freedom are basic civil right, as it is the right to hold an opinion.

* Well funded police and the protection of the Rule of Law are imperative to civil society.

* Critical Race Theory is Communist, anti-white Racism.

* Vaccine and mask mandates are medical tyranny, and have no place in America.

* The Pelosi budget opens the door wide open to full-blown communism.

---
| [](https://sender14.zohoinsights.com/ck/2d6f.327230a/55596b80-8d26-11ec-af84-5254000e3179/280932dbb5323931ddd9d10878be28d43f56ad4f/1?e=SOjWGDoXFIiL4NdxiGLZkaXIREiXHzet4oopw6lmBTY%3D "http://markburns.org/donate")
---
| **Please Go to[MarkBurns.org](http://Markburns.org "http://Markburns.org") and sign up to volunteer for my campaign, make a contribution, and join me in the fight to Save America.**

---
|
---
|

**[President Obama just called on ALL of us to defend voting rights. Stand with him today and sign our MASSIVE Democratic petition>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/6074?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220213-BreakingNews-ObamaVROpEd-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220213-BreakingNews-ObamaVROpEd-Pros-sl1&akid=2947%2E9716520%2EESuvYh)**

This is urgent, team: President Obama is sounding the alarm on the dangers we face without **_immediate_** action to protect voting rights.

**He says the Republican attacks on voting are _“unlike anything we’ve seen in modern times”_** \-- and now they're threatening to unravel our democracy.

We've launched an emergency petition to stand with President Obama, but right now we’re not on track to hit our 100,000 signature goal and **your name is still missing!**

**[Please, President Obama needs ALL of us to stand up for our sacred constitutional rights. Add your name NOW to stand up for voting rights:](https://go.dscc.org/go/6074?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220213-BreakingNews-ObamaVROpEd-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220213-BreakingNews-ObamaVROpEd-Pros-sl1&akid=2947%2E9716520%2EESuvYh)**

name: Team Booker
subject: Which design do you like best, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, we have
some exciting news!

Our team has been working on releasing some new merch — but we need some
help deciding on our next sticker to launch. We have a couple of designs
and we want to hear from you about which one is your favorite.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/survey/help-us-choose-our-next-sticker/?source=em20220213&t=1001&akid=1565%2E346206%2E_H1K18 ]Check out the designs we’re deciding between and then click here to
vote on your favorite! Plus, as a member of our movement, you’ll get the
first opportunity to get your hands on the winning design.

Friend,

I could not wait a minute longer to send you this email.

While millions of Americans are realizing that Joe Biden and the radical Left have brought our nation to the brink of ruin, I am working day and night to SAVE OUR NATION.

Everything great I've ever done is because of loyal Patriots like YOU, which is why I am pleased to invite you to join my _**[Inner Friend Circle.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/59633557:W6dfkaHqN:m:1:2532013465:A3655CF43DFBA4292E015688E64C8543:r)**_

body:
This book is an essential must-read for any America First patriot who wants to understand Donald J. Trump’s successful four years as president.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3hnyf--fgxr-4qqlpo7&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

| | Want to FIRE Pelosi? **Text FIRE to 21818** to help House Republicans take back the House for the American People.
---
| | | Hey – last chance here. I sent you your last email from Congressman Jim Jordan. Did you miss it again?

Totally okay – **[I set aside one copy of his signed book just for you, Fellow Conservative!](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hnyf-1y2qz-4qqlpo8/ "I set aside one copy of his signed book just for you, Fellow Conservative!")**

We’re running low on stock with very few copies left. I’m afraid if you don’t claim yours by midnight tonight, you might not get a copy! Fellow Conservative, I’d hate to see that happen.

Please, make sure you claim your limited-edition SIGNED copy of Jim Jordan’s must-read book, _Do What You Said You Would Do._

Thanks again,
Sue

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Jim Jordan**
Date: January 23rd, 2022
Subject: FWD: FWD: Do What You Said You Would Do

Hey, it’s Sue.

Jim Jordan emailed you TWICE, and we still haven’t heard from you. Did you not see his email? If you missed it, that’s okay! I’ve gone ahead and forwarded his previous correspondence to you.

**[If you want your own SIGNED copy of his latest book, make sure you reserve yours NOW>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hnyf-1y2r0-4qqlpo5/ "If you want your own SIGNED copy of his latest book, make sure you reserve yours NOW>>>")**

---
| | | [REQUEST YOUR SIGNED COPY](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hnyf-1y2r1-4qqlpo6/ "REQUEST YOUR SIGNED COPY")
---

Thanks,
Sue

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Jim Jordan**
Date: January 22, 2022
Subject: FWD: Do What You Said You Would Do

*****URGENT MESSAGE FROM CONGRESSMAN JIM JORDAN*****
Fellow Conservative, this is really important. My team reached out to let me know that we’re in LOW SUPPLY of signed books. **[If you want your own signed copy of _Do What You Said You Would Do_ , you need to act NOW!](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hnyf-1y2r2-4qqlpo7/ "If you want your own signed copy of Do What You Said You Would Do, you need to act NOW!")**

---
| | | [REQUEST YOUR SIGNED COPY](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hnyf-1y2r3-4qqlpo8/ "REQUEST YOUR SIGNED COPY")
---

If you wait even FIVE minutes, we could be totally sold out. Please, don’t wait any longer. Make sure to reserve your copy IMMEDIATELY!

Thank you,

Jim Jordan

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Jim Jordan**
Date: January 21, 2022
Subject: Do What You Said You Would Do

Fellow Conservative, I signed a very limited number of copies of my new book, _Do What You Said You Would Do._

As an elite Conservative Patriot, I know you need to have one – so I set one aside for you until midnight tonight._As I said, there are an extremely limited number of signed copies and this is your only chance to grab one._

---
| | | [REQUEST YOUR SIGNED COPY](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hnyf-1y2r4-4qqlpo9/ "REQUEST YOUR SIGNED COPY")
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hnyf-1y2r5-4qqlpo0/)
---

**This book is an essential must-read for any America First patriot who wants to understand Donald J. Trump’s successful four years as president.**

President Trump showed us how to win. He said he was going to cut taxes, he did. He said he was going to reduce regulations, he did. Do what you told them you were going to do. That’s the model that works.

**[By ordering your copy now you will be receiving a great read and supporting critical efforts to take back our Conservative House Majority.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hnyf-1y2r6-4qqlpo1/ "By ordering your copy now you will be receiving a great read and supporting critical efforts to take back our Conservative House Majority. ")**

Pelosi’s targeting conservatives across America and she has more money than she knows what to do with. Pelosi will do everything in her power to make sure we FAIL, including dragging conservatives in ALL 50 states through the mud.

Taking back the House is the key to saving America. Without the House, our country will be lost forever to Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left.

**[So please don't pass up this opportunity to ensure Pelosi fails in her quest to retain the speaker's gavel AND get your hands on this LIMITED EDITION signed copy of my book! The copies I’ve signed won’t last long, so order yours immediately.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hnyf-1y2r7-4qqlpo2/ "So please don't pass up this opportunity to ensure Pelosi fails in her quest to retain the speaker's gavel AND get your hands on this LIMITED EDITION signed copy of my book! The copies I’ve signed won’t last long, so order yours immediately.")**

I stand with House Conservatives who fight for freedom in the swamp and do what they said they would do.

**[Do you?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hnyf-1y2r8-4qqlpo3/ "Do you?")**

Thank you,

Jim Jordan

---
| |
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hnyf-1y2r9-4qqlpo4/ "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hnyf-1y2ra-4qqlpo4/ "Can we count on you to step up?")**
---
| | | [DONATE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hnyf-1y2rb-4qqlpo5/ "Donate Button in Footer")
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

---

---

name: Washington Post Update via DASS
subject: Democrats in Ohio NEED to see this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
Team, did you see this chilling headline from the Washington Post?
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=email_021322_3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=email_021322_3]
Extremists around the country know how important elections officials are to preserving democracy. That’s why they’re pushing Trump loyalists to be installed on election boards across the country.
The consequences of this could be disastrous, as DASS chair Jena Griswold outlines: “the next time there’s a close election, it will be easier to achieve their goals.” [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=email_021322_3]
Their goals? Overturning elections in 2022 and 2024 that don’t go their way. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=email_021322_3]
The only defense against the far-right’s attacks on our democracy is electing and reelecting Democratic Secretaries of State across the country.
It’s time to supercharge our grassroots fundraising, retake momentum, and elect Democratic Secretaries of State in this year’s crucial elections. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=email_021322_3]
We only need 15 contributions from Ohio today to stay on track for Monday's mid-month goal – can we count on you to rush $20 ASAP to elect pro-voter Secretaries of State and stop Trump’s plan to overturn the next election? >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-feb22?amount=20&refcode=email_021322_3]

name: Tim Ryan
subject: When I was a kid…
body:
Derek,
When I was growing up, whether we were cooking Sunday dinner (pasta with homemade sauce, of course) or doing yard work, my mom would always tell us: many hands make light work.

We usually had a lot of hands to help us get by because that’s what community is about—everyone pitching in, doing their part, no matter how small, to get the job done.

That’s how I’ve legislated, raised my kids, and how I’m running this campaign. The Senate majority will come down to what happens here in Ohio, so we need many, many hands.

We’re counting on thousands of grassroots donors like you to help us flip this seat blue. Together, we can fight back against the dark-money attacks and overcome a mountain of GOP spending.

The truth is, if everyone reading this split a donation of just $25, we’d blow our $35,000 fundraising goal out of the water.

Derek, I’m counting on you to step up and join our grassroots army. We only have until midnight tonight to meet this goal and we still need to raise $9,754. Can you split a donation of $25 or more between my campaign and CommonGood before the clock runs out?

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_tr?refcode=20220213_CGVA_Ryan&amount=25]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_tr?refcode=20220213_CGVA_Ryan&amount=35]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_tr?refcode=20220213_CGVA_Ryan&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_tr?refcode=20220213_CGVA_Ryan&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_tr?refcode=20220213_CGVA_Ryan&amount=250]
Donate ANY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_tr?refcode=20220213_CGVA_Ryan]

Together, we will flip Ohio blue!

— Tim

Arlington, VA 22215

Friends --

I don't have to tell you that this is a pivotal time for our state, and the entire nation. There is so much work we have to do to win this election and defeat a Capitol Insurrectionist.

But it’s about more than just winning an election. What we decide in this next election could determine the outcome for our entire country.

The thing is, if we don’t win this race, Democrats will lose the House of Representatives. And if Republicans take control, all of the progress we’ve made could be ended.

Look, this election will really be a battle -- but the thing about battles is that they are not won alone. You are a critical part of this fight.

So I'd like to humbly ask you to do something today to help us win this race and defeat our Capitol Insurrectionist opponent.

Voter outreach isn’t cheap, which is why it’s super important that we reach our $20,000 goal. clean_body: | | = Friend, Valentine’s Day is tomorrow, and this year it’s kind of a big deal. Not only is it Haley and Rob’s first Valentine’s celebration as a married couple, BUT it’s also the last day of our mid-month deadline. We’ve been on the road traveling across the district connecting with new voters and previous constituents, and we need the resources to keep meeting folks where they are. Friends –

**WHO DEY!!!
WHO DEY!!!
WHO DEY think gonna beat them Bengals!!!**

I don’t know about you, but the Bengals’ huge comeback win to advance them to the Super Bowl has me incredibly **_INSPIRED AND EXCITED! For Ohio and beyond!_**

If the Bengals, a 7-point underdog, can comeback in the last 4 minutes of the AFC Championship, **then I can beat Josh Mandel and JD Vance in this race.**

**It is _COMEBACK HOUR_ for so many reasons – and if the Bengals aren’t enough proof of that, I don’t know what is. As a Cincinnati native, this win was huge.**

clean_body: it’s comeback hour. | Friends – WHO DEY!!! WHO DEY!!! WHO DEY think gonna beat them Bengals!!! I don’t know about you, but the Bengals’ huge comeback win to advance them to the Super Bowl has me incredibly INSPIRED AND EXCITED! For Ohio and beyond! If the Bengals, a 7-point underdog, can comeback in the last 4 minutes of the AFC Championship, then I can beat Josh Mandel and JD Vance in this race. It is COMEBACK HOUR for so many reasons – and if the Bengals aren’t enough proof of that, I don’t know what is. As a Cincinnati native, this win was huge. And we’re getting closer to the “last 4 minutes” of this game – the Ohio Senate Primary is in less than 100 days. And I’m about to prove everyone wrong. This year is the year for Conservatives, for Women, and for OHIO! I have never felt so energized and ready to win. | 2022 is the year of the TIGER. The year for the brave, competitive, confident, and unpredictable. Super Bowl LVI here we come. Ohio Senate Primary here I come. God Bless Ohio and Let’s Go Bengals! Jane Timken Paid for by Jane Timken for Ohio Jane Timken for Ohio 9856 Archer Ln, Dublin, OH 43017 If you would like to send donation by mail, Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

Fellow American,

At midnight, our campaign has an important fundraising deadline. Let me explain why it is so important we hit our fundraising goal:

1. I am running for Governor of Texas against a well-funded incumbent opponent. To overcome these advantages, my campaign is counting on the grassroots conservatives, like yourself, to make up the difference and build the momentum we need to win.
2. The Biden administration has opened our borders - allowing tens of thousands of illegals to pour into Texas. We must TAKE BACK control of our border.

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: What I learned from Grandpa Earl
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
I want to tell you a quick story about my grandpa Earl.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3hojm--fgxr-4qqlpo0&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|
| | | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hojm-1y2vf-4qqlpo6/)
---
I guess I come by disruption and shooting straight naturally. In the Pompeo family, I’ve often been compared to my grandfather, Earl Mercer. Grandpa Earl was pretty rough cut, and he always said what was on his mind.

He never won a “Mr. Congeniality” contest, but when the going got tough, you wanted Grandpa Earl around. In the 1940s, Grandpa Earl was the Sheriff of Mitchell County, Kansas. Population today: less than 6,500.

Us grandkids learned a lot from Grandpa Earl. He was regarded as a great sheriff because he knew who he was and never tried to be something else—and he knew who the people of Mitchell County were and what they expected—and he respected that.

We learned to always stay true to ourselves and move on down the road. Never give up. Never stop fighting.

We are in a battle right now for the future of our country. It might be easy to get discouraged watching the radical Left try to move our country in entirely the wrong direction. _But we can’t back down or give in. We have to stay in the fight and stand up for what is right._

That’s exactly what I am doing, and I want you to be among the first to know.

I have started an organization - Champion American Values PAC or CAVPAC. Through CAVPAC, I’m doing everything I can to elect more principled conservative leaders who won’t give an inch to the radical Left and who will always put America first.

**[I’m humbly asking you to join me in our efforts](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hojm-1y2vg-4qqlpo7/ "I’m humbly asking you to join me in our efforts")**. As a member of the CAVPAC Conservative Cavalry, you can join me on the frontlines in the battle for the future of our country. I’m going to continue traveling all across the country to support conservatives as we push to win back the House, the Senate, Governorships and races up and down the ballot.

I need your help if we are going to be successful. As a top grassroots leader, I’m hoping you will make a donation of $100, $50 or $25 to help us push back against the radical Left and champion American values. **[Chip in to become a member of the Conservative Cavalry before it’s too late>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hojm-1y2vh-4qqlpo8/ "Chip in to become a member of the Conservative Cavalry before it’s too late >>>")** I promise you that I will never stop fighting for our values, our freedoms, and our country. _Because Grandpa Earl taught me to keep my faith, to work hard and to never give an inch._

Fighting for our future,
[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hojm-1y2vi-4qqlpo9/)
Mike Pompeo

PS: **[Please join me as a member of the CAVPAC Conservative Cavalry in the next 24 hours](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3hojm-1y2vj-4qqlpo0/ " Please join me as a member of the CAVPAC Conservative Cavalry in the next 24 hours") **to help our organization send a clear message to the radical Left that we are a force to be reckoned with.
---
| |

I need your help if we are going to be successful. As a top grassroots leader, I’m hoping you will make a donation of $100, $50 or $25 to help us push back against the radical Left and champion American values. name: Cheri Beasley for Senate
subject: Today is the day to make a $3 donation to Cheri’s campaign.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
What if we told you that CNN says this is one of the “seats most likely to flip” this year?
#

Is there anything we can say to convince you to make a contribution to Cheri Beasley’s campaign today?
What if we told you that Club for Growth’s Super PAC has already spent $4.3 million trying to buy this seat, and Mitch McConnell’s dark money group just announced raising a record-breaking $94 million to spend to take back the Senate this year?
What if we told you that CNN says this is one of the “seats most likely to flip” this year, and if we lose, a right-wing Republican will use this seat to push radical legislation and rubber stamp corporate special interests’ agenda?
And what if we told you that Cheri is polling within a statistical tie with her Republican opponents, so no matter who she faces, this is going to be a VERY close race?
So, please. If you’ve been waiting for the right time to make a donation to Cheri Beasley’s campaign, today is the day.
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to Cheri’s campaign for U.S. Senate? We would not ask if it were not so important.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22?refcode=em220213-1-t1&refcode2=407.357359.61XMb4&t=1&akid=407%2E357359%2E61XMb4)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

clean_body: Let’s Go! | Did you know we are less than 100 days away from the North Carolina Senate Primary? Let THAT sink in. I can hardly believe we are this close. It has been an uphill battle, but we are more than ready to go through these next few days and all the way to the election in November. But, before I get ahead of myself, | I can't thank you enough for your continued support of my campaign and all the work I am going to do to help get North Carolina back on track. We’ve got less than 100 days; God Bless, Ted Budd | Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader running for Senate in North Carolina. He is the ONLY candidate who is endorsed by President Trump and the only candidate who will fight for the America First Agenda in Washington. subject: FWD: Biden's free crack pipes
body:

name: Donna Imam for Congress
subject: Let’s go! We’re ready for it.
body:
It starts tomorrow. Early voting is here in Texas. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41758138/330212565/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDk3MGVhOS0yMDhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JRehr71VQuoP-kqTlMDF8_SE0lSGR1xITBU0ub4ssyE=)
Friend, Thank you for supporting Donna Imam the way you have for months! Running for Congress is not easy for anyone. It’s even harder for grassroots candidates. The simple fact is we wouldn’t be here, heading into early voting this strong, if it wasn’t for thousands of amazing supporters like you. Early supporters and donors like you truly understand how important primary elections are and how they serve our democracy. In states like Texas where almost every race is gerrymandered to go a certain way, leadership will be decided by a small fraction of voters in the primary election which starts here in Texas tomorrow Feb. 14. **[Our staff is working around the clock to keep voters informed throughout the next two weeks of early voting. Friend, can you donate $5, $35 or $50 right now to help us over the finish line and land this win? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41758141/330212568/-780221392?amount=10&refcode=pl_20220213_01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDk3MGVhOS0yMDhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JRehr71VQuoP-kqTlMDF8_SE0lSGR1xITBU0ub4ssyE=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41758144/330212571/-780221392?amount=10&refcode=pl_20220213_01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDk3MGVhOS0yMDhkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JRehr71VQuoP-kqTlMDF8_SE0lSGR1xITBU0ub4ssyE=) When Donna ran in 2020 she inspired so many people! Our campaign got images from voters from all over the district, but this one stood out. Donna is working to get her message to working families in underserved communities and the results show it. That’s why she was able to get the highest voter turnout in the history of the district. This is how we win Texas and with your help we can get it done.

clean_body: It starts tomorrow. Early voting is here in Texas. | = Friend, Thank you for supporting Donna Imam the way you have for months! Running for Congress is not easy for anyone. It’s even harder for grassroots candidates. The simple fact is we wouldn’t be here, heading into early voting this strong, if it wasn’t for thousands of amazing supporters like you. Early supporters and donors like you truly understand how important primary elections are and how they serve our democracy. In states like Texas where almost every race is gerrymandered to go a certain way, leadership will be decided by a small fraction of voters in the primary election which starts here in Texas tomorrow Feb. 14. = = When Donna ran in 2020 she inspired so many people! Our campaign got images from voters from all over the district, but this one stood out. Donna is working to get her message to working families in underserved communities and the results show it. That’s why she was able to get the highest voter turnout in the history of the district. This is how we win Texas and with your help we can get it done. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately. | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = = Thank you for your support. Team Donna. | = Donna Imam is a computer engineer and Democrat running for US Congress in Austin, Texas. If you'd like to learn more, you can visit Donna's website Consider supporting Donna's campaign by = If you'd prefer to send a check, our address is: PO BOX 170305 Austin, TX 78717. Please make the check payable to Donna Imam for Congress. We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Donna Imam For Congress PO BOX 170305 Austin, TX 78717 United States

Friend, you’re probably getting a lot of fundraising emails in your inbox right now. **Let us explain why, if you donate to a campaign today, it should be Maggie Hassan’s.**
* Rachel Maddow is sounding the alarm, saying that we’ve got “a very tough reelection fight ahead.” And The Boston Globe says that Maggie Hassan is “the most vulnerable Democratic Senator.”

* New Hampshire's Senate race is the most competitive election in the country. Maggie won this seat by only 1,017 votes — one of the closest margins in U.S. history

* Mitch McConnell and far-right groups have spent more money attacking Maggie than any other Senate Democrat on the ballot in 2022 — over $7 million.

* **The GOP’s attacks are working: Recent polls are showing Maggie statistically tied with a far-right Trump-supporting Republican.**

But our campaign has fewer resources than other top Democrats, and right now, we’re not seeing the grassroots support we need to stand up to the relentless GOP attacks in New Hampshire.
Our mid-month deadline is right around the corner, and with polls tightening and outside spending ramping up, your contribution will make the biggest impact on our race.

name: Dr. Yadira Caraveo
subject: RE: What we’re up against
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41753691/330189251/355891186?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220213mm2goal_dyc_allop_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYThlNjFhNy1mYThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7QX09T1qCTNWx-REpig3lVJrYW4G3beUPcw9OUfvFB8=)
---
Hello, Peter — My team sent you an email the other day about the extreme right figures we’re up against. And look, the things these people say and do every day are genuinely scary. Anti-vax, anti-choice, anti-worker, anti-democracy... it feels like there’s no end to it. But I know that it’s not enough to just be _against_ these people. So before I ask you to [**chip in to our critical $15,000 end-of-month goal**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41753692/330189252/355891186?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220213mm2goal_dyc_allop_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYThlNjFhNy1mYThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7QX09T1qCTNWx-REpig3lVJrYW4G3beUPcw9OUfvFB8=), I want to tell you about the work I’ve done — and will do — for Coloradans. I’m running for Congress to build on my commitment to the families I see every day in Colorado’s 8th District: in my pediatrics practice, in the halls of the state capitol, and at community gatherings with neighbors, friends, and family. | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41753693/330189253/355891186?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220213mm2goal_dyc_allop_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYThlNjFhNy1mYThjLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7QX09T1qCTNWx-REpig3lVJrYW4G3beUPcw9OUfvFB8=)
---
As a practicing pediatrician, I’ve seen how badly our healthcare system needs reform. And I’ve used my unique perspective to pass bills in the state legislature that lower insurance costs and increase access to the quality care that so many families lack.
I was in high school when my mom became a U.S. citizen, and we voted together for the first time in the 2000 presidential elections (for Al Gore, of course). In my first legislative election, I saw voters bring their young children to translate for them at the polls — so as soon as I became the representative for HD-34, I championed legislation to increase voter turnout and access by expanding access to multilingual ballots.
In Congress, I will fight tirelessly to make underrepresented communities like my own a part of the civic process at a time when extremists are actively working to exclude us from making our voices heard.
**But there are only so many things I can do as a state legislator.** My parents taught me to always jump in to help without being asked, and when this seat was created, I knew I had to step up.

clean_body: | = Hello, Peter — My team sent you an email the other day about the extreme right figures we’re up against. And look, the things these people say and do every day are genuinely scary. Anti-vax, anti-choice, anti-worker, anti-democracy... it feels like there’s no end to it. But I know that it’s not enough to just be against these people. So before I ask you to =, I want to tell you about the work I’ve done — and will do — for Coloradans. I’m running for Congress to build on my commitment to the families I see every day in Colorado’s 8th District: in my pediatrics practice, in the halls of the state capitol, and at community gatherings with neighbors, friends, and family. | = As a practicing pediatrician, I’ve seen how badly our healthcare system needs reform. And I’ve used my unique perspective to pass bills in the state legislature that lower insurance costs and increase access to the quality care that so many families lack. I was in high school when my mom became a U.S. citizen, and we voted together for the first time in the 2000 presidential elections (for Al Gore, of course). In my first legislative election, I saw voters bring their young children to translate for them at the polls — so as soon as I became the representative for HD-34, I championed legislation to increase voter turnout and access by expanding access to multilingual ballots. In Congress, I will fight tirelessly to make underrepresented communities like my own a part of the civic process at a time when extremists are actively working to exclude us from making our voices heard. But there are only so many things I can do as a state legislator. My parents taught me to always jump in to help without being asked, and when this seat was created, I knew I had to step up. As you probably know by now, this election for CO-08 is going to be extremely tight, and we need to raise $15,000 by the end of the month to keep pace with everything the GOP throws at us.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you, Dr. Yadira Caraveo | Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. Her parents raised her and her siblings on her father’s construction worker’s salary in Adams County. In the legislature, Dr. Caraveo has delivered for working Coloradans by standing up to the biggest corporate bullies and entrenched special interests. Now, Dr. Caraveo is running for Congress to stand up for hard-working families she sees falling through the cracks. Dr. Caraveo would be the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress and the only physician in Colorado’s congressional delegation. = | = | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS Caraveo for Congress PO Box 953 Eastlake, CO 80614 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

subject: requesting your feedback, not your money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Do you think the Senate should take action to defend the USPS?
| | | | **INSTANT POLL FOR YOU:**

We're THRILLED.

The House just passed a HISTORIC bill to SAVE the United States Postal Service.

After four years of Donald Trump's attacks on this vital service, this bill will help bring stability back to one of our most critical institutions.

But now it needs to make it through the Senate - where it could face Republican OBSTRUCTION.

**With so much on the line we need to know ASAP: Do you think the Senate should take action to defend the USPS?**
---

name: Peter Welch
subject: An exciting update: House passes Postal Service Reform Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
This is critically important. And we all know why: the USPS is a mess, which has left our communities without reliable postal service for too long.
# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=104%2E61531%2E1YLGOa)
Hello,
We know reforming the postal service is important to you, so I wanted to take a moment to let you know what we were able to get done in the House this week. We passed the bipartisan Postal Service Reform Act, which will make long overdue changes to the USPS to improve its service and financial stability. The Senate will likely pass it in the coming weeks as well, sending it to President Biden to sign into law.
This is critically important. And we all know why: the USPS is a mess, which has left our communities without reliable postal service for too long. Our mail carriers and postal workers are working hard during a difficult time, but the USPS leadership has failed them, and us. And we know what this poor service means — seniors not getting the medication they need; workers not getting their hard earned paychecks; and families getting late charges on their bills because they didn’t receive the bill on time in the first place.
And that’s why it was crucial that we passed this bill in the House. It will require six-day delivery for both mail and packages. The bill finally rids the USPS of their burdensome obligation to pre-fund retiree health benefits, which no other federal or private entity needs to do. This provision alone saves the USPS $27 billion over the next decade. These changes will bring better service to our communities and put the postal service in its strongest financial position in years.
This means Vermont businesses will have reliable mail service to succeed, our seniors and most vulnerable will get their prescriptions and checks when they are supposed to, and our rural newspapers will get delivered to your doorstep on time.
**We have been working for years to pass this bill and because of you and your support, we were able to get it done for Vermont and the country.**
While there’s more work to be done, this is a long overdue step in the right direction to get the USPS back on track — and we couldn’t have done it without the collective action from this team. Thank you for stepping up and making your voice heard. It made a difference.
Thanks,
Peter

Hello,
I urgently need your help.
**If we defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue, Democrats are guaranteed to hold onto our fragile majority in the Senate.** But after a poll from the Des Moines Register showed just 27% of Iowa voters want to re-elect Chuck Grassley, Big Pharma, Wall Street, and the NRA made huge corporate PAC donations to Grassley’s campaign.
With Trump already coming to Iowa to endorse and campaign for Grassley, we cannot afford to miss a single fundraising goal. **But I need your help: With just 48 hours until our most critical mid-month deadline yet, we’re still $29,434 short of our $200,000 goal.**
If we miss this goal, we could lose our only chance of defeating Grassley and turning Iowa blue – and with it, our Democratic Senate majority. There’s simply too much at stake for us to fall even one dollar short right now, so I’m asking for your immediate grassroots support:
[**Time is running out, and I have nowhere else to turn: Please, before our critical mid-month deadline, will you rush a donation for $5 or more right now to help me defeat Chuck Grassley? clean_body: Hello, I urgently need your help. If we defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue, Democrats are guaranteed to hold onto our fragile majority in the Senate. But after a poll from the Des Moines Register showed just 27% of Iowa voters want to re-elect Chuck Grassley, Big Pharma, Wall Street, and the NRA made huge corporate PAC donations to Grassley’s campaign. With Trump already coming to Iowa to endorse and campaign for Grassley, we cannot afford to miss a single fundraising goal. But I need your help: With just 48 hours until our most critical mid-month deadline yet, we’re still $29,434 short of our $200,000 goal. If we miss this goal, we could lose our only chance of defeating Grassley and turning Iowa blue – and with it, our Democratic Senate majority. There’s simply too much at stake for us to fall even one dollar short right now, so I’m asking for your immediate grassroots support: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = I’m not taking a dime from corporate PACs, but that means I’m counting entirely on grassroots donors like you to fund our people-powered campaign. body:
We can defeat Marco Rubio, but I need you with me to win.
| | |
---
Friend, this is urgent: **Florida could determine Senate control, but I'm still falling short of my critical mid-month goal. ****Here's what I saw when my team pulled your supporter record:**
| | **SUPPORTER RECORD**
---
**EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com**
**DONATION STATUS: PENDING**
**SUGGESTED CONTRIBUTION: $5
DEADLINE: 11:59 p.m.**
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41759327/330219374/1948590133?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1634-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTlkYTBiZS0yOThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gvlJ_f3D8kf1KnrL15Uk9HATF1DUTS6qIKBgmt9iSuk=)
---
Mitch McConnell and GOP outside groups are ready to dump MILLIONS into Marco Rubio's war chest. With experts predicting this could be the most expensive Senate race _ever_ , missing this goal is NOT an option.

name: James Carville Alert
subject: Moments like this can make or break a campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Listen up, friend!
| | |
---
**Listen up, friend!**
Congresswoman Val Demings is down 2 points in her race to defeat Marco Rubio. It's one of the hottest Senate races in the country – and I have zero doubt in my mind that Val Demings can win this. But she can ONLY win if activists like YOU dig deep and support her every step of the way.
So here's what I'm dropping in to tell you: Flipping Florida blue can decide our Democratic Senate majority. And CNN is calling Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip in November – but Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12% (that's only 10,033 votes).
That's why moments like this can make or break a campaign. That's especially true when she's up against a right-wing incumbent like Marco Rubio, who is already sitting on a multimillion-dollar war chest and has the full GOP establishment behind him. **So I committed to helping Val Demings raise $10,000 before her upcoming midnight deadline, and I'm counting on your contribution to get us there, friend: **
**[Will you rush $5 or more now to help Val Demings defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41759359/330220030/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2409-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTlkYTBiZS0yOThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vt-5jIecjgfZ6TJcVpqqL6f_fkPpRnGHkjOicRsSo4g=)**
From the White House to the campaign trail, I've seen it all. More than most. I've seen what it takes to win, and I've seen what happens when campaigns fail to muster enough grassroots momentum. I'm told Val Demings has one of the strongest grassroots teams in Democratic politics – and trust me, I was relieved to hear it.
Because you know what we're up against, friend? Marco Rubio's campaign war chest. Mitch McConnell's super PAC that can spend near limitless sums of money. And you'd better believe Donald Trump – who has made Florida the de facto HQ for the GOP – will rally his base and spend millions to protect his crony, Rubio.
That's why we need Val Demings. She's gone toe-to-toe with some of the most extreme Republicans. She impeached Donald Trump and prosecuted him in the Senate. She's a fighter for Floridians, and she has everything it takes to win. Best of all, there's momentum behind her in this race. **But a fundraising shortfall will put her dangerously behind where she needs to be.**
**So if you truly want Val Demings in the Senate, if you truly want to flip Florida blue and oust Marco Rubio, then I need you to give, because she can't cede any ground:[Make a contribution of $5 or more now – every dollar you can spare before the midnight deadline tonight – to elect Val Demings and expand Democrats' Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41759361/330220032/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2409-fr-nd-v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTlkYTBiZS0yOThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vt-5jIecjgfZ6TJcVpqqL6f_fkPpRnGHkjOicRsSo4g=)**

James Carville

Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement _and_ keep Florida red _permanently_. It's one of the hottest Senate races in the country – and I have zero doubt in my mind that Val Demings can win this. But she can ONLY win if activists like YOU dig deep and support her every step of the way. So here's what I'm dropping in to tell you: Flipping Florida blue can decide our Democratic Senate majority. And CNN is calling Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip in November – but Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12% (that's only 10,033 votes). That's why moments like this can make or break a campaign. That's especially true when she's up against a right-wing incumbent like Marco Rubio, who is already sitting on a multimillion-dollar war chest and has the full GOP establishment behind him. So I committed to helping Val Demings raise $10,000 before her upcoming midnight deadline, and I'm counting on your contribution to get us there, friend: = From the White House to the campaign trail, I've seen it all. And you'd better believe Donald Trump – who has made Florida the de facto HQ for the GOP – will rally his base and spend millions to protect his crony, Rubio. That's why we need Val Demings. We hate to see you go, but [you can unsubscribe here](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=271cab2316f34846ba24f8aa2c674c2f&_t=X0T_anfCkYhMTirf0tfe-ZyP9GzmZxJ5vxzhPruLSP0UP-cwo0oecUcNeLD5efid2urjPLLYW3LPIeCnVE_lSEjwy1X25ZRMTYaGPS2Y3lmiyKpRwK10RYQ2lE1OGtq-K-uMds5x-uxWRXKeQnWfbR5NlTxisGzdEXUArFZH6m8%3D).
clean_body: I am back in Washington this week and I am thinking about how Congress cannot seem to get ANYTHING done. | No longer want to receive emails from Timmons for Congress? You may . Fellow American, 2022 is flying by - and there is still so much that needs to be accomplished. I am back in Washington this week and I am thinking about how Congress cannot seem to get ANYTHING done. Whether it is because of the gridlock Democrats have created in Congress or the sheer nature of politics, I cannot help but feel the American people are paying the price. So, I am coming to you today, Fellow American - - WEIGH IN - As a nation, we cannot afford to have this year be as unproductive as the last. Under Biden and Pelosi, the House wasted trillions of taxpayer dollars and time. With the information you provide, I will be able to put pressure on the do-nothing Democrats to get back to work on the problems that you care most about. Respectfully, William Timmons - WEIGH IN - | ABOUT WILLIAM TIMMONS * William Timmons is a conservative reformer with a small business background committed to finding solutions to everyday problems. He is honored to represent South Carolina’s 4th Congressional District in the United States Congress, where he has been fighting for our Upstate conservative values since 2019. | Paid for by William Timmons for Congress

name: Melanie D'Arrigo
subject: Here’s your chance to be super judgemental— and we can both win a prize.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Melanie Darrigo
body:
| | | Hi Friend –
I’m joining Blue America and some of their other powerhouse progressive candidates to bring together two of my passions: music and fighting for progressive change.
Here’s how you can help and possibly **win an autographed copy of Bill Kopp’s new book,_Disturbing The Peace-- 415 Records And The Rise Of New Wave_ , along with a companion CD, _415 Records-- Still Disturbing The Peace_.**
As you know, my campaign is endorsed by **Blue America PAC** , an organization which supports a strong and activated progressive movement which serves the needs of ordinary American families, not the 1%, not corporate special interests and not careerist political hacks and their lobbyist buddies.
Blue America is run by Howie Klein, a former record executive and music promoter, so I didn’t think twice when he asked me to send along my favorite band for a friendly competition.
All you have to do is donate any amount to whichever candidate has the best musical taste – which, in my own humble opinion, mine is the best!
**[Check out everyone’s top musician or band and then donate to enter an exciting drawing!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zpHeu5tLv-nEVXB8iBlfPWOZ3F9Yv1xIXqoPniV-vHw_IPWtvIihsyAE8VSzWkMMcApHUrWsRlLNXla1z6FESCVNFjm2tm1mNFliN_vo4dveCIK0_YrEgXEbwWYw8IOEXg7zMXLfjVqFQxFfq_WfIKft6BBeTnE68F-eKFNSobTc19UM7caeitDBB7neZt0Jx_NSzPSuOuT3R52_sBh5CCWLJSsXBlNGjE-nl1XqH5OJeh9fLELgM1ZMqnrRS8L3mxexCKRmH5ofcZJyi7N6g4jvtTNXiVeVkIkpGYFsleoAIhxlqBiJgx52U3CZ9jRv8OAmbb61QqsPapqovVQZhj/3jj/qMQwu8xTTV2ZktTxFHs78A/h0/HwAVGEYxwLD9uOJCpJN6XZgXFKFS8hFWe4vMkzbv63I)**
Not only can you win a prize, but the candidate who gets the most contributions will get a $1,000 check from Blue America PAC for their campaign!
That’s a big check on the line, and when you’re running a grassroots campaign like mine, every dollar counts – so let me at least _attempt_ to persuade you as to why my favorite band deserves your vote.
**While it’s impossible to pick just one band, I had to go with _The Smashing Pumpkins_. **
There is no backstory and no heartfelt reason why. But, when “Bullet With Butterfly Wings,” would come on the radio— I blasted it. Every. Single. Time.
**[Enter to win by judging everyone’s top musician or band and then donating to the candidate with the best musical taste!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zpHeu5tLv-nEVXB8iBlfPWWbrOyVsonFVvbru1eVDB9urnDFDzYhDg2tsOzTiOaEzvx6ssWTrp_3oiRqhIvuPgefYVQPdOfG7PWezKuNHvZeEHdpJaDjNHCYTRb_l61SDjFTMxnM8uoLLS_1DHdEBEcWBddyoPBuAX5QCMb5TtXo3i3xmOTh9HfkWUSm_d_NIiVfpOtV3y6wYSwCDF1kxTP-1YbrbfZWOQS-mrIvgiGvnx59FyT7urv4u-QmYDKsoNsaBXFtZylqXxSgXDeapkyPyqjnuebxUCCVxe1hYfhTyNFBuI79lYhCVC3tEPg7SJVoSlwjDxvNNnaNbJ7eeA/3jj/qMQwu8xTTV2ZktTxFHs78A/h1/OU_9G8SjL3c8j3JjW9J5F6VxCqI4M1EhT_iL84FDOlA)**
The contest ends Monday at noon, February 14.
Thanks for listening!
– Melanie

name: Team Barletta
subject: Team Barletta Campaign Update
body: | | | | Updates from the trail --- --- Peter Willis, Since we last spoke, Lou has continued to campaign at a furious pace across the Commonwealth. Lou hit 9 counties in the last 11 days alone: Columbia, Franklin, Philadelphia, Schuylkill, Lancaster, Cumberland, Dauphin, Northumberland, and Centre. No one is working the grassroots like Lou is and the feedback on the ground has been really encouraging. The momentum continues to grow and the latest public polling shows Lou as the clear front runner in the race. We're not slowing down and we will continue to outwork everyone else on the ground as our grassroots movement continues to grow. Stay tuned because we're just getting started. --- _**LOU IN THE NEWS**_ **Breitbart:**[_Poll: Republican Lou Barletta Leads Primary Field in Pennsylvania Governor’s Race_](https://u21878114.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=QtzNBLELhLe7xI3pbs-2B5EnKcAApQjx7ArArlMXNI0788SWeUREFVkdpbFlbqlee7XznBiWCrEUHdTaS5xNvQaMpu7ZfD5oayKNn7bKffgOnHB6STrn-2B9k9iiQr2-2B-2BlT3482339X-2FaShgU1YBNBBEHrttYB0m36iW-2F50X96rVUXjun7M92lCclqH7wK5uQnWtQq6z_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz65Wf5gtAKqI6vJzpzf7b0oKlY761HdcMkzRkDzSFm-2BuwgoL0MtT42lQZhwYpEiRsFNqD67XU99zAspEyCQOXX8URNsnZZR1E4136uwEF-2BqagWmpTZHPududywTXB7Vu6tJsrnh-2B5oJPeI2JI7lJI1DdoiscS-2Bc4r1WEvgHKDo88tCL9YKz-2B8nPq2Ii6GfcH2DlZVbym0w8glm1QLRWcutQBY5AF9R-2FBm2tiZzRY5grv7i1t5X9J4rjio3lbSsh-2F6QGdfJ3QzhZFeIadfIU4iRH-2FwYvN0YqVpkdjlDI7jE0mtFXtTOXiPFbkz6vJaIonwOuxfSV-2BqcfYkV7in10OT54j2tw3fNmkQJaov75KefmwlVX-2FqoZ7-2Fq8XM4Hew56iR87cAm37GlCWg7fV2j606InbkAiJjwOOMarX9JkCFzfqDXAQMck7ZMac-2FYwZiFI7ustQo6cV9qoccXu5e5cbG0Z-2BPa9bfnK9fNkUUgD-2FboZad5basFcoxZ3B9b65P0MoBkjDAXQUnOL2-2BRX95xBUmq8rw7jYzwQ4EPECNcbMR7OsDPgxWDsVMoEEFKPB9M2FU8DitzIhzkHz75Lv96ba0GnjR29dkgeSMCBIsPCxdn5kTnBmWrSigtKTI9G0nSBUpkJ5UdcpnF-2BkwuKxySyBSbB0MaruelsppEkqKNQ2Xq-2BRdHoLaaPhTmdHW3HZhTB6IE3yeKEuOwBSbdu6mrHbvDHeA4jcJXeCFDhKzgHmYQN7LVuPg-2BjhbmsIWiWP3H9QEKHoXh8PSCah0fC0O7UBeurRRuVEqKYUeMjV9PuKi74yVMdaegEPS-2F3SBLtNCxEFDwSrMbj-2FPpiNhu3rmQ7rH9zw-3D-3D) **Philadelphia Inquirer:**[ ]( " ")[Lou Barletta is the best-known GOP candidate for Pa. governor. clean_body: | | | | Updates from the trail Peter Willis, Since we last spoke, Lou has continued to campaign at a furious pace across the Commonwealth. Lou hit 9 counties in the last 11 days alone: Columbia, Franklin, Philadelphia, Schuylkill, Lancaster, Cumberland, Dauphin, Northumberland, and Centre. No one is working the grassroots like Lou is and the feedback on the ground has been really encouraging. The momentum continues to grow and the latest public polling shows Lou as the clear front runner in the race. We're not slowing down and we will continue to outwork everyone else on the ground as our grassroots movement continues to grow. Stay tuned because we're just getting started. LOU IN THE NEWS Breitbart: Philadelphia Inquirer: " " Daily Wire: Standard Speaker: " Morning News") CNN:** Barletta Campaign: " " Barletta Campaign: " " HIGHLIGHTS FROM THE TRAIL Lou Barletta is in his element! One simply does not stop in State College without stopping for ice cream at Penn State Creamery! Great flavor, solid consistency, appropropriate chocolate chip to ice cream ratio. 9.7/10 would order again. Lou had a great time in Chambersburg! While Franklin County may not typically get a lot of attention by statewide candidates, Lou has demonstrated that he is not your typical candidate. This marked Lou's 4th event in Franklin County. A man of the people! No stop in Schuylkill Co. is complete without a stop at Padora’s Italian Bakery! Even got to pick up some Barletta bread! Great day at the Great American Outdoor Show with freedom-loving patriots! Given Josh Shapiro's all out assault on our 2nd Amendment, we're willing to bet he would've received a much different response than Lou... Lou enjoyed talking election integrity and illegal immigration in Mechanicsburg at the FreePA grassroots meeting! Lou and Mary Grace had a blast with the grassroots at the Right Minded Women meeting in Dillsburg! The majority of these women are moms & they are FED UP with all the crazy indoctrination going on in our schools. Hang in there, moms- this all changes when Lou is governor! Mary Grace joined Team Barletta grassroots supporters to cheer on Lou at the PAGOP Gubernatorial Forum in Lancaster! Turns out when you run a strong grassroots campaign and you're not beholden to the Harrisburg insiders and lobbyists, it resonates with people. Team Barletta is grateful for the thousands of regular everyday Pennsylvanians who have stepped up to help Lou spread his message to voters. In 2022, change is finally coming to Harrisburg and, with your continued support, we will finally return our government to We The People! HELP LOU RESTORE COMMON SENSE TO THE COMMONWEALTH Chip in $25, $50, or $100 TODAY to help Lou win!** SHOW YOUR SUPPORT & CHECK OUT LOU'S ONLINE CAMPAIGN STORE! For Liberty, Team Barletta | | | | ==

name: Chris Evans, Beto for Texas
subject: Writing you from the truck
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We're so close to our $100,000 goal that your donation could be the one that puts us over the edge.
#
Hey, Chris here.
You might recognize my name, I've been by Beto's side since our historic run for Senate in 2018. When I found out that Beto was getting in the race to defeat Greg Abbott, I wanted to do everything I could to help elect him as Texas' next Governor.
I've been on the road with Beto for the past nine days as he’s driven over 2,000 miles as part of our statewide Drive for a Brighter Texas. **We have just one more stop on the drive, a rally in Houston, and we need the funds to finish strong.** We're currently 8% short of our $100,000 goal, so I have to ask:
[Will you chip in $3 or more _right now_ to fill up Beto's gas tank and get us to Houston? Your contribution will help us reach thousands of voters and spread our positive message across the state.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52850?refcode=ema20220213-176079&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=176079%2E444211%2El-2bE0)
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52850?refcode=ema20220213-176079&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=176079%2E444211%2El-2bE0)
We've been to so many towns and cities that I can barely keep count, but one thing is clear: **momentum is really building all across the state.**
Beto has a big, bold, inclusive vision for a brighter Texas where we create good jobs, fully fund schools, ensure more Texans can see a doctor, and keep the lights on because we finally fix the power grid.
The energy on the road is infectious. Texans understand that while Greg Abbott looks out for his corporate donors, Beto is looking out for the people of Texas.
**Together, we will elect Beto and defeat Abbott — but that work starts with making sure we have the resources to close out this statewide drive. After all the miles Beto has driven for us, we can't let him down by falling short.**
[Will you make a donation to keep us on the road? We're so close to our $100,000 goal that your donation could literally be the one that puts us over the edge.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52850?refcode=ema20220213-176079&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=176079%2E444211%2El-2bE0)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52850?refcode=ema20220213-176079&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=176079%2E444211%2El-2bE0)**
Talk soon,
Chris Evans
Communications Director, Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220213-176079-footer&t=23&refcode2=176079_444211_l-2bE0&akid=176079%2E444211%2El-2bE0)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=24&akid=176079%2E444211%2El-2bE0)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=176079%2E444211%2El-2bE0)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: Max Steiner via, MaxSteinerForCongress.com
subject: I just earned the endorsement of the California Democratic Party.
body:
Party delegates in my community voted for my campaign by an overwhelming 82%. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41755278/330196683/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTdkOWY5MS0wNThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O0mMlsy866p_bD35jUtIrB_ikGSz9uLfxrY2Tae9sN8=)
Big news, friend.

**Yesterday, I earned the endorsement of the California Democratic Party. Party delegates in our community voted for my campaign by an overwhelming 82%.**

This is a huge deal, and it's a testament to the grassroots strength we are building. I'd like to send a huge thank you to the delegates who voted for us. Step one has always been consolidating Democratic support ahead of the June primary, and it's clear that local Democrats believe in our campaign, and see us as our best shot at unseating Doug LaMalfa.

While I’m very proud to have this endorsement, this campaign was never just about one political party. It's about unifying our North State community and running an issues-focused campaign centered on the needs of the people. I look forward to earning the votes of Democrats, Independents, and pro-democracy Republicans in this race.

Since launching, we have outraised and outworked Doug LaMalfa, and this endorsement sends a message that we are ready for bold, forward-thinking leadership in California's 1st District, but we can't stop pushing:

**[Now that I have earned the endorsement of the California Democratic Party, I'm asking you to help us keep the momentum going by chipping in a donation of $3 today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41755279/330196684/360059203?refcode=em-2.13.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTdkOWY5MS0wNThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O0mMlsy866p_bD35jUtIrB_ikGSz9uLfxrY2Tae9sN8=)**

Thank you, and enjoy the rest of your weekend.

Max Steiner
Combat Veteran and Democrat for Congress

| **[Donate »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41755280/330196685/360059203?refcode=em-2.13.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTdkOWY5MS0wNThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O0mMlsy866p_bD35jUtIrB_ikGSz9uLfxrY2Tae9sN8=)**

| **This past Saturday was the GRAND OPENING of our campaign headquarters.** It was a HUGE success thanks to all of YOU! Thank you to everyone who came out to support.

If you missed this grand opening, stop by our **"Coffee With The Candidate"** this Friday, February 18th.

*Stop by at any time
*Bring a friend to meet Juan
*Sign Juan's petition, grab a yard sign or drop off a financial contribution

_**For details and to RSVP, email[info@juanciscomani.com](mailto:info@juanciscomani.com?subject=2%2F18%20Coffee%20With%20The%20Candidate&body=Hey!%20I%20would%20love%20to%20stop%20by%20on%20Friday%202%2F18%20to%20see%20the%20office%20and%20say%20hi%20to%20Juan.%20Can%20you%20share%20additional%20details%3F).**_

---
| **To qualify for the ballot this fall, candidates must collect signatures from registered voters who live in Arizona's new 6th congressional district.

_These are due in just a few weeks!_**

**Show your support and sign Juan's petition ONLINE here: **[https://apps.azsos.gov/apps/election/eps/op/](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=dcdfbd31b2&e=659fba240e)

You can also stop by our office to sign a paper petition! Please share with your family & friends who also live in the district. _**Unsure if you're in Juan's congressional district - AZ 06?**_ Use the address lookup site [HERE](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=77e2f0cd2c&e=659fba240e).

**THANK YOU!!**

Team, I know my fellow AZ Dems have said it before, but I want to reiterate – **Arizona is the top battleground state of 2022.**

That’s why AZ Dems launched Project 15/30 last summer. _We know we will have to fight for and organize every single vote in 2022 in order to win._ Because we launched our organizing efforts early, we’re deeper into our organizing than we have ever been before in Arizona.

Because we have half a year head start, **we’ve launched Native phonebanks this month to boost voter registration and win votes.** We want to make sure Native voices are heard this November!

**[Team, this is important work Project 15/30 is doing. Our support has been amazing so far, but we can do more if we had the resources. Will you donate $10 today so Project 15/30 continues to win votes in all 15 counties of Arizona?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xREDgFjqO2QgHk_ylyja5aXeqgbqUYkEzj0WpzQU-jQoxiizvsneCttEFU4fvpCVGFggB0Xp4IU60PB8JvPHwWEDiTL2w1Y2ws-tdtsId4oqPLKLPgRzMLZ7J-QvNDP6gOGQ-9R3EbvqYnV_hSMrzb7Sc_LvrNoLAbQA3mr9uL0zRO2Hi9zOkQq7fP1-b_76BxYF5jUudtdIEmxp1IkhyqrT4Zpu_boILaHgyYRoeJWGQI4dmm7IjH6T5OaW5FiUyVdDHJsr8QnDGKa80mx5sLSgHuUg4Q3rotAt3vhbhVwWe5ZDVxjoP8_odPpee0lJUCO9KO-jf_vYlQpG0ei-JqYi8DQHdMHtd9hzv8ZSUUgE-2EXYJyQiUPbXZqkqp8tS8P2ymxjklTXzK5SCyQuhcVfCopoYowKEl1GTkWj1fxAxZYCzyZOo2fTtmWr8UKTKSANSar9VIg6abh-See93W/3jj/2nMTea7STn-Q_UmSuCJU5A/h3/HpIKqqhcTtJhJLZUnF8K3yR38Nv_CGl3dbrqizVZGmE)** [

I also wanted to let you know about a new organizing program we recently launched. As part of our work organizing along southern Arizona and rural communities, we’ve launched an organizing apprenticeship program, specifically in the city of Douglas and Graham and Greenlee Counties.

Through that program, we’re building local organizing capacity and power. _This type of organizing in February is practically unheard of!_

**[Team, your support has carried us a long way in getting Project 15/30 up and going. But in order to expand, we’re going to need more resources. clean_body: | | | Project 15/30 is making a difference | | | Team, I know my fellow AZ Dems have said it before, but I want to reiterate – Arizona is the top battleground state of 2022. That’s why AZ Dems launched Project 15/30 last summer. We know we will have to fight for and organize every single vote in 2022 in order to win. Because we launched our organizing efforts early, we’re deeper into our organizing than we have ever been before in Arizona. Because we have half a year head start, we’ve launched Native phonebanks this month to boost voter registration and win votes. We want to make sure Native voices are heard this November! I also wanted to let you know about a new organizing program we recently launched. As part of our work organizing along southern Arizona and rural communities, we’ve launched an organizing apprenticeship program, specifically in the city of Douglas and Graham and Greenlee Counties. Through that program, we’re building local organizing capacity and power. This type of organizing in February is practically unheard of! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Sincerely, Ashley Brennan Project 15/30 AZ Dems For up-to-date COVID-19 information and guidance, visit Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . subject: My opponent’s Hollywood connections

body:
It’s clear we’re only beginning to see the impact Hollywood is going to have on this critical Senate race. It's clear we're only beginning to see the impact Hollywood is going to have on this critical Senate race. |
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a881a063c7294357869de035c2270f83&_e=dnEw0jcm4VM042Qdf_k3lr03YOYpbMFvWnIkmr0kwLQ9GA7611WGltwJ73IdubrSQ8v9laccrsJ4fhMAkgEBzvrZ9saj3MS8rmtdAmyn3sKZJN8u49lJvjx3U8Q6F0yM7kJ3vzNphYLFVzNLxU3BF99nd-5VEKuQHvK3Uicy18B7OlCXEvCrxo1YB6Waz8dZao4C7dImCEVXE-9ZaQ66i1v6vpJ7lSQKh4sI4vf8hsgx0sotUo8g0mK45KqozzOMzuJu6HbCUPf3KsRR5FUYZn9xf3Y6d0jMSgBOmZcJq0ZGSo808Xb_7rcPsZuexdCFS9zqpuUIR3cbFs2hJ1eazHPXouCX3bU0JlN0plhsoCFtSKjX-LI2Yt43hclUolEiy_PbfUMqvZnyuLQgEkEIKGtan9GbRN8F6m-yMPVRkj_B9Zdh_EkC3E4pJq2ulEkifQwu-MSxZDk_OU0CeKh-x_5AJ9rEpUcZtoosR4dOVPo%3D)

---
Fellow American,

We knew it was coming. According to a new report, now there's proof:

| "**Hollywood's famous faces are pouring money into key 2022 Senate races, aiming to give a star-studded boost to Democrats** fighting to hold on to their razor-thin majority in the midterm elections. For many celebrity donors, **the spotlight is on Sen. Raphael Warnock's (D-Ga.) campaign.** " _- The Hill, 2/9/2022_
---

Many of Hollywood's top celebrity activists are funneling thousands of dollars each into the campaign account of our opponent.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a881a063c7294357869de035c2270f83&_e=dnEw0jcm4VM042Qdf_k3lr03YOYpbMFvWnIkmr0kwLQ9GA7611WGltwJ73IdubrSQ8v9laccrsJ4fhMAkgEBzvrZ9saj3MS8rmtdAmyn3sKZJN8u49lJvjx3U8Q6F0yM7kJ3vzNphYLFVzNLxU3BF99nd-5VEKuQHvK3Uicy18B7OlCXEvCrxo1YB6Waz8dZao4C7dImCEVXE-9ZaQ66i1v6vpJ7lSQKh4sI4vf8hsgx0sotUo8g0mK45KqozzOMzuJu6HbCUPf3KsRR5FUYZh3_Mnk5rWwcODDu2MedPNy4xyV4qMtFiYEtCGjGv7En6ua1mgGKXOGBZGv9BWsdxgn0ZKZfG-mq20OkToNaSgmWQI-Fp1C3f_zL4QA0hPHOdGn4e2kyzc_ZW3KDBEm96d1Y-ZR1RF8xVlx4P8bLC9MIurhLWJxEWbhEgsIy9Q1IPFREFbFMK1Joi7tKm2BBWvpnBVZbT_q_jsdIxjKgPqg%3D)
**It's clear we're only beginning to see the impact Hollywood is going to have on this critical Senate race.** More deep-pocketed Hollywood celebrities are going to send max-out contributions with the intent of keeping their favorite Democrat in the Senate.

**_[Here is our ask of you today: will you chip in $7 today to help us offset Hollywood's support of our opponent?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a881a063c7294357869de035c2270f83&_e=dnEw0jcm4VM042Qdf_k3lr03YOYpbMFvWnIkmr0kwLQ9GA7611WGltwJ73IdubrSQ8v9laccrsJ4fhMAkgEBzvrZ9saj3MS8rmtdAmyn3sKZJN8u49lJvjx3U8Q6F0yM7kJ3vzNphYLFVzNLxU3BF99nd-5VEKuQHvK3Uicy18B7OlCXEvCrxo1YB6Waz8dZao4C7dImCEVXE-9ZaQ66i1v6vpJ7lSQKh4sI4vf8hsgx0sotUo8g0mK45KqozzOMzuJu6HbCUPf3KsRR5FUYZrt3zSC4a0u9mI6kbYlfezSf-E4f6kZk6mck-ig5lQj5rglkDQ4m4avWPvpZRNfym3O_aSRgteLT0aVEWSBRzCBFR9XhPwnLQ1nGRc_FEsetxKS7lUctD68-WeUDFB9WG_-dvI__rA-P-jdHU4em5xZofjbtNp_5-4yomCusTP00qid38CsT-fZykcxsIfIqMgvEemheSz0ZB6I302KK1LM%3D)_**

**We've set a goal of raising an additional $35,000 before midnight tonight and could use your help.**

That may sound like an arbitrary number, but it's the amount of money we need to be raising - DAILY - to run the most competitive campaign possible.

[** SEND A MESSAGE TO HOLLYWOOD
DONATE $7 TODAY -> **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a881a063c7294357869de035c2270f83&_e=dnEw0jcm4VM042Qdf_k3lr03YOYpbMFvWnIkmr0kwLQ9GA7611WGltwJ73IdubrSQ8v9laccrsJ4fhMAkgEBzvrZ9saj3MS8rmtdAmyn3sKZJN8u49lJvjx3U8Q6F0yM7kJ3vzNphYLFVzNLxU3BF99nd-5VEKuQHvK3Uicy18B7OlCXEvCrxo1YB6Waz8dZao4C7dImCEVXE-9ZaQ66i1v6vpJ7lSQKh4sI4vf8hsgx0sotUo8g0mK45KqozzOMzuJu6HbCUPf3KsRR5FUYZj9csJ9aoRnc6CiLbefxtoosk_9CkN-ndDyD9ap2zfkZSiwIasRKHxVqogYCwovKePHEm1RP4LORnfBg-P1avyj93VA4Q5n7N4snmJGNC98QFxB6BAuVx0-MckD4tTa2zuOhHbKHbQ8WrVdgF-xBJphTgVMrRervwTQds62z_0YOB47UrotsRCPPLIy6xp6aHogpuXTAt-AIemLHsVx6fhc%3D)
