name: Tim
subject: Go BENGALS!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2308%2E3611125%2EmP_40l ][IMG]

It’s Super Bowl Sunday, team!

We’ve got snacks at the ready, beer in the fridge, and you better believe
I’m rocking my Joe Burrow gear today.

I am a Browns fan through and through, but today, I’m ready to cheer on
Joe Burrow and the Cincinnati Bengals. But before I start yelling at the
TV, there’s something I’ve gotta clear up first.

My team tells me we need to raise $100,000 ASAP to launch our TV ads by
March. Without these ads, we’ll be left completely vulnerable to
Republican attacks.

Look, TV ads are expensive (just look at how much advertisers pay every
year for 30 seconds at the Super Bowl!). To make it worse, our Republican
opponents and their dark-money backers have virtually unlimited resources
to use against us on TV.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7397?t=1015&amount=25&akid=2308%2E3611125%2EmP_40l ]That’s why I need your support today. Will you chip in toward my
$100,000 TV goal so we can launch these ads ASAP? If we come up short,
it’s game over.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7397?t=1016&amount=25&akid=2308%2E3611125%2EmP_40l ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7397?t=1017&amount=50&akid=2308%2E3611125%2EmP_40l ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7397?t=1018&amount=100&akid=2308%2E3611125%2EmP_40l ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7397?t=1019&amount=200&akid=2308%2E3611125%2EmP_40l ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7397?t=1020&amount=250&akid=2308%2E3611125%2EmP_40l ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7397?t=1021&amount=30&akid=2308%2E3611125%2EmP_40l ]Other Amount

I might be the underdog in this race (not unlike the Bengals), but history
is chock-full of stories about epic comebacks and come-from-behind,
last-second victories.

My GOP opponents have more money than they know what to do with—but if we
hit this $100,000 ads goal, we can turn the tide on this race.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7397?t=1022&amount=25&akid=2308%2E3611125%2EmP_40l ]Team, you’re the MVP of this campaign, and it’s up to you
to deliver a win for Ohio. Are you ready to step up and fight for Ohio by
making a grassroots donation to my campaign right now?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7397?t=1009&amount=25&akid=2308%2E3611125%2EmP_40l ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7397?t=1010&amount=50&akid=2308%2E3611125%2EmP_40l ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7397?t=1011&amount=100&akid=2308%2E3611125%2EmP_40l ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7397?t=1012&amount=200&akid=2308%2E3611125%2EmP_40l ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7397?t=1013&amount=250&akid=2308%2E3611125%2EmP_40l ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7397?t=1014&amount=30&akid=2308%2E3611125%2EmP_40l ]Other Amount

My Republican opponents think they have us on the ropes, but it’s not over
until the final whistle blows.

Let’s go! We’ve got the momentum!

Tim

My finance team tells me that even after a small surge in grassroots donations to my campaign over the last few hours, I'm still short of my midnight fundraising goal – and at this pace, I may need to make budget cuts if I fall short.
While national Republicans are funneling _upwards of $10 million_ into this race _ _ to flip Florida red permanently, I simply cannot afford to cut back on resources. **I'm running out of time to fix this, so I'm humbly asking you to act quickly:**
[**Please, rush $5, $25 or whatever you can spare to close my fundraising gap. clean_body: If we dig deep, we will flip Florida blue | | I'm sorry to crowd your inbox, friend, but I wouldn't bump my last message if it weren't critical to defeating Marco Rubio. My finance team tells me that even after a small surge in grassroots donations to my campaign over the last few hours, I'm still short of my midnight fundraising goal – and at this pace, I may need to make budget cuts if I fall short. While national Republicans are funneling upwards of $10 million into this race to flip Florida red permanently, I simply cannot afford to cut back on resources. I'm running out of time to fix this, so I'm humbly asking you to act quickly: = | | = Thank you, thank you, thank you. Val Demings \------- Forwarded message ------- From: Rep. Val Demings Subject: Friend, PLEASE | | | = | | | | DAYS | | HRS | | | MINS | | SECS Friend, I am hours away from my midnight deadline, and I'm still short of my can't-miss goal. My race in Florida is most likely to determine Senate control, so I cannot fall behind on resources. Please, take a look at your supporter record: | | SUPPORTER RECORD EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com DONOR STATUS: PENDING SUGGESTED CONTRIBUTION: $5 DEADLINE: 11:59 p.m. | = The timing – and the sheer consequences – of falling short right now couldn't be more serious. I don't say that lightly. Polling has me down 2 points behind Marco Rubio, just as he and the GOP hauled in more than $28 million to dismantle our Senate majority. If I don't have the resources to narrow this polling gap, we could hand Senate control straight back to Mitch McConnell. With a grassroots team this strong, I know that if we dig deep, we will flip Florida blue. Point-blank, friend: That means hitting my fundraising goal. It's truly the only path we have to fighting back against GOP megadonors. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Val Demings | | | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? = If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic. = If you’re reading from your phone, to automatically sign up for my SMS team._ By providing your mobile phone number you consent to receive recurring updates from Val Demings for U.S. Senate, including by automated text message. name: =?utf-8?Q?Pro=2DLife=20Update?=
subject: Endorsement Letter from National Right to Life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Van Taylor Campaign
body:
| | | [ ](https://vantaylor.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=04792877e7849664175862700&id=21a4f4e984&e=9920087750)
---
| | The Honorable Van Taylor
Van Taylor Campaign

Dear Representative Taylor:

National Right to Life is pleased to endorse you for re-election to the U.S. House of Representatives. We strongly commend you for maintaining a perfect 100% pro-life voting record throughout the 117th Congress. Among the many initiatives you support this Congress...
* You support the Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act, which would require that a baby born alive during an abortion must be afforded the same degree of care that would apply to any other child at the same gestational age.
* You support the Pain-Capable Unborn Child Protection Act, legislation to protect unborn children when the unborn child is capable of experiencing great pain when being killed by dismemberment or other late abortion methods.
* You voted numerous times against using tax dollars to pay for abortion, and you oppose taxpayer funding of abortion providers.

You are a strong advocate for life. This endorsement reflects your commitment to strengthening a culture of life throughout our nation and in the U.S. House. We look forward to continuing our important work with you to protect the most vulnerable members of the human family – unborn children, the medically dependent, and persons with disabilities, whose lives are threatened by abortion or euthanasia.

All voters in the 3rd Congressional District who are concerned with the right to life and with the protection of the most vulnerable members of the human family should vote to return you to the U.S. House, so that you can continue to work to advance vital pro-life public policies.

Sincerely,

Carol Tobias
President

David N. O'Steen, Ph.D.
Executive Director

Jennifer Popik, J.D.
Legislative Director

Karen A. Cross
Political Director

clean_body: | | | | | The Honorable Van Taylor Van Taylor Campaign Dear Representative Taylor: National Right to Life is pleased to endorse you for re-election to the U.S. House of Representatives. We strongly commend you for maintaining a perfect 100% pro-life voting record throughout the 117th Congress. Among the many initiatives you support this Congress... You support the Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act, which would require that a baby born alive during an abortion must be afforded the same degree of care that would apply to any other child at the same gestational age. You support the Pain-Capable Unborn Child Protection Act, legislation to protect unborn children when the unborn child is capable of experiencing great pain when being killed by dismemberment or other late abortion methods. You voted numerous times against using tax dollars to pay for abortion, and you oppose taxpayer funding of abortion providers. You are a strong advocate for life. This endorsement reflects your commitment to strengthening a culture of life throughout our nation and in the U.S. House. We look forward to continuing our important work with you to protect the most vulnerable members of the human family – unborn children, the medically dependent, and persons with disabilities, whose lives are threatened by abortion or euthanasia. All voters in the 3rd Congressional District who are concerned with the right to life and with the protection of the most vulnerable members of the human family should vote to return you to the U.S. House, so that you can continue to work to advance vital pro-life public policies. Sincerely, Carol Tobias President David N. O'Steen, Ph.D. Executive Director Jennifer Popik, J.D. Legislative Director Karen A. Cross Political Director | | Paid for by the Van Taylor Campaign | Copyright © 2022 Van Taylor Campaign, All rights reserved.

name: Andy Kim
subject: We must work together to realize the change we want to see in the world
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
Tomorrow, we'll mark the anniversary of one of the deadliest school shootings in American history. Four years ago, in Parkland, Florida, a gunman took the lives of 17 people at Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School. 14 of them were children. Those kids had their whole lives ahead of them and deserved every opportunity to grow up.

This week, let us remember Alyssa Alhadeff (14), Scott Beigel (35), Martin Duque (14), Nicholas Dworet (17), Aaron Feis (37), Jaime Guttenberg (14), Chris Hixon (49), Luke Hoyer (15), Cara Loughran (14), Gina Montalto (14), Joaquin Oliver (17), Alaina Petty (14), Meadow Pollack (18), Helena Ramsay (17), Alex Schachter (14), Carmen Schentrup (16), Peter Wang (15).

lyssa Alhadeff (14), Scott Beigel (35), Martin Duque (14), Nicholas Dworet (17), Aaron Feis (37), Jaime Guttenberg (14), Chris Hixon (49), Luke Hoyer (15), Cara Loughran (14), Gina Montalto (14), Joaquin Oliver (17), Alaina Petty (14), Meadow Pollack (18), Helena Ramsay (17), Alex Schachter (14), Carmen Schentrup (16), Peter Wang (15). [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/87970/images/parklandfaces.jpg]

Let's also honor the families of the victims and the survivors. I've had a chance to meet a number of them and have been humbled by their incredible poise in channeling their pain into action seeking to compel this nation to act.

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/87970/images/kim.momsdemand.jpg]

Our country is at its best when we support one another, when we grieve together after tragedy strikes, and when we work together to realize the change we want to see in the world. These young men and women have set the example and it's on us to follow it.

Andy [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/87970/images/ak.sig2.png]

FFFFFF

Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress.

This email was sent by Andy Kim [https://andykimforcongress.com/]

Andy Kim for Congress
P.O. Box 211
Marlton, NJ 08053
United States

Email is an important way for Andy Kim to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign.

Too much email? Switch to our less email option here [https://action.andykim.com/a/less-email?contactdata=ajsLc10DmC57zU94c7rtuE/iRQniyiqX3aiN38pyZP+hXUUMQAMCiifEvSj5Vg9i] .

Click here to update your email address or other information. [https://action.andykim.com/a/update-info?accessCode=0e30c473-52b8-bc09-1900-19a760b09257&sspStartingTab=ContactInfo]

If you no longer want to hear from Andy, click here to get off all our lists instantly [https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/6ea37e9f-158d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/fcdba28a-198d-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2RiYTI4YS0xOThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9oT4xD_XaDk-SbZR4hVpQk6_O9k4V3-pi2mjkiUZNBg=&id=129251239] .

Questions or concerns? Contact us here [https://andykimforcongress.com/contact/] .

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Look at where our opponents are getting their campaign money
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, when
Democrats are taking money from ExxonMobil, the Koch brothers, the
American Petroleum Institute, and Citi Bank we know there’s a problem.

That’s a big reason we’re waging progressive primaries against the
Democratic establishment.

Henry Cuellar, who Jessica Cisneros is taking on in the TX-28 primary, has
taken BIG checks from Oil & Gas companies like Valero and Marathon, GOP
mega-donors like the Koch brothers, big Wall Street banks like Citi and
JPMorgan, weapons manufacturers like Lockheed Martin, and the list goes
on. Corporate and GOP money fuels Cuellar’s conservative, anti-abortion
agenda in the House. And it’s given him a huge edge in fundraising over
Jessica, who isn’t taking a dime from corporate PACs.

Our other incumbent opponents Danny Davis and Carolyn Maloney, despite
claiming to champion progressive policies, have similarly accepted huge
sums from pharmaceutical and insurance companies, Wall Street, weapons
manufacturers, and Big Real Estate.

Democrats taking corporate money is what leads to policymaking for
corporations and their CEOs, instead of legislating for the people.
Justice Democrats is running a slate of candidates that take ZERO
corporate PAC dollars and will always fight for the people.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/94089?refcode=em20220213-21932&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=21932%2E1203867%2EXuJx3p ]Chip in $3 right now to help us defeat corporate-backed
incumbents and elect more candidates who won’t back down on the fight for
Medicare for All and a Green New Deal.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/94089?refcode=em20220213-21932&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=21932%2E1203867%2EXuJx3p ]Contribute $3

There is no way for a politician to justify taking corporate PAC money.
You’re either for the people or for Citi Bank, Lockheed Martin, and
ExxonMobil.

One Democrat that took a check from Exxon last quarter: Kyrsten Sinema.
She and Joe Manchin have taken big fossil fuel money, and fat donations
from GOP mega-donors, all while they block the most basic health care
reforms and climate change measures from passing the Senate.

We will never achieve real progress in Congress until we elect more
representatives that govern for the people, not corporations and the super
rich.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/94089?refcode=em20220213-21932&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=21932%2E1203867%2EXuJx3p ]Chip in $3 today and help us elect our slate of Justice
Democrats and re-elect the Squad. We need fighters in Congress to fight
for the people, not corporations and lobbyists.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=21932%2E1203867%2EXuJx3p ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=21932%2E1203867%2EXuJx3p ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220213-21932-footer&t=1025&refcode2=21932_1203867_XuJx3p&akid=21932%2E1203867%2EXuJx3p

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=21932%2E1203867%2EXuJx3p

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41757961/330211561/-303679825?refcode=em_fr_2022.02.13_b1_qq_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzJiMzI5Mi0xZThkLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=en__51GjY6Ov9DylDOkMSVO4PNk_M6hP5iGtn-7cr8M=) Watching athletes perform at the top of their game is inspiring and a testament to the results of hard work and dedication – fundamental values that continue to guide me until this day. name: Erica Smith
subject: I’m running against an insurrectionist
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

The *last* thing I want to do on a Sunday is to ask grassroots supporters
like you for money — I’m a minister, after all.

But our campaign’s mid-month deadline expires tomorrow at midnight, and
our finance team suggested I reach out to humbly ask you to [ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/40387?refcode=em20220213-875&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=875%2E3698%2EsXewDE ]donate
$5 to help us reach our $20,000 goal. But before I do, I’d
like to explain why your donation today is so important:

Recently, the N.C. Supreme Court ruled the GOP’s racist gerrymandering was
illegal and threw out our congressional maps.

Now, the Republican-led state legislature will be releasing brand-new
district lines in a matter of days, and we have to be prepared for
whatever is thrown our way.

So I’m asking our strongest grassroots supporters: [ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/40387?refcode=em20220213-875&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=875%2E3698%2EsXewDE ]Can you make an
urgent $5 contribution by clicking here. Every donation
will help us reach our $20,000 goal and ensure we have the resources to
respond.

No matter what the final lines look like, our district will be highly
competitive, and this race will be critical in protecting our Democratic
majority in the U.S. House.

That’s why far-right extremists like Madison Cawthorn have already zeroed
in on our race and are backing our GOP opponent, Sandy Smith.

There’s no way I’m letting insurrectionist traitor Sandy Smith be our next
representative.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/40387?refcode=em20220213-875&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=875%2E3698%2EsXewDE ]If you’re with me, please rush a contribution of $5 or
whatever you can to help us reach our February mid-month fundraising goal
and win this wide-open U.S. House seat. Right now, I need your support
more than ever.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/40387?refcode=em20220213-875&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=875%2E3698%2EsXewDE ]Donate $5

Together, we’re going to win this seat and bring home change for the
communities and people that need it most.

Thank you from the bottom of my heart,

Erica
Erica Smith for Congress

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220213-875-footer&t=1023&refcode2=875_3698_sXewDE&akid=875%2E3698%2EsXewDE

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=875%2E3698%2EsXewDE

PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brice=20Wiggins?=
subject: Brice Wiggins Weekly Legislative & Campaign Trail Update Feb. 13, 2022
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9b6ebb40d75c/brice-wiggins-for-congress-highlights-from-the-campaign-trail-8847429?e=698f056321)
---
Here is a recap of a few highlights from this week in my role as State Senator from District 52, as well as updates from our Congressional Campaign. Fulfilling my duties as State Senator will be a top priority for me during this campaign. After all, I took an oath to honorably serve my constituents and the Constitution.
|
---
|
---
_“Words without actions are the assassins of idealism.”_ _― Herbert Hoover_
|
---
| | | | | |
---
|
### Attended the Grand Opening of Pearl River County Intervention Court Office
I was able to attend the grand opening of the Pearl River County Intervention Court Office. Skyler, who I’m pictured with, said, “Drug Court saved my life” and in the process reconnected her with her 8-year-old son. Proof of why I have led on helping make drug courts and intervention courts a reality in Mississippi. Not only are costs on our court and corrections systems saved, but we change the future of Mississippians for the better. This is the leadership you will see from me on the national level. While also there, I was able to address the Pearl River County Board of Supervisors and join in congratulating the Pearl River County Community College Cheerleaders on their victory.|
---
| | | | | |
### Spoke to Mississippi Academy of Family Physicians
It was an honor speaking at Mississippi Academy of Family Physicians' annual Capitol Day on Wednesday. I was joined by rural scholars, residents from several family medicine residencies around the state, including Memorial Hospital on the Coast and William Carey in Hattiesburg and active physicians in our communities. High level healthcare leads to high-paying jobs along with increased economic activity. I’ve pledged to do all I can to build on and expand our economic development in South Mississippi. Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=9bb9660bca&e=698f056321) to watch our policy video on economic development. |
---
|
---
| | | | | |
---
|
### Spoke at Sumrall Lion’s Club
What a great turnout at the Sumrall Lion's Club Thursday evening. The Lion’s Club does great work locally and internationally, particularly in addressing blindness. While there, I got to meet Andy Davis who is the head coach of Sumrall High School's baseball team. They have an incredible program with years of tremendous success. I look forward to keeping up with them. Also, a big thank you to Dr. Beam for inviting me to attend and speak.|
---
| | | | | |
### Met with CWA Legislative Political Action Team
I had the opportunity to meet with James Young and other members of the CWA (Communications Workers of America) Legislative Political Action Team Wednesday morning at the state Capitol. This group represents a voice on the job everyday. I'm always willing to meet face-to-face with concerned citizens of South Mississippi.|
---
|
---
| | | | | |
---
|
### Ocean Springs Mardi Gras Parade
Started Mardi Gras off right at the Ocean Springs Parade! What a wonderful place and people we have here in South Mississippi! Being with the people of South Mississippi is and will always be my priority. Representing US, not the status quo in D.C. is what we are about.Watch our policy video on servant leadership by clicking [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=dc2e8c829e&e=698f056321).|
---
| | | | | | |
---
|
---
## The Week Ahead
* Appropriations Work Begins in Earnest.
* Bills from the House of Representatives Will Be Assigned to Senate Committees.

|
---
Please stay tuned for future emails with updates from the legislative session, District 52, community events, and our Congressional campaign. Our campaign is in full swing and as you know, getting our message out takes funding. If you would like to provide financial support, please click the button below.

Sincerely,
| [DONATE TO OUR CAMPAIGN](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=d86a4fcc52&e=698f056321)
---
|
---
|
---
Keep Up With Us!
| | | | [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=598d9b93d3&e=698f056321)| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=7cc25728e9&e=698f056321)| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=5119e355df&e=698f056321)| [](mailto:info@bricewiggins.ms)| [](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=81b576812b&e=698f056321)

NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com
UNIQUE ID: #5907903
SUPPORTER RESPONSE: [**UNCONFIRMED >>**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Eqxzt_)

Jen Psaki is an INCREDIBLE Press Secretary.

_She 's working tirelessly to explain President Biden's HISTORIC Build Back Better agenda to the American people._

_She 's fighting to restore trust in the free press after the Trump Administration's horrific attacks on the media. _

**_And as you read this, she 's combating misinformation and fringe, right-wing conspiracy theories._**

But Jen Psaki has previously announced she'd be leaving the White House in early 2022...

_... Which means she could announce her departure at any moment!_

We'd hate to see such an INCREDIBLE Press Secretary leave at such a pivotal moment for our country - but we need to know if our strongest supporters agree.

That's why we're calling for 25,000 responses to our survey before midnight.

[**Will you take our one-minute survey before midnight and let us know if you think Jen Psaki should STAY on as White House Press Secretary? >>**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/mPmpcqe_)
---

Thank you,

we have Warnock’s opponent right where we want him:
| _We’re crying tears of JOY:_

**FIRST:** A surge of MAGA dark money made Democrat Raphael Warnock PLUMMET in the polls against his Trump-endorsed MAGA opponent.

**BUT THEN:** We asked for donations to help Democrats like Warnock... and good Democrats like you _STEPPED UP!!_ [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5884?t=6&akid=1256%2E878179%2ES1_Lf1) **SO NOW: We can’t let our foot off the gas for ONE-SECOND!**

We have Warnock’s GOP opponent right where we want him – but we need to raise _$15,000 before our strict Mid-Month deadline_ on TUESDAY to seal his fate.
**REMEMBER: If we lose, the GOP will flip the entire Senate RED.**

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.
